messages.text: Hari naam ki hariyali hi saanchhii sheetal pradata hai.
messages.fullText:
Hari naam ki hariyali hi saanchhii sheetal pradata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Apne upper hi sadaiv ankush rakhen.
messages.fullText:
Apne upper hi sadaiv ankush rakhen.
Hari om.

messages.text: Iishvar ke prakatay ki hur pal ,hur kahin sambhavna hai,bus hum apne aap se sacchhe v imandar reh saken.
messages.fullText:
Iishvar ke prakatay ki hur pal ,hur kahin sambhavna hai,bus hum apne aap se sacchhe v imandar reh saken.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan ki dhanyata apne hi agyan ko Jeet lene me hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki dhanyata apne hi agyan ko Jeet lene me hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Chit ki akagrata bahut badi puunjii hai.
messages.fullText:
Chit ki akagrata bahut badi puunjii hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Adhyatm hi manushya jeevan ke saanche uddeshya ko ujagar karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm hi manushya jeevan ke saanche uddeshya ko ujagar karta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Deh ki jadta, muudhta v chanchalya se duur rehna hi aadhyatmik abhyas hai.
messages.fullText:
Deh ki jadta, muudhta v chanchalya se duur rehna hi aadhyatmik abhyas hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bus iss pull me rehne se anter ki cluttering(utpat) shant hota jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Bus iss pull me rehne se anter ki cluttering(utpat) shant hota jata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Pavitr akant hi iishvar jagran me hetu hai.
messages.fullText:
Pavitr akant hi iishvar jagran me hetu hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Vivek,vichar jagriti jeevan ke hur mousam  ko sehaj buna deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Vivek,vichar jagriti jeevan ke hur mousam  ko sehaj buna deti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Prakriti me Divya sanchar hur pal sancharit ho Raha hota hai,bus hum anubhut ker saken.
messages.fullText:
Prakriti me Divya sanchar hur pal sancharit ho Raha hota hai,bus hum anubhut ker saken.
Hari om.

messages.text: Buddhii ka ashvarya tabhi pragat hota hai,jub sthayee samadhan mil Jaye.
messages.fullText:
Buddhii ka ashvarya tabhi pragat hota hai,jub sthayee samadhan mil Jaye.
Hari om.

messages.text: Anantata ko uplabdh ho Jane ka naam hi jivan hai.
messages.fullText:
Anantata ko uplabdh ho Jane ka naam hi jivan hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Antehkaran ka satat pavas hote chalna hi sabse badi upasna hai.
messages.fullText:
Antehkaran ka satat pavas hote chalna hi sabse badi upasna hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sadhna jivan ko sehajta pradan karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna jivan ko sehajta pradan karti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Andrik sanyam sabse bada sanyam hai.
messages.fullText:
Andrik sanyam sabse bada sanyam hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Mahan vyakti apne svabhav se aavrit ho sabhika Kalyan chahte hai.
messages.fullText:
Mahan vyakti apne svabhav se aavrit ho sabhika Kalyan chahte hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Aadhyatm hamare intellect ,hamare logics per hathode ka Kam karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Aadhyatm hamare intellect ,hamare logics per hathode ka Kam karta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Hamara jivan hamare jeene ke prakar per ashrit hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamara jivan hamare jeene ke prakar per ashrit hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Agyan hi akmatr hamari mansik asvasthta ka mool Karan hai.
messages.fullText:
Agyan hi akmatr hamari mansik asvasthta ka mool Karan hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Prachand bhogvad jivan ko daityarup bana deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Prachand bhogvad jivan ko daityarup bana deta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Dusron ke hisse unhe lotana hi yagya hai.
messages.fullText:
Dusron ke hisse unhe lotana hi yagya hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sadhak ko apne abhyas se kabhi bhi tripti nahi aani chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Sadhak ko apne abhyas se kabhi bhi tripti nahi aani chahiye.
Hari om.

messages.text: Avidya hume apne succhh ki aur se upekshit rakhti hai,ateh jagriti me rahen.
messages.fullText:
Avidya hume apne succhh ki aur se upekshit rakhti hai,ateh jagriti me rahen.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bhagvateeya kripa ki ahsasasta ke liye guru hi akmatr sabal setu hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvateeya kripa ki ahsasasta ke liye guru hi akmatr sabal setu hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sehajta jeevan ka sundertam aabhushan hai.
messages.fullText:
Sehajta jeevan ka sundertam aabhushan hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Aatmik Gyan jeevan ki raftar me sveekriti bhav ko udit karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Aatmik Gyan jeevan ki raftar me sveekriti bhav ko udit karta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Satsang ki nirantarta guru kripa se Satya ko uplabdh kera deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang ki nirantarta guru kripa se Satya ko uplabdh kera deti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Hari naam hi akmatr jivan ki hariyali hai.
messages.fullText:
Hari naam hi akmatr jivan ki hariyali hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sadhak ki sadhna pure vayumandal me nisarit hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhak ki sadhna pure vayumandal me nisarit hoti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sant sangati,satsang jeevan ke Kalyan ki sarvocchh aushadh hai.
messages.fullText:
Sant sangati,satsang jeevan ke Kalyan ki sarvocchh aushadh hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Purn ka chintan,Manan ,bhajan Karne se hi purn ki anubhuti hogi.
messages.fullText:
Purn ka chintan,Manan ,bhajan Karne se hi purn ki anubhuti hogi.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan ke saralikaran me keval aur keval atm Gyan hi sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke saralikaran me keval aur keval atm Gyan hi sahayak hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru Gyan,vichar ki divyatamta hai,bus hum Lena seekhe.
messages.fullText:
Guru Gyan,vichar ki divyatamta hai,bus hum Lena seekhe.
Hari om.

messages.text: Samarpan se sunder kuchh bhi nahi hai.
messages.fullText:
Samarpan se sunder kuchh bhi nahi hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru bhav ki prachandata hone per gambhirya,divyata,shuchita,madhurya v naitik bul aata hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru bhav ki prachandata hone per gambhirya,divyata,shuchita,madhurya v naitik bul aata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Katha shravan avam guru sannidhii Kalyan ke Pat khol dete hai.
messages.fullText:
Katha shravan avam guru sannidhii Kalyan ke Pat khol dete hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Hum Prakriti se mili hur cheej ke upasak bane rahe.
messages.fullText:
Hum Prakriti se mili hur cheej ke upasak bane rahe.
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru,sant,Mahatma bhavrog ke vaidya hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru,sant,Mahatma bhavrog ke vaidya hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sarvhitay bhav me rehna hi sacchhi puja hai,upasna hai.
messages.fullText:
Sarvhitay bhav me rehna hi sacchhi puja hai,upasna hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sant sannidhi jeevan me mili hur cheej ko Kalyan ki sambhvna buna deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Sant sannidhi jeevan me mili hur cheej ko Kalyan ki sambhvna buna deti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Apni Purnta ki uplabdhi hi manushya deh ki saanchhii destiny hai.
messages.fullText:
Apni Purnta ki uplabdhi hi manushya deh ki saanchhii destiny hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Agyan ruup keechad se Bahar nikalne me akmatr guru hi samarth hai.
messages.fullText:
Agyan ruup keechad se Bahar nikalne me akmatr guru hi samarth hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bhagvateeya Katha ka divyatam shravan kisi bhagyashali janm me hi labdh ho pata hi.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvateeya Katha ka divyatam shravan kisi bhagyashali janm me hi labdh ho pata hi.
Hari om.

messages.text: Dusron ke satkarm me kabhi bhi badha mut dalna,yeh dharm hai.
messages.fullText:
Dusron ke satkarm me kabhi bhi badha mut dalna,yeh dharm hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Vidya ,Gyan shraddhavan ke pas svayam chali aati hai.
messages.fullText:
Vidya ,Gyan shraddhavan ke pas svayam chali aati hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Hamare abhyas ke liye gurudev ke lagaye vatvriksh ki chandna ko shat shat naman.
messages.fullText:
Hamare abhyas ke liye gurudev ke lagaye vatvriksh ki chandna ko shat shat naman.
Hari om.

messages.text: Aaj ke yug me mansik upasna ka bada bhari mahatmay hai.
messages.fullText:
Aaj ke yug me mansik upasna ka bada bhari mahatmay hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan ke Russ banaye rakhne ka naam hi utsav hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke Russ banaye rakhne ka naam hi utsav hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Hur din uunchha uthne ke liye hi aata hai.
messages.fullText:
Hur din uunchha uthne ke liye hi aata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text:
Jivan me guru ka aagman hi Prasad ki vyapakta ka
mahatmay ujagar karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jivan me guru ka aagman hi Prasad ki vyapakta ka
mahatmay ujagar karta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Shubh karmon ka satatya jivan me satat buna rahe.
messages.fullText:
Shubh karmon ka satatya jivan me satat buna rahe.
Hari om.

messages.text: Apne hi agyan ko Jeet lene me  jivan ki dhanyata hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne hi agyan ko Jeet lene me  jivan ki dhanyata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Hame mila sub kucchh akmatr iishvar ka hi vishisht prabhav hai,apna kucchh bhi nahi.
messages.fullText:
Hame mila sub kucchh akmatr iishvar ka hi vishisht prabhav hai,apna kucchh bhi nahi.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan me satat dharm ka aachran buna rahe.
messages.fullText:
Jivan me satat dharm ka aachran buna rahe.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sadhna ki murmsthali satat shradhha se adr rehni chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna ki murmsthali satat shradhha se adr rehni chahiye.
Hari om.

messages.text: Apne svaruup me hi uchhata,vaibhav v aishvarya ka nit nit pravah hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne svaruup me hi uchhata,vaibhav v aishvarya ka nit nit pravah hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru kripa ki fulshruti atm kripa ke hote chalne per hi pragat hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa ki fulshruti atm kripa ke hote chalne per hi pragat hoti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Atm Nishchay hi par lagane Vala hai.
messages.fullText:
Atm Nishchay hi par lagane Vala hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Hari naam hi jivan ki saanchhii dharohar hai.
messages.fullText:
Hari naam hi jivan ki saanchhii dharohar hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan ka lakshya ak hone per uske aayamon ke sampadit hone me sehaj ruup me naveenta buni rehti hai.
messages.fullText:
Jivan ka lakshya ak hone per uske aayamon ke sampadit hone me sehaj ruup me naveenta buni rehti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan ke sarvocchh lakshya ka hur pul ahsas sadguru kripa ke sivay aur kucchh bhi nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jivan ke sarvocchh lakshya ka hur pul ahsas sadguru kripa ke sivay aur kucchh bhi nahi.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sadhna hur pal jeevant rahe.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna hur pal jeevant rahe.
Hari om.

messages.text: Hriday gufa me satat naam simran se hi prakash hota hai,keval baharly sadhan se nahi.
messages.fullText:
Hriday gufa me satat naam simran se hi prakash hota hai,keval baharly sadhan se nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang ka satatya hi jivan ka saanchha bul hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang ka satatya hi jivan ka saanchha bul hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Apne muul parichay ki sarthakta ki sthali satsang hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne muul parichay ki sarthakta ki sthali satsang hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan Kalyan ke prati satat jagrukta hi iski saanchhii aaradhna hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan Kalyan ke prati satat jagrukta hi iski saanchhii aaradhna hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan Kalyan ke prati satat jagrukta hi iski saanchhii aaradhna hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan Kalyan ke prati satat jagrukta hi iski saanchhii aaradhna hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Hamare anterghat ki puuri puuri pehchan guru ko hi hoti hai.ateh vo hi hamare sampurn Kalyan me sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamare anterghat ki puuri puuri pehchan guru ko hi hoti hai.ateh vo hi hamare sampurn Kalyan me sahayak hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Iisht ki sharnagati hi akmatr jeevan ki vandneeyata hai.
messages.fullText:
Iisht ki sharnagati hi akmatr jeevan ki vandneeyata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Satsang ki nirantarta hi atmbull ka sarvocchh aalamban hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang ki nirantarta hi atmbull ka sarvocchh aalamban hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Apna Satya bodh hi jivan ka sarvocchh purusharth hai.
messages.fullText:
Apna Satya bodh hi jivan ka sarvocchh purusharth hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Satat akhandata se yog bana rahe.
messages.fullText:
Satat akhandata se yog bana rahe.
Hari om.

messages.text: Satsang ke satatya ki Divya mahima ko antertam ki gehraiyon me mehsuus karte chalen.
messages.fullText:
Satsang ke satatya ki Divya mahima ko antertam ki gehraiyon me mehsuus karte chalen.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sant,mahatmano ka jivan me alamban hi akmatr ise sehaj,sugam,svabhavik banaye rakhne me hetu hai.
messages.fullText:
Sant,mahatmano ka jivan me alamban hi akmatr ise sehaj,sugam,svabhavik banaye rakhne me hetu hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Apne dharm ke aalamban me satat rehna hi jeevan ka samman hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne dharm ke aalamban me satat rehna hi jeevan ka samman hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan ke dhyey ki sarvocchhta bane rehne per yeh sugam bhasne lagta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke dhyey ki sarvocchhta bane rehne per yeh sugam bhasne lagta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jagat ke mithyatv ki Satyata ke kapat akmatr iishh charno me satat samarpit rehne per hi khul pate hai.
messages.fullText:
Jagat ke mithyatv ki Satyata ke kapat akmatr iishh charno me satat samarpit rehne per hi khul pate hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sant mahatmano ke divya prabhav ashrey me reh ker hi jivan ki sehajta ko uplabdh reh sakte hai.
messages.fullText:
Sant mahatmano ke divya prabhav ashrey me reh ker hi jivan ki sehajta ko uplabdh reh sakte hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Apne svaruup me satat tatasth rehte hue jagtik vartan hone den.
messages.fullText:
Apne svaruup me satat tatasth rehte hue jagtik vartan hone den.
Hari om.

messages.text: Atm tatasthta me hi saanchha sukh hai.
messages.fullText:
Atm tatasthta me hi saanchha sukh hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan ka ucchhta ki aur agrasaran hi iski sacchhi jivantata hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka ucchhta ki aur agrasaran hi iski sacchhi jivantata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Apne svayam ke prabandhan me kami ke Karan hi Hum pareshan hote hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne svayam ke prabandhan me kami ke Karan hi Hum pareshan hote hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bhotikeeya abhyas ki adhikta hi Hume jadta me let aati hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhotikeeya abhyas ki adhikta hi Hume jadta me let aati hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Hamara pratyek din ka jivan hi hamari upasna hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamara pratyek din ka jivan hi hamari upasna hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Vichar sampada ke dhani bune.
messages.fullText:
Vichar sampada ke dhani bune.
Hari om.

messages.text: Satya hi apna vastvik parichay hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya hi apna vastvik parichay hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Charaveti,charaveti hi sadhna ka dharm hai.
messages.fullText:
Charaveti,charaveti hi sadhna ka dharm hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sansar ke nanatv me sarvatr,sarvada akmatr iishvar hi aasin hai.
messages.fullText:
Sansar ke nanatv me sarvatr,sarvada akmatr iishvar hi aasin hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Satsang ka satatya hi akmatr jivan parishkar ki sundertam vidha hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang ka satatya hi akmatr jivan parishkar ki sundertam vidha hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan ka veg dhoop,agarbatti ki suvass bune.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka veg dhoop,agarbatti ki suvass bune.
Hari om.

messages.text: Samay ki prabhuta ka samman Karen.
messages.fullText:
Samay ki prabhuta ka samman Karen.
Hari om.

messages.text: Hur pal apne Nishchay ki dridhta me rahe.
messages.fullText:
Hur pal apne Nishchay ki dridhta me rahe.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sadguru ke charno ka divya ashrey hi akmatr rah sanketak hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadguru ke charno ka divya ashrey hi akmatr rah sanketak hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan ki adhyatmik pariniti akmatr iski sehajta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jivan ki adhyatmik pariniti akmatr iski sehajta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Ak iishvar se itar koi bhi aadhar keval durbalta ko aamantrit karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Ak iishvar se itar koi bhi aadhar keval durbalta ko aamantrit karta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Iisht ke satat sanidhya me kitna sukh hai......
messages.fullText:
Iisht ke satat sanidhya me kitna sukh hai......
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru satta ke adrishya bul ko satat mehsoos karte chalen.
messages.fullText:
Guru satta ke adrishya bul ko satat mehsoos karte chalen.
Hari om.

messages.text: Svayam ke prati abadh satarkta avam chokasta hi sadhna ki kunji hai.
messages.fullText:
Svayam ke prati abadh satarkta avam chokasta hi sadhna ki kunji hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru bhav ki prabalta jivan ko gambhiryata,pavitrata v divyata deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru bhav ki prabalta jivan ko gambhiryata,pavitrata v divyata deti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan ka succhh Hume durbal nahin aur sabal bana deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka succhh Hume durbal nahin aur sabal bana deta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan ki Len den purti me akmatr gyan hi pag pag per sacchha bandhu bandhav hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki Len den purti me akmatr gyan hi pag pag per sacchha bandhu bandhav hota hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan akmatr atmsudhar ke liye hi mila hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan akmatr atmsudhar ke liye hi mila hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Nav varsh  anmol jivan ki sarthakta ke prati hum sabko aur gambheer banaye.
messages.fullText:
Nav varsh  anmol jivan ki sarthakta ke prati hum sabko aur gambheer banaye.
Hari om.

messages.text: Atm smriti hi akmatr jivan ki sehajta ka parichay hai.
messages.fullText:
Atm smriti hi akmatr jivan ki sehajta ka parichay hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Vishayee jivan atm Kalyan ki sari smbhavnaon ko dhvast ker deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Vishayee jivan atm Kalyan ki sari smbhavnaon ko dhvast ker deta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sarvpratham Svakalyan ki salangnata hi akmatr sarvmangalya bhav ko ujagar kar pati hai.
messages.fullText:
Sarvpratham Svakalyan ki salangnata hi akmatr sarvmangalya bhav ko ujagar kar pati hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan ki sabalta akmatr Satya aachran ke satatya me hai.
messages.fullText:
Jivan ki sabalta akmatr Satya aachran ke satatya me hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Purn ka chintan,Manan karte rehne per hi purnata ki anubhuti sambhav hai.
messages.fullText:
Purn ka chintan,Manan karte rehne per hi purnata ki anubhuti sambhav hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan ke safar me akmatr aadhyatmikta hi saanchha saath deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Jivan ke safar me akmatr aadhyatmikta hi saanchha saath deti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sansarik aakarshano ki bhook see upper uthte chalna hi guru kripa hai.
messages.fullText:
Sansarik aakarshano ki bhook see upper uthte chalna hi guru kripa hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru se atm parichay pate hi hum guru parampara ke aishvarya ke adhikari bun jate hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru se atm parichay pate hi hum guru parampara ke aishvarya ke adhikari bun jate hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Aadhyatmik anubhav vilakshadta ka hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Aadhyatmik anubhav vilakshadta ka hota hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru kripa hame apna hi vaidya bana deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa hame apna hi vaidya bana deti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Apne Divya,saanche parichay me hi akmatr purnta ka vaas hai,sansar me nahi.
messages.fullText:
Apne Divya,saanche parichay me hi akmatr purnta ka vaas hai,sansar me nahi.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan me manushya ki niti ka rehna param aavashyak hai .
messages.fullText:
Jivan me manushya ki niti ka rehna param aavashyak hai .
Hari om.

messages.text: Aadhyatmik vicharna hi adhyatmik vyaktitv banati hai.
messages.fullText:
Aadhyatmik vicharna hi adhyatmik vyaktitv banati hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Aadhyatmikta jeevan ki bahirgamanta ko shant karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Aadhyatmikta jeevan ki bahirgamanta ko shant karti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Aadhyatmik drishtikon jivan me vyavahar ki bahulyata ko santulit karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Aadhyatmik drishtikon jivan me vyavahar ki bahulyata ko santulit karta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Chiranjivi prasannta vichar v Gyan se milti hai.
messages.fullText:
Chiranjivi prasannta vichar v Gyan se milti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Satkarmo ki gopneeyata me hi sadhak ka Kalyan hai.
messages.fullText:
Satkarmo ki gopneeyata me hi sadhak ka Kalyan hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Atmgyan  ruup samriddhii se badh ker kucchh bhi aur nahi hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan  ruup samriddhii se badh ker kucchh bhi aur nahi hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sant Vani ka samarth unki rehni ki hi fulshruti hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Sant Vani ka samarth unki rehni ki hi fulshruti hoti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan jeene ki sundertam vidha akmatr sant charan sharan me hi milti hai.
messages.fullText:
Jivan jeene ki sundertam vidha akmatr sant charan sharan me hi milti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Shraddha,vishvas ki dridhta hi akmatr jivan ki utkrishtata me sahayak bante hai.
messages.fullText:
Shraddha,vishvas ki dridhta hi akmatr jivan ki utkrishtata me sahayak bante hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Satya ki Ott me rehne se badh ker koi dharm nahi hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya ki Ott me rehne se badh ker koi dharm nahi hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Aaj ke din yeh sankalp len,humara jivan purn ruup se aadhyatmik bune.
messages.fullText:
Aaj ke din yeh sankalp len,humara jivan purn ruup se aadhyatmik bune.
Hari om.

messages.text: Aadhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ko santulit uddan pradan karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Aadhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ko santulit uddan pradan karta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sadhna ka satatya jivan ki aapadhapi se mukt karta jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna ka satatya jivan ki aapadhapi se mukt karta jata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru satta hi satsang ki atma hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru satta hi satsang ki atma hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Iisht ka naikatya surakshit rakhta hai.
messages.fullText:
Iisht ka naikatya surakshit rakhta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Lokikta ke vyavahar me ulajh ker kucchh bhi pa nahi sakenge.ateh Satya rath per aaroodh rahen.
messages.fullText:
Lokikta ke vyavahar me ulajh ker kucchh bhi pa nahi sakenge.ateh Satya rath per aaroodh rahen.
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru Charan sharan hi akmatr Kalyan dwar hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru Charan sharan hi akmatr Kalyan dwar hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sant,mahatmano ,vigya purushon ke jeevan ka anusheelan hi hamare jivan ka dhyey hona chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Sant,mahatmano ,vigya purushon ke jeevan ka anusheelan hi hamare jivan ka dhyey hona chahiye.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan ko samajhne ka  aaj hi prayas ho, kul nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ko samajhne ka  aaj hi prayas ho, kul nahi.
Hari om.

messages.text: Karm ke veg ko akmatr karmyoga se hi shithil Kiya ja sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Karm ke veg ko akmatr karmyoga se hi shithil Kiya ja sakta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Pradarshan ka svabhav jivan me sadhna ko gondd buna deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Pradarshan ka svabhav jivan me sadhna ko gondd buna deta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan ki uunchaiyan tyag me hai.
messages.fullText:
Jivan ki uunchaiyan tyag me hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bin shradhha ke Gyan prakashit nahi hota.
messages.fullText:
Bin shradhha ke Gyan prakashit nahi hota.
Hari om.

messages.text: Vichar beej ki mahima apar apar hai.
messages.fullText:
Vichar beej ki mahima apar apar hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Kathayen hamare jivan ko sunderta avam ujala pradan karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Kathayen hamare jivan ko sunderta avam ujala pradan karti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sabko uski svatantrata ka Dan do.
messages.fullText:
Sabko uski svatantrata ka Dan do.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sadhak ke liye savdhani hi sadhna hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhak ke liye savdhani hi sadhna hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sadhak ki parivarikta virat ho jati hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhak ki parivarikta virat ho jati hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan ke ang pratyang me satat srijan visarjan ki prakriya vidyaman hai.
messages.fullText:
Jivan ke ang pratyang me satat srijan visarjan ki prakriya vidyaman hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sadhuta vairagya Lakshmi, vichar Lakshmi ki hi icchha rakhti hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhuta vairagya Lakshmi, vichar Lakshmi ki hi icchha rakhti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Apne svaruup me hi samast daivik aishvarya chipa hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne svaruup me hi samast daivik aishvarya chipa hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bhagvat kathayen Hume sanskarit karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvat kathayen Hume sanskarit karti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Prem aur Karuna hamara svabhavik svabhav hai.
messages.fullText:
Prem aur Karuna hamara svabhavik svabhav hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Atyantik sukh se badh ker koi sukh nahi.
messages.fullText:
Atyantik sukh se badh ker koi sukh nahi.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bhajan hi mun ko svasth rakhne ka akmatr upay hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhajan hi mun ko svasth rakhne ka akmatr upay hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sadhak aathon preher hi sdhak hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhak aathon preher hi sdhak hota hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Hamara svaruup hi nitya yog hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamara svaruup hi nitya yog hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Padarthon me apurnta hai,jabki Prasad me sampurnta.
messages.fullText:
Padarthon me apurnta hai,jabki Prasad me sampurnta.
Hari om.

messages.text: Raag dwesh ke shithilikaran se ye mun swateh hi shant hota jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Raag dwesh ke shithilikaran se ye mun swateh hi shant hota jata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan sarthakta ke marg ka pratham aur antim sopan hai,Atm Sudhar.
messages.fullText:
Jivan sarthakta ke marg ka pratham aur antim sopan hai,Atm Sudhar.
Hari om.

messages.text: Andrik durbaltaon,vishayee aakarshano se upper uthte chalna hi guru kripa hai.
messages.fullText:
Andrik durbaltaon,vishayee aakarshano se upper uthte chalna hi guru kripa hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Akant ki pavitrata me hi iishvar samarthay jagrit hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Akant ki pavitrata me hi iishvar samarthay jagrit hota hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Svasudhar ki prakriya hi jeevan ke margdarshan ke liye prakash stambh hai.
messages.fullText:
Svasudhar ki prakriya hi jeevan ke margdarshan ke liye prakash stambh hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan ka rus vichar,chintan v samadhan me hai.
messages.fullText:
Jivan ka rus vichar,chintan v samadhan me hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan ke pratyek shann me anter ki vyavastha shaleen rahe.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke pratyek shann me anter ki vyavastha shaleen rahe.
Hari om.

messages.text: Satsang ka satatya hi jivan ko asatya se Satya ki aur le Jane me sarvsamarth hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang ka satatya hi jivan ko asatya se Satya ki aur le Jane me sarvsamarth hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sadhak mun pashchimi akarshano se pare hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhak mun pashchimi akarshano se pare hota hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeev purn ka ansh hone se hur paripeksh me purnta ko khojta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeev purn ka ansh hone se hur paripeksh me purnta ko khojta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Deh ki jadta,chanchalya aur durbaltaon se duur hote chalna hi adhyatm hai.
messages.fullText:
Deh ki jadta,chanchalya aur durbaltaon se duur hote chalna hi adhyatm hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan Rus ko banaye rakhne ka naam utsav hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan Rus ko banaye rakhne ka naam utsav hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan ki sukhadta ka rehasya hai,matraon ka sahi anupat.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki sukhadta ka rehasya hai,matraon ka sahi anupat.
Hari om.

messages.text: Adhyatmik rang ka prabhav hi akmatr chiranjivi hai,ateh isime range rahen.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik rang ka prabhav hi akmatr chiranjivi hai,ateh isime range rahen.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bin Hari kripa ke yeh jeev apne alokik parichay se rikt hi rehta hai.
messages.fullText:
Bin Hari kripa ke yeh jeev apne alokik parichay se rikt hi rehta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Prem aur Karuna hamari svabhavik maang hai.
messages.fullText:
Prem aur Karuna hamari svabhavik maang hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bhagvan naam ka dravya jeevan me spashtata lata hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan naam ka dravya jeevan me spashtata lata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Prasadik bhav hi jivan me prasannta ka ankuran karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Prasadik bhav hi jivan me prasannta ka ankuran karta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Atmik prem hi sacchha prem hai, jisme Mai tuu nahi.
messages.fullText:
Atmik prem hi sacchha prem hai, jisme Mai tuu nahi.
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru sadvicharon ki potli hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru sadvicharon ki potli hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Atmik prem ki duniya ati ati Vishal,virat,bhavya hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmik prem ki duniya ati ati Vishal,virat,bhavya hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Apni raah per satat chalte rahe,manjil svayam mil jayegi.
messages.fullText:
Apni raah per satat chalte rahe,manjil svayam mil jayegi.
Hari om.

messages.text: Prarthnasheel jivan titikshamay hota jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Prarthnasheel jivan titikshamay hota jata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Munn ke abhav atm Gyan se duur honge,vastu padarthon se nahi.
messages.fullText:
Munn ke abhav atm Gyan se duur honge,vastu padarthon se nahi.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bhagvat anubhuti hi manushya deh ka sarvocchh purusharth hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvat anubhuti hi manushya deh ka sarvocchh purusharth hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Vichar beej hi hamari avidya per prahar karte hai.
messages.fullText:
Vichar beej hi hamari avidya per prahar karte hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Shubh karyon me salangnata hi iisht anugreh hai.
messages.fullText:
Shubh karyon me salangnata hi iisht anugreh hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Atm vismiriti se badh ker koi darun dukh nahi.
messages.fullText:
Atm vismiriti se badh ker koi darun dukh nahi.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan ki vah vahi akmatr iisht sang ak ho Jane me hai.
messages.fullText:
Jivan ki vah vahi akmatr iisht sang ak ho Jane me hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jahan bhi rahen bus guru  ke saath rahen,isime hamara Kalyan hai.
messages.fullText:
Jahan bhi rahen bus guru  ke saath rahen,isime hamara Kalyan hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bauni baton se anter pradushit hota hai,ateh savdhani barten.
messages.fullText:
Bauni baton se anter pradushit hota hai,ateh savdhani barten.
Hari om.

messages.text: Anter jagriti satat bani rahe.
messages.fullText:
Anter jagriti satat bani rahe.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan ki sarthakta akmatr satguru abhimukhta me hai.
messages.fullText:
Jivan ki sarthakta akmatr satguru abhimukhta me hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bhagvat vimukhta hi jivan ke kale din hote hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvat vimukhta hi jivan ke kale din hote hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Chirantan ka bodh hone per hi bhay duur hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Chirantan ka bodh hone per hi bhay duur hota hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Manush deh dharm kosh hai,jivan sarthakta ka muul aadhar hai.
messages.fullText:
Manush deh dharm kosh hai,jivan sarthakta ka muul aadhar hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Hur avastha ka mandir alag alag hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Hur avastha ka mandir alag alag hota hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Charaveti charaveti hi jivan ke liye muul sandesh hai.
messages.fullText:
Charaveti charaveti hi jivan ke liye muul sandesh hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Hamare sare abhyas bhotikeeya hone se hum me jadta late hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamare sare abhyas bhotikeeya hone se hum me jadta late hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Saanchha samarth svabodh hone per hi jagrit hota hai,jo andriya atit hai.
messages.fullText:
Saanchha samarth svabodh hone per hi jagrit hota hai,jo andriya atit hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Gurusatta ke siddhant, vicharna,v anubhuti ke saath akakrit ho Jana manush janm ki durlabhtam uplabdhi hai.
messages.fullText:
Gurusatta ke siddhant, vicharna,v anubhuti ke saath akakrit ho Jana manush janm ki durlabhtam uplabdhi hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan satat utroter shreshthta ki aur agrasarit hota rahe.
messages.fullText:
Jivan satat utroter shreshthta ki aur agrasarit hota rahe.
Hari om.

messages.text: Manush jivan hi vo Divya avsar hai,Jahan uss alokik tatv ko labdh hua ja sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Manush jivan hi vo Divya avsar hai,Jahan uss alokik tatv ko labdh hua ja sakta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Buddhi me sthayee samadhan ka baith Jana hi saanchhi budhimata hai.
messages.fullText:
Buddhi me sthayee samadhan ka baith Jana hi saanchhi budhimata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Hur cheej ka beej ak iishvar se itar kucchh bhi aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Hur cheej ka beej ak iishvar se itar kucchh bhi aur nahi.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jab manushya prem v vairagya ko sansar me laga deta hai,to ve raag aur dwesh bun jate hai.
messages.fullText:
Jab manushya prem v vairagya ko sansar me laga deta hai,to ve raag aur dwesh bun jate hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan me satat Satya sthapna ke liye prarthna chalti rehni chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Jivan me satat Satya sthapna ke liye prarthna chalti rehni chahiye.
Hari om.

messages.text: Svayam ke prabandhan ke abhav me hi krodh aata hai.
messages.fullText:
Svayam ke prabandhan ke abhav me hi krodh aata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Aadhyatm jeev ke hone pun ka vaachak hai.
messages.fullText:
Aadhyatm jeev ke hone pun ka vaachak hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Shishya ki patrata hone per guru Gyan ki ak cheeng kaam ker degi.
messages.fullText:
Shishya ki patrata hone per guru Gyan ki ak cheeng kaam ker degi.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sadhna me jaise jaise iishvar manyata sudridh hoti jati hai,vaise vaise sansarik manyata gondd hoti jati hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna me jaise jaise iishvar manyata sudridh hoti jati hai,vaise vaise sansarik manyata gondd hoti jati hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Iishvar me chahe shraddhapurvak lagen,chahe Vivek purvak,     dono hi tareh se param ki sammukhta prapt hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Iishvar me chahe shraddhapurvak lagen,chahe Vivek purvak,     dono hi tareh se param ki sammukhta prapt hoti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Apne chintan ke vishay me bahut bahut jagrook rehna chahiye ,malum nahi kaun sa pul antim ho Jaye.
messages.fullText:
Apne chintan ke vishay me bahut bahut jagrook rehna chahiye ,malum nahi kaun sa pul antim ho Jaye.
Hari om.

messages.text: Antkal ke chintan ke anusar hi pehle mansik sharir banta hai,aur phir bahey sharir.
messages.fullText:
Antkal ke chintan ke anusar hi pehle mansik sharir banta hai,aur phir bahey sharir.
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru ka sang hi akmatr sarvkalyanmayee hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ka sang hi akmatr sarvkalyanmayee hota hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Munn ki achalta akmatr tatv priyata hone per hi labdh hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Munn ki achalta akmatr tatv priyata hone per hi labdh hoti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru shishya ka atmik akakya hi uske liye disha nirdeshan bun jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru shishya ka atmik akakya hi uske liye disha nirdeshan bun jata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sant mahatma ,Bhagvat icchha se Karak purushon ke ruup me sarvkalyan hetu iss dharti per avtarit hote hai.
messages.fullText:
Sant mahatma ,Bhagvat icchha se Karak purushon ke ruup me sarvkalyan hetu iss dharti per avtarit hote hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Manush Jivan dhara ke marmik mulyon avam murmo ko atmsat Kar pane ki divyatam sthali hai,Satguru Charan sharan.
messages.fullText:
Manush Jivan dhara ke marmik mulyon avam murmo ko atmsat Kar pane ki divyatam sthali hai,Satguru Charan sharan.
Hari om.

messages.text: Yeh durlabhtam tun akmatr apne Kalyan ke liye Mila hai.
messages.fullText:
Yeh durlabhtam tun akmatr apne Kalyan ke liye Mila hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Vaicharik pavitrata manushya jeevan ki sarvocchh puunjee hai.
messages.fullText:
Vaicharik pavitrata manushya jeevan ki sarvocchh puunjee hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Munn ki saadh hue bina kabhi bhi anubhuti ho nahi sakti,bhram ho sakta hai,ateh hur pul hum chokus rahen.
messages.fullText:
Munn ki saadh hue bina kabhi bhi anubhuti ho nahi sakti,bhram ho sakta hai,ateh hur pul hum chokus rahen.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bhagvan jeev ko hur pul yog yukt rehne ki baat kehte hai,taki ant samay me yog bune rehne ki sambhavna buni rahe.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan jeev ko hur pul yog yukt rehne ki baat kehte hai,taki ant samay me yog bune rehne ki sambhavna buni rahe.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan ke karon ko samapt hone do,naye nirmit mut Karo.
messages.fullText:
Jivan ke karon ko samapt hone do,naye nirmit mut Karo.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bhagvan ki baat me vishvas na ker bus prakriti me hi rache base rehna ashubhta ko prapt hona hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan ki baat me vishvas na ker bus prakriti me hi rache base rehna ashubhta ko prapt hona hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Anter prakash akmatr satguru kripa svaruup hi sambhav hai.
messages.fullText:
Anter prakash akmatr satguru kripa svaruup hi sambhav hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan me dharm v Gyan hi rasta deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jivan me dharm v Gyan hi rasta deta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Gyan,vichar ka bull hamare bhitar alokikta ka   jagran karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Gyan,vichar ka bull hamare bhitar alokikta ka   jagran karta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Anantata ko hasil Kar lene ka naam hi manushyata hai.
messages.fullText:
Anantata ko hasil Kar lene ka naam hi manushyata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Iishvar hi akmatr jivan ka muul dhyey hone per jagtik drishyavali prabhavheen hoti jati hai.
messages.fullText:
Iishvar hi akmatr jivan ka muul dhyey hone per jagtik drishyavali prabhavheen hoti jati hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Antas anubhuti hi manush Jivan ka darshan banta jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Antas anubhuti hi manush Jivan ka darshan banta jata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Manush Jivan veh alokik yatra hai,jisme shradhha yukt hoker param tatv ko uplabdh hua ja sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Manush Jivan veh alokik yatra hai,jisme shradhha yukt hoker param tatv ko uplabdh hua ja sakta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bhagvat kripa se hi akmatr jivan me sant mahatma ruup me adarsh ka pradurbhav hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvat kripa se hi akmatr jivan me sant mahatma ruup me adarsh ka pradurbhav hota hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bhagvan naam ki mahima jivan ko spashtata ke prakash se alokit ker deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan naam ki mahima jivan ko spashtata ke prakash se alokit ker deti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Akant ki pavitrata me hi iishvareeya samarth ujagar hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Akant ki pavitrata me hi iishvareeya samarth ujagar hota hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Chiranjeevi prasannta akmatr prasadik bhav hai.
messages.fullText:
Chiranjeevi prasannta akmatr prasadik bhav hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Vichar jivan ki sarvocchh aushadh hai,Jo hume akmatr sant sannidhi  se hi milti hai.
messages.fullText:
Vichar jivan ki sarvocchh aushadh hai,Jo hume akmatr sant sannidhi  se hi milti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jivan ka asal sondarya akmatr sansar ki asangta ke satat abhyas hote chalne per hi udit ho pata hai.

messages.text: Jivan ki saanchii samriddhii akmatr parmarth me hi nihit hai.
messages.fullText:
Jivan ki saanchii samriddhii akmatr parmarth me hi nihit hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Prakriti ka hur Bindu iishvar ki aankh hai, ateh apne prati hum sub  vafadar rahen.

Hari om.

messages.text: Yeh manush tun triloki ka tilak hone ke liye mila hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari om.

messages.text: Bhagvan ko dhire dhire sub kucchh arpan karte chalne se Mai Mera shant hota jata hai,sub kucchh Shree Hari ho jate hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.fullText:

messages.text: Apna pura pura pata akmatr satguru kripa se hi mil pata hai.

Hari om.

messages.text: Bhagvat Katha hume sanskarit ker pashuon se vilag  karti hai.

messages.text: Atmik prem hi saanchha prem hai, jisme mai tuu nahi hai.

messages.text: Geeta jub bhi kholenge, sada sarvada svayam ka hi darshan payenge.

messages.text: Agyanta me hi dukh,dard,narashya hai,Gyan me nahi.

messages.text: Jivan ki kathinaiyan bhagvateeya Marg ka prashatikaran hai.

messages.text: Anantata ko uplabdh ho Jane ka naam hi manushyata hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari om.

messages.fullText:

Hari om.

messages.text: Kamnaon se upram hone ke liye apne bhojan ko jivan me prasadik banate Chalo.
messages.fullText:

messages.fullText:

messages.fullText:
Svabodh hi akmatr jeevan ka charmotkarsh purusharth hai.

messages.text: Akant ki pavitrata iish samarthya  ko udghatit Karne me samarth hai.
messages.fullText:
Akant ki pavitrata iish samarthya  ko udghatit Karne me samarth hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bhagvat abhimukhta ke liye bhav hi Pradhan hai kucchh aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvat abhimukhta ke liye bhav hi Pradhan hai kucchh aur nahi.
Hari om.

messages.text: Akmatr Bhagvan ki aur chal ker hi yeh manushya apne anant janmo ka ant Kar pane me samarth hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Bhagvan ne hriday ki baat keval Arjun ko hi isliye batlayee ,kyonki vahan dosh drishti ka abhav tha.
messages.fullText:

messages.fullText:

messages.text: Apne pun ka bhav hi Hume sehaj smriti me rakhta hai,bus jagruuk rehne ki baat ye hai ki vo Kahan ke liye hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne pun ka bhav hi Hume sehaj smriti me rakhta hai,bus jagruuk rehne ki baat ye hai ki vo Kahan ke liye hai.

messages.text: Dusron ke hit ki kamna tyag hai aur apni kamnaon ko dhvast Karne Ka mukhya sadhan hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Manushya ko akmatr prani hitarth bhav se hi karya Karne chahiye.
messages.fullText:

Hari om.

messages.text: Sadhuta jivan ko sundertam vyavastha deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhuta jivan ko sundertam vyavastha deti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Kisike Dil ko sadaiv jeeta ja sakta hai,per uske dimag ko nahi ,ateh Dil ko jeeten.
messages.fullText:

Hari om.

messages.text: Padarthon aur sambandhon ka succhh Jan lena hi vairagya hai.

messages.text: Iisht ke saath reh ker hi hum surakshit reh sakte hai.
messages.fullText:
Iisht ke saath reh ker hi hum surakshit reh sakte hai.

messages.text: Kamnaon se grasit rehne per hamari Shakti ka shayy hota jata hai, jabki nishkam hote chalne per hamari Shakti ka sanchay hota hai.

Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan me asli bhajan hai,hriday ka iishvar ki aur satat khinchav,vismaran asahneey ho Jaye.
messages.fullText:

messages.fullText:

Hari om.

messages.text: Shastr abhyas na hone ke Karan hi hamare bhitar trishnaon ka sangram rehta hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari om.

messages.fullText:

messages.fullText:

messages.text: Munn ki dasha aur disha per satat vichar karte chalen.
messages.fullText:
Munn ki dasha aur disha per satat vichar karte chalen.
Hari om.

messages.text: Munn ki dasha aur disha per satat vichar karte chalen.
messages.fullText:
Munn ki dasha aur disha per satat vichar karte chalen.
Hari om.

messages.text: Hamara bolna hamari parampara,siddhant ko udghatit karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamara bolna hamari parampara,siddhant ko udghatit karta hai.
Hari om.

Hari om.

messages.fullText:

messages.text: Bhog pravarti se hum me daitya svabhav paida hota hai.

messages.fullText:
Guru atm jagran ke devta hai.

messages.fullText:
Hum satat guru ki atm drishti ke ankush me reh saken,bus isi me hamara Kalyan hai.

messages.text: Jeevan ka hur lamha prem, souhard se bhara rahe.
messages.fullText:

Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan ka hur pul hume aur aur shikshit Karne ke liye hi aata hai.

Jeevan ka hur pul hume aur aur shikshit Karne ke liye hi aata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan me apne puurv ke anubhavon  se laabh lete rehna chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me apne puurv ke anubhavon  se laabh lete rehna chahiye.

messages.text: Apne aap me lotne per hi jeev apne Anand ko labdh ho pata hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari om.

messages.text: Apni sunder socch ke aadhar per jivan ke hur pul ko kitna samridhh banaya ja sakta hai.

Hari om.

Hari om.

messages.text: Shradhha ki dhara satat pravahman rahe.atm Gyan ki ye hi kunjii hai.

Hari om.

messages.text: Atmbodh ki uunchii udan bharte chalen,ye hi sarvmangalyakari hai.

messages.fullText:

messages.text: Shradhha,vishvas,aastha sammukh aaye hur karya ko upasna ruup ker deti hai.

messages.fullText:

messages.text: Jeevan ka saanchha soundarya atm nishchay me chipa hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka saanchha soundarya atm nishchay me chipa hai.

Manushya vichar,sanskar,samarthya ki vajeh se hi anya se bhinn hai.

messages.text: Vichar samridhhi se badh ker koi aur daulat nahi.
messages.fullText:

Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan ki hur sambhavna hamare vidheyak chintan per ashrit hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Atmik prem jeevan ko hur pul ullasit rakhta hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmik prem jeevan ko hur pul ullasit rakhta hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Vichar ki Shakti hume anant ki aur le jati hai.
messages.fullText:
Vichar ki Shakti hume anant ki aur le jati hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bhagvat prapti hi akmatr jivan ka muul dhyey hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari om.

messages.text: Hamara svaruup vishuddh chatanya hai,isiliye kisi vishist aakar me bandha nahi hai,sarvatr,sarvagya hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamara svaruup vishuddh chatanya hai,isiliye kisi vishist aakar me bandha nahi hai,sarvatr,sarvagya hai.

messages.text: Bin atmgyan ke jivan ke orr chor ko samjha nahi ja sakta.
messages.fullText:
Bin atmgyan ke jivan ke orr chor ko samjha nahi ja sakta.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan ko jeene ki sarvocchh vidha akmatr sadguru charno me baith ker hi milti hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ko jeene ki sarvocchh vidha akmatr sadguru charno me baith ker hi milti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Maipune ki sahi positioning se Merapun bhi sahi positioned ho jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Maipune ki sahi positioning se Merapun bhi sahi positioned ho jata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Apne succhh ka udhghatit hona hi jivan ka akatay vidhan hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne succhh ka udhghatit hona hi jivan ka akatay vidhan hai.

messages.fullText:

messages.text: Jeevan me vichar,chintan ka pramad hi hamari mrityu hai.

Jeevan me vichar,chintan ka pramad hi hamari mrityu hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru kripa Sindhu Nur ruup Hari hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa Sindhu Nur ruup Hari hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Prakriti ke kun kun me sarvatr parmarth ka hi udghosh hai.
messages.fullText:
Prakriti ke kun kun me sarvatr parmarth ka hi udghosh hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan me matraon ka abhav hi iska asantulan bun jata hai.

messages.text: Vichar sampada hi Divya jeevan ki janani hai.
messages.fullText:
Vichar sampada hi Divya jeevan ki janani hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru Gyan kriyatmak hone per hi ananddata hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru Gyan kriyatmak hone per hi ananddata hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Vichar jeevan ka sarvocchh upchaar hai.

Vichar jeevan ka sarvocchh upchaar hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Bin shradhha ke Gyan kabhi bhi prakashit nahi ho pata.
messages.fullText:
Bin shradhha ke Gyan kabhi bhi prakashit nahi ho pata.

messages.text: Manushya tan hi akmatr iski Divya sarthakta ka tantr hài.

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atm bodh ki dridhta hi akmatr jivan sarthaktà ke Marg ko prashàst karne me hetu hai.

messages.text:
Jivan ke pratyek pul ki
 anmolta ka bodh satat buna rahe.
messages.fullText:
Jivan ke pratyek pul ki
 anmolta ka bodh satat buna rahe.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru gyan Hume samay ki chaal ke saath rehna sikhata hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru gyan Hume samay ki chaal ke saath rehna sikhata hai.

messages.text: Sadhak ki sadhakta hai,bus charaveti charaveti.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sukh dukh ka samucchhay hi to jivan ki jivantata hài,isse ghabrana kyon.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jivan ruup sadak ke utar chadhav hi to jivan me jagruukta làte hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Guru ka jeevàn me agman hi to iska pavas khilav hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Antes shuchita hi akmatr hume guru dwar tuk pahunchane me hetu hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Iishvar nirmit pratyek cheej ko hum iss durlabh manushya iikai me dekhne ,mehsoos karne ka prayatn Karen.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Jivan ki hur bhor Hume ak Naveen ruup me shikshit karti hài.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Jivan ka pratyek anubhav Hume shreshthta ki aur ruukh karvata chale.
messages.fullText:
Jivan ka pratyek anubhav Hume shreshthta ki aur ruukh karvata chale.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan jivan ke veg ko pul pul sarthak disha dene me hetu hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Vartman hi akmatr jivan ka saanchha geet hai.
messages.fullText:
Vartman hi akmatr jivan ka saanchha geet hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jivan ke pratyek daur ke pràti shukrgujari rahe,shikayat nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jivan ke pratyek daur ke pràti shukrgujari rahe,shikayat nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Aadhyatmik Gyan ka bul alokik hài,
messages.fullText:
Aadhyatmik Gyan ka bul alokik hài,
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka muulyankan aadhyatmikta ke aadhar per hona chahiye ,na ki sansàrikta per.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Guru sannidhya abhay pradata hài.
messages.fullText:
Guru sannidhya abhay pradata hài.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adarsh ka jivan me pradurbhav hi iski sarthakta ke Sutron ko atmsat karvane me hur pul hetu hai.
messages.fullText:
Adarsh ka jivan me pradurbhav hi iski sarthakta ke Sutron ko atmsat karvane me hur pul hetu hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka athak purusharth hi akmatr hum sabke jivan ko sugam v sehaj bana detà hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ka athak purusharth hi akmatr hum sabke jivan ko sugam v sehaj bana detà hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Aadhyatmik jagran ke baad hi hum sahi insaan bunne ki aur agrasarit hote hai.
messages.fullText:
Aadhyatmik jagran ke baad hi hum sahi insaan bunne ki aur agrasarit hote hai.

messages.text: Aadhyatmik jagran ke baad hi hum sahi insaan bunne ki aur agrasarit hote hai.
messages.fullText:
Aadhyatmik jagran ke baad hi hum sahi insaan bunne ki aur agrasarit hote hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sarakte hue jivan me agar iski sarthakta ka kucchh karya nahi hua,to humne kucchh bhi nahi Kiya.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka samarth hi akmatr hume iish paràyanta me latà hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Apne abhyas ka satatya hi guru ki saanchi Seva hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne abhyas ka satatya hi guru ki saanchi Seva hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan me aadhyatmik deep sadaiv prajvalit rahe.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me aadhyatmik deep sadaiv prajvalit rahe.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Bhog ke yatarth ko jañ lene ke baad hi yog sadhta hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhog ke yatarth ko jañ lene ke baad hi yog sadhta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki dhall hamari socchh ke anuruup hoti jati hai,
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki dhall hamari socchh ke anuruup hoti jati hai,
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Shraddha ruup tatv se hi shravan samarthya ujagar ho pata hai .
Pujya Swami ji ki Katha ka puura puura labh len.
messages.fullText:

Pujya Swami ji ki Katha ka puura puura labh len.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atm anibhigyata hi jivan ki sabse badi trasàdi hai.
messages.fullText:
Atm anibhigyata hi jivan ki sabse badi trasàdi hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Veetrag mahapurushon ke darshan se chit apar anandit hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Veetrag mahapurushon ke darshan se chit apar anandit hota hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jivan soundarya ka prasfutan akmatr sant charan ashrey me hi sambhav hai.
messages.fullText:
Jivan soundarya ka prasfutan akmatr sant charan ashrey me hi sambhav hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jivan ka pratyek pul prasadik bana dene me akmatr guru kripa hi sahayak hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Jivan ka pratyek pul prasadik bana dene me akmatr guru kripa hi sahayak hoti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jivan ke prakash ka muul mantr hai,satsang.
messages.fullText:
Jivan ke prakash ka muul mantr hai,satsang.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jivan ke prakash ka muul mantr hai,satsang.
messages.fullText:
Jivan ke prakash ka muul mantr hai,satsang.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru sehajta,saralta,sugamta ki pratimurti hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru sehajta,saralta,sugamta ki pratimurti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru Charan aadhar hi akmatr jivan ka sarvocchh alamban hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru Charan aadhar hi akmatr jivan ka sarvocchh alamban hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru Charan aadhar hi akmatr jivan ka sarvocchh alamban hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka divya,pavas,madhurtam aalok hi  akmatr hamare sumarg darshan me hetu hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Guru charno ka ashrey Hume prakartisth karta jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru charno ka ashrey Hume prakartisth karta jata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atm bodh hi jivan ki sarvocchh samridhii hai.
messages.fullText:
Atm bodh hi jivan ki sarvocchh samridhii hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka saanchha anand akmatr aur akmatr guru shree Charan ashrey me hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka saanchha anand akmatr aur akmatr guru shree Charan ashrey me hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hamare jeevan ke sarvmayee suraksha kavacchh hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hamare jeevan ke sarvmayee suraksha kavacchh hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hamare jeevan ke sarvmayee suraksha kavacchh hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hamare jeevan ke sarvmayee suraksha kavacchh hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Iisht smriti ki chaitanyata hi jeevan ki jeevantata hai.
messages.fullText:
Iisht smriti ki chaitanyata hi jeevan ki jeevantata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jivan ki vividhtà me bus akmatr us ak hi ak param Satya ke darshan Kar pana iisht kripa prasadi se itar kucchh bhi aur nàhi.
messages.fullText:

messages.fullText:

messages.text: Guru kripa ka koi parovar nahi,mun budhii uske mapak nahi.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa ka koi parovar nahi,mun budhii uske mapak nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru Gyan se badh ker sabal puunji aur kucchh bhi nahi.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Vicharon ki daridrata hume deen heen buna deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Vicharon ki daridrata hume deen heen buna deti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa ka sahi sahi aanklan guru kripa ke bagair sambhav hi nahi.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa ka sahi sahi aanklan guru kripa ke bagair sambhav hi nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka saancha darshan guru kripa ke nigreh me milta hai.
Hari sharnam.

Hari sharnam.

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Shubh karm salangnata ki akmatr kunjee hai satsang ki nirantarta.
messages.fullText:
Shubh karm salangnata ki akmatr kunjee hai satsang ki nirantarta.

messages.text: Guru kripa se satsang achrit hone per jivan ki hariyali hotà jàta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa se satsang achrit hone per jivan ki hariyali hotà jàta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sadpravartiyan hi jeevan ka suraksha kavach hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadpravartiyan hi jeevan ka suraksha kavach hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki hur sanvedna hamari path pradarshak hoti hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Jeevan ke hur daur ke pràti sweekaryata akmatr guru kripa se hi sambhav hai.

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa anubhuti ka satat bane reh pana akmatr guru ki hi àhatukeey karunamayee kripa se sambhàv hai.

messages.text: Deh adhyas ki nuunta hi akmatr atmik bhav ka vistar Karne me hetu hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Ant se juda jeevan hur pul bhaybheet avam anant se Jud ker jeevan abhayee hota jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Ant se juda jeevan hur pul bhaybheet avam anant se Jud ker jeevan abhayee hota jata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmvatata hi anant me sama Jane ki prakriyà hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmvatata hi anant me sama Jane ki prakriyà hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atm nishchay hi jeevan ki sarvmayee sabalta hai.
messages.fullText:
Atm nishchay hi jeevan ki sarvmayee sabalta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa mun, budhii ki gati per ankush banaye rakhti hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa mun, budhii ki gati per ankush banaye rakhti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Shravan ka abhav jeevan ko asañtulit rakhta hai.
messages.fullText:
Shravan ka abhav jeevan ko asañtulit rakhta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke Charam lakshya ko labdh hone ke liye Hume hur pul guru ke Marg darshan ki aavashyakta hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke Charam lakshya ko labdh hone ke liye Hume hur pul guru ke Marg darshan ki aavashyakta hoti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jivan sarthakta hi iss samay ki param maang hai.
messages.fullText:
Jivan sarthakta hi iss samay ki param maang hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Mun vo cheej hai,jise jiska rus dete jaoge, udhar hi ramta jayega.ateh satat choukas rahen.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Vidya jeevan ka utkarsh aur avidya mrityu hai,

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki sehaj gatimanta akmatr aur akmatr guru ashrey me hai,

messages.text: Sadhak jeevan sadaiv shubh sankalpit rehna chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Sadhak jeevan sadaiv shubh sankalpit rehna chahiye.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sidhhantik shithilta bhatkav ka Karan bunti hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke raste guru ashrey me akmatr rehne per svateh hi sidhe hote jate hai.

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Aadhyatmik gati me santulan kà satatya satat buna rahe.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru sannidhi ka satatya hi akmatr jeevan ko udhrvgami banane me hetu hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru sannidhi ka satatya hi akmatr jeevan ko udhrvgami banane me hetu hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Mai deh nahi,Atma hun,ye hee akmatr jeevan ka akatay Satya hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki kadak sacchhai ko amritmay banane me akmatr sacchhe guru ka aadhar hi pul pul sahayak hota hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka anupam Gyan shradhha purvak shravan ker hi akmatr jeevan ki vastvik saacchhai ko labdh hua ja sakta hai.

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sadguru shree charno ke apurv,apar,anupam samarthya ko nit nit,pul pul pranam.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Nav varsh ki pavas Vela per hum atmnishchay ki sudridhta ke liye sankalpit hon.
messages.fullText:
Nav varsh ki pavas Vela per hum atmnishchay ki sudridhta ke liye sankalpit hon.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan jindadili ka naam hai,Jo akmatr satat iisht se Jude rehne per hi anubhut hoti hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru sannidhi hi akmatr hume nirbhaarta ka ahsas karati hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru sannidhi hi akmatr hume nirbhaarta ka ahsas karati hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki humsafarta pug pug per hamare jeevan ko alokit karti hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atm nishchay hi akmatr jeevan ki pavasta ko banaye rakhne me hur pul hetu hai.

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charno ka samipya hi akmatr jeevan ki mohneeyta hai.

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru sannidhi,satsang,atm nishchay, apni hi iishvar pradat parichay ke paryay hai.

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan rehasyon ki potli jaroor hai,per guru kripa inhi ko hamare shubh sankalpon me rupantarit ker deti hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sansarik mati vikalpon ka bhandar hoti hai,jabki guru pradat mati bus ak param ke liye sankalpit hoti jati hai .
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki hur baat pranamya hai,bus hum apne jeevan me aachrit ker saken.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Iish Charan ashrey me reh ker hone vali hur baat me iish russ ka madhurya cchha jata hai.

Hari sharnam.

messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hari ki rah hi akmatr haritima se aachaadit hai.
messages.fullText:
Hari ki rah hi akmatr haritima se aachaadit hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka dhyan hume apne mool se jod deta hai,isilye to ve dhyan moolam hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Prakriti ki hur cheej lotani hoti hai,isliye pratyek mili huyee cheej ka sadupyog hota chale.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Abhivyakti ke pushpon me suvass hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Abhivyakti ke pushpon me suvass hoti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki shreshthtam  ñidhii hai,sarvocchh adarsh ka sarankshan.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki shreshthtam  ñidhii hai,sarvocchh adarsh ka sarankshan.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang ko satat jeete chalna bin guru kripa ke sambhav hi nahi.

messages.text: Saralta,sehajta avam svabhavikta jeevan ke sundertam aabhushan hai.

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hum svayam ke dharm me rahen,sharir ko apni dharm purti Karne den.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Abhyas ke satatya se hi abhyas siddhh hota hai.

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ke vishudhh prem me athah athah,apar apar shakti,samarthya avam prakash avasthit hota hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki hur baat pranamya hai,kyonki veh anant se aa rahi hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Gaanv ki pagdandiyan Dev sthaliyon ko inkit ker purusharth mahima ke geet gati hai.
messages.fullText:
Gaanv ki pagdandiyan Dev sthaliyon ko inkit ker purusharth mahima ke geet gati hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Gaanv ki pagdandiyan Dev sthaliyon ko inkit ker purusharth mahima ke geet gati hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Saralta,sehajta avam svabhavikta jeevan ka sarvotam ,sundertam libas hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Iishvar se Jude reh ker hi hum sanath hote hai,sansar se Jude reh ker hum svayam ko anath buna dete hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ke vishudhh prem me hamara antas pighal pighal ker halka hota jata hai,àshudhiyon ki nikasi hone lagti hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki Karuna,vatsalyata,madhuramta aakashvat hai
messages.fullText:
Guru ki Karuna,vatsalyata,madhuramta aakashvat hai
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang veh Nirmal darpan hai,Jahan baithker hum guru kripa ke bul per apna saanchha mulyankan ker pane ka samarthya pate hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamari bhavna ki aseemta eevan me choti choti baton ko bhi vyapak ruup pradan ker deti hai .
messages.fullText:
Hamari bhavna ki aseemta eevan me choti choti baton ko bhi vyapak ruup pradan ker deti hai .
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satya aaradhan Satya ko hi labdh kera deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya aaradhan Satya ko hi labdh kera deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki antas hariyali ki kayamta ke liye satsang ki nirantarta param avashyak hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang veh amulya nidhi hai,Jo iss lok avam parlok dono hi jagah hamari sambhal karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang veh amulya nidhi hai,Jo iss lok avam parlok dono hi jagah hamari sambhal karti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki shanbhangurta ka pul pul samman hona chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki shanbhangurta ka pul pul samman hona chahiye.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki apar apar karunamayee kripa hi akmatr jeevan  pagdandiyon ke tede mede pun ko sugam banane me hur pul sahayak hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ki apar apar karunamayee kripa hi akmatr jeevan  pagdandiyon ke tede mede pun ko sugam banane me hur pul sahayak hoti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru sakshat karunaparipurn vatsalya moorat hai .
messages.fullText:
Guru sakshat karunaparipurn vatsalya moorat hai .
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke yatharth ko hatheli per rakh dene ka divya samarth akmatr guru kripa me samahit hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke yatharth ko hatheli per rakh dene ka divya samarth akmatr guru kripa me samahit hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hum apne svaruup me sthir rehker sarvatr anand ko spandit karte chalen.
messages.fullText:
Hum apne svaruup me sthir rehker sarvatr anand ko spandit karte chalen.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ke sang se badh ker pavasta kahin aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Guru ke sang se badh ker pavasta kahin aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke gopneey tatv ko sakar ruup pradan Karne ka samarthya akmatr guru charno ki rujj me samahit hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke gopneey tatv ko sakar ruup pradan Karne ka samarthya akmatr guru charno ki rujj me samahit hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvan ke kripa prapat ko shant chit se mehsoos karte chale.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan ke kripa prapat ko shant chit se mehsoos karte chale.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki apurv sanatanta ka bhed akmatr guru charno ke ashrey me unki apar apar kripa svaruup hi anavrit hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki apurv sanatanta ka bhed akmatr guru charno ke ashrey me unki apar apar kripa svaruup hi anavrit hota hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan me dharm ka bul alokik hota hai,aur page page sehkarita nibhata hai,
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me dharm ka bul alokik hota hai,aur page page sehkarita nibhata hai,
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Svayam ko Jane bagair hum sahi track kabhi bhi pakad hi nahi pate.
messages.fullText:
Svayam ko Jane bagair hum sahi track kabhi bhi pakad hi nahi pate.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hur pul hame nirbandhan banane ke liye purusharthrut hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hur pul hame nirbandhan banane ke liye purusharthrut hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Yeh Manush tun akmatr dharm arjan ker siddhh hone ke liye hi mila hai.
messages.fullText:
Yeh Manush tun akmatr dharm arjan ker siddhh hone ke liye hi mila hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke saanche murm ko akmatr guru ashrey me satat rehker hi sahi sahi ruup me samjha ja sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke saanche murm ko akmatr guru ashrey me satat rehker hi sahi sahi ruup me samjha ja sakta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Shradhha jivan ki sarvocchh punji hai.
messages.fullText:
Shradhha jivan ki sarvocchh punji hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ke abhav me kabhi bhi sancchha Marg mil hi nahi pata.
messages.fullText:
Guru ke abhav me kabhi bhi sancchha Marg mil hi nahi pata.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka mool lakshya svayam ko pehchanna hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka mool lakshya svayam ko pehchanna hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Lakshya viheenta jeevan ki sarvocchh shati hai.
messages.fullText:
Lakshya viheenta jeevan ki sarvocchh shati hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Bhajan ka sanchha arth hai ,satat apne jhuthe aham ko dhvast karte chalna.
messages.fullText:
Bhajan ka sanchha arth hai ,satat apne jhuthe aham ko dhvast karte chalna.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Akarta bhav ki dridhta jeevan me sehajta ka sanchhar karti jati hai.
messages.fullText:
Akarta bhav ki dridhta jeevan me sehajta ka sanchhar karti jati hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sansarik anukultaon ke peeche bhagte rehne ki chahat ka naam hai,niri agyanta.
messages.fullText:
Sansarik anukultaon ke peeche bhagte rehne ki chahat ka naam hai,niri agyanta.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atm darshan ka pehla sopan hai,atm anushasan.
messages.fullText:
Atm darshan ka pehla sopan hai,atm anushasan.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Mun ki nirvishayta hi dhyan,dharna v dharm hai.
messages.fullText:
Mun ki nirvishayta hi dhyan,dharna v dharm hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan jitna jitna shradhamayee hoga, utna utna hi sehaj hota jayega.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan jitna jitna shradhamayee hoga, utna utna hi sehaj hota jayega.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare apne hi svaruup ka rang chir utsavmayee hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamare apne hi svaruup ka rang chir utsavmayee hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru vichar,utsah aur aashavadita ke punchh hai,
messages.fullText:
Guru vichar,utsah aur aashavadita ke punchh hai,
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan me matraon ka sanyàman yog ki aur agrasarit karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me matraon ka sanyàman yog ki aur agrasarit karta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Vidya ki tarunai abhyas ke satatya se bani rehti hai.
messages.fullText:
Vidya ki tarunai abhyas ke satatya se bani rehti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sansarik asakti chintan ki durbalta ko janm deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Sansarik asakti chintan ki durbalta ko janm deti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamara hi mithya aham Hume apne aap se koson door ker deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamara hi mithya aham Hume apne aap se koson door ker deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm aachran ki cheej hai,koi andolan nahi.
messages.fullText:
Dharm aachran ki cheej hai,koi andolan nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmanusandhan me lage vigya purushon ka sang ati durlabh hai .
messages.fullText:
Atmanusandhan me lage vigya purushon ka sang ati durlabh hai .
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru apñe moun vyàkhyan se hi shishya ki shankaon ka bhanjan ker dete hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Aadhyatmik vicharon ke abhav me vyakti ke bheeter khinnta paida hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Aadhyatmik vicharon ke abhav me vyakti ke bheeter khinnta paida hoti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Apni sadhna ke veg ko hum sub satat banaye rakhen.
messages.fullText:
Apni sadhna ke veg ko hum sub satat banaye rakhen.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Apne abhyas ke sammukh aayee her cheej ko satat aage badhte rehne ki prerna banaden.
messages.fullText:
Apne abhyas ke sammukh aayee her cheej ko satat aage badhte rehne ki prerna banaden.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Samay ki mang ye hi hai, ki hum niranter sarvmangalyata ke liye jivan me prarthnaon ka nivesh Karen.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya tun akmatr atm bodh ki sadhna ke liye Mila hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya tun akmatr atm bodh ki sadhna ke liye Mila hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Iishvar hume akatmata ke samarthya ka darshan karva rahe hai.
messages.fullText:
Iishvar hume akatmata ke samarthya ka darshan karva rahe hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Iishvar apni leelaon ke nanatv me Hume barabar atm jagran ke sandesh dete hai.
messages.fullText:
Iishvar apni leelaon ke nanatv me Hume barabar atm jagran ke sandesh dete hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Yeh samay akmatr atmutthan ka yagya bun jaye.
messages.fullText:
Yeh samay akmatr atmutthan ka yagya bun jaye.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru,sant mahatmano ke shree vachan sparsh Hume kitna urjanvit,anandit ker dete hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru,sant mahatmano ke shree vachan sparsh Hume kitna urjanvit,anandit ker dete hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare guru ji ke sandesh ki mool atma hai,akant ki shuchita avam mounta.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Satsang ka pehla sopan hai,svaanushasan.
messages.fullText:
Satsang ka pehla sopan hai,svaanushasan.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Samay ke anusar atm sanyaman ke saath rehna apni aur apne aas pàas ki aaj sabse badi seva hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare aahar,vihar ki shuçhita hi hamare jeevan ki majbuuti hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamare aahar,vihar ki shuçhita hi hamare jeevan ki majbuuti hai.

messages.text: Guru veh behti pavas bayar hai,jiske sparsh se hum sub sheetalta anubhut karte hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: In pulon me  jivan ki sanjeevani hai akant sevan.
messages.fullText:
In pulon me  jivan ki sanjeevani hai akant sevan.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm Yani apna svaruup bodh sanchee rah per satat chalte Rene ki prerna deta hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Prabhav aham yukt hota hai, jabki svabhav atmeey.
messages.fullText:
Prabhav aham yukt hota hai, jabki svabhav atmeey.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ke marmik murmo me gehan rehasya chipa hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ke marmik murmo me gehan rehasya chipa hota hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Akant Sevan atmik urja ke vistar me hetu hai.
messages.fullText:
Akant Sevan atmik urja ke vistar me hetu hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Akant ka pavitrya Hume anant se jodta hai.
messages.fullText:
Akant ka pavitrya Hume anant se jodta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru vichar ,vivek prakash ke pratyaksh vigreh hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru vichar ,vivek prakash ke pratyaksh vigreh hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Apne chote se gaanv aangan ko prateh buhàr ker jeevan ke hur pehlu ko sadhna banalen.
Hari  sharnam.
messages.fullText:
Apne chote se gaanv aangan ko prateh buhàr ker jeevan ke hur pehlu ko sadhna banalen.
Hari  sharnam.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm me hi veh samarthya hai,Jo hume pul pul ke sukh v dukh ke vichlan se uuper utha deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Dharm me hi veh samarthya hai,Jo hume pul pul ke sukh v dukh ke vichlan se uuper utha deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hamari madhur aashaon ke jvalant deep hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hamari madhur aashaon ke jvalant deep hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Iss samay ke hur pul ko hum apni aadhyatmik sadhna me ruupantarit karte chalen.
messages.fullText:
Iss samay ke hur pul ko hum apni aadhyatmik sadhna me ruupantarit karte chalen.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm aachran hai,Jisme sabalta ka satatya hai.
messages.fullText:
Dharm aachran hai,Jisme sabalta ka satatya hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki sannidhi ka satat ahsas jeevan ko sugam banata chalta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ki sannidhi ka satat ahsas jeevan ko sugam banata chalta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Yeh samay jeevan ki yarharthta ko pehchanne ke liye hai.
messages.fullText:
Yeh samay jeevan ki yarharthta ko pehchanne ke liye hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki dastak jeevan dwar per bade hi soubhagyà se sunai padti hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jagrit vyakti ke saath hamare sanvad ho Pana jeevan ke atyant bhagyashali Shan hote hai.
messages.fullText:
Jagrit vyakti ke saath hamare sanvad ho Pana jeevan ke atyant bhagyashali Shan hote hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamari sanskriti badi hi liberal hai,bus kisi bhi tareh Hume iisht smriti bani rahe.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Iisht ka vishvas abhayta lata hai.
messages.fullText:
Iisht ka vishvas abhayta lata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka nichod hai,anant ke saath akatmata.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka nichod hai,anant ke saath akatmata.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik Shakti ka koi parovar nahi.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik Shakti ka koi parovar nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya jeevan ka murm akmatr adhyatm me hi samaya hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya jeevan ka murm akmatr adhyatm me hi samaya hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Kaise hai aap,charya sadhnatmak hai na.
messages.fullText:
Kaise hai aap,charya sadhnatmak hai na.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Apne mun ko shubhta se bharte chalen.
messages.fullText:
Apne mun ko shubhta se bharte chalen.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke hur apvad me madhur sanvad ki gunjaish to rehti hi hai,vartman sthiti ka ye hi udhghosh hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sanyas dharm hamari sanskriti ki mool aadharshila hai.
messages.fullText:
Sanyas dharm hamari sanskriti ki mool aadharshila hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Svayam ki aur lotne ke liye yeh Kal ati sammanneey hai.
messages.fullText:
Svayam ki aur lotne ke liye yeh Kal ati sammanneey hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sant iss Matti ki divyatam dharohar hote hai.ateh unka samman hona chahiye,nirmam hatyayen nahi.
messages.fullText:
Sant iss Matti ki divyatam dharohar hote hai.ateh unka samman hona chahiye,nirmam hatyayen nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Shubh vicharon ke udyan ko niranter sinchit karte chalen.
messages.fullText:
Shubh vicharon ke udyan ko niranter sinchit karte chalen.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atm nischay hi akmatr sabhi tareh ke vichlano se hame surakshit rakhta hai.
messages.fullText:
Atm nischay hi akmatr sabhi tareh ke vichlano se hame surakshit rakhta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Yeh samay sabhi ke prati udarchtta ka hai,ateh kuchh na kuchh yathayogya in haathon se daan hota rahe.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki karunamayta ka koi orr chor nahi hota.
messages.fullText:
Guru ki karunamayta ka koi orr chor nahi hota.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sadguru hamare jeevan ke param prakashmay sarthee hote hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadguru hamare jeevan ke param prakashmay sarthee hote hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka Gyan hamare jeevan ko ak Divya vyavastha deta hai,hum uska anusheelan ker saken.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Narayan(iisht) smriti hi sarvkalyanmayee hai.
messages.fullText:
Narayan(iisht) smriti hi sarvkalyanmayee hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ki hur paheli ko samadhit karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ki hur paheli ko samadhit karta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Manush jeevan ka param lakshya svayam ko Janna hai.
messages.fullText:
Manush jeevan ka param lakshya svayam ko Janna hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru padchinhon ka anusheelan hi hamara suraksha kavach hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Adhyatmik dhara jeevan ko tejas tatv labdh karati hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Kathni avam Karni ke anter ko Kum karte chalen.
messages.fullText:
Kathni avam Karni ke anter ko Kum karte chalen.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hum aachran ke upasak hai.
messages.fullText:
Hum aachran ke upasak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka hur daur hume vapis apne santulan me loutne ke liye prerna deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka hur daur hume vapis apne santulan me loutne ke liye prerna deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Aastha v vishvas satguru  kripa ki anmol Divya mahaprasadi hai.
messages.fullText:
Aastha v vishvas satguru  kripa ki anmol Divya mahaprasadi hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sansarikta ki ati jeevan me saral sugam rah ko asvikrit ker deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Sansarikta ki ati jeevan me saral sugam rah ko asvikrit ker deti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Iisht bul hi sarvocchh hai,sadaiv usika aadhar liye rahen.
messages.fullText:
