Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Vishuddh prem ka aadhar hi akmatr hume satat gatiman rehne ki prerna deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Vishuddh prem ka aadhar hi akmatr hume satat gatiman rehne ki prerna deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke prati sehaj sveekriti use aasan banati chalti hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke prati sehaj sveekriti use aasan banati chalti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm ka gehan arth hai,Atm Anushasan,
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm ka gehan arth hai,Atm Anushasan,
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Abhyas,Vivek,varairagya sampannta manushya jeevan ki vibhutiyan hai.
messages.fullText:
Abhyas,Vivek,varairagya sampannta manushya jeevan ki vibhutiyan hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru divyata,pavasta v madhurta ki pratimuurti hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru divyata,pavasta v madhurta ki pratimuurti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka Gyan hi akmatr hume apne alokik ruup se parichit karata hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ka Gyan hi akmatr hume apne alokik ruup se parichit karata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan bus akmatr satat gatiman rehne ke liye hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan bus akmatr satat gatiman rehne ke liye hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka hur daur aage ke liye hume aur shikshit Karne ke liye aata hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka hur daur aage ke liye hume aur shikshit Karne ke liye aata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki utsavdharmita akmatr aur akmatr guru Charan ashrey me nihit hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki utsavdharmita akmatr aur akmatr guru Charan ashrey me nihit hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Anandit rehna hi  jeevan ka dharm hai.
messages.fullText:
Anandit rehna hi  jeevan ka dharm hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jagran to akmatr adhyatmik hi hota hai,baaki to nidra hai.
messages.fullText:
Jagran to akmatr adhyatmik hi hota hai,baaki to nidra hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sharnagati ka paath hi jivan ki sarthakta ke liye sarvotam hai.
messages.fullText:
Sharnagati ka paath hi jivan ki sarthakta ke liye sarvotam hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke hur vakt ko adhyatmik unnati ki sadhan samagri banate chalen.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke hur vakt ko adhyatmik unnati ki sadhan samagri banate chalen.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevani Shakti akmatr adhyatm me hi samahit hai,
messages.fullText:
Jeevani Shakti akmatr adhyatm me hi samahit hai,
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru sannidhi hi akmatr jeevan ko anand aabhas deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru sannidhi hi akmatr jeevan ko anand aabhas deti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka yatharth akmatr guru charno me sthan pane per hi labdh hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka yatharth akmatr guru charno me sthan pane per hi labdh hota hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Shubh karm hi akmatr hume iish anugreh ke sarankshan me rakhte hai.
messages.fullText:
Shubh karm hi akmatr hume iish anugreh ke sarankshan me rakhte hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Mahatmano ki Vanni ke yatharth murm ko unki kripa ke bul per hi samjha ja sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Mahatmano ki Vanni ke yatharth murm ko unki kripa ke bul per hi samjha ja sakta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki sehajta hi uski madhurta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki sehajta hi uski madhurta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Shuddhh iradon se Kiya gaya koi bhi shubh Karya avashya sarthak hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Shuddhh iradon se Kiya gaya koi bhi shubh Karya avashya sarthak hota hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki gatimanta hi iska soundarya hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki gatimanta hi iska soundarya hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atm sudhar ki chinta svateh hi jeevan me chintan ka ruup ho jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Atm sudhar ki chinta svateh hi jeevan me chintan ka ruup ho jata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Apne darshan avam shravan ko niranter vishudhh banaye rakhne se atul samarthya ki prapti hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne darshan avam shravan ko niranter vishudhh banaye rakhne se atul samarthya ki prapti hoti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya ka sadacharan hi akarshan ka Kendra hota hai,kyonki usi me to Hari baste hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya ka sadacharan hi akarshan ka Kendra hota hai,kyonki usi me to Hari baste hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm jeevan ko dhairya avam titiksha pradan karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm jeevan ko dhairya avam titiksha pradan karta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sant sannidhi ka prabhav bada hi madhur,sheetal,adrata se paripurn hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Sant sannidhi ka prabhav bada hi madhur,sheetal,adrata se paripurn hota hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka santulan akmatr svayam ke jeevan ki sarthakta ki aur rookh hone per hi  kripa svaroop aa pata hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka santulan akmatr svayam ke jeevan ki sarthakta ki aur rookh hone per hi  kripa svaroop aa pata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna ki maang hoti hai, dirghkalikta aur niranterta.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna ki maang hoti hai, dirghkalikta aur niranterta.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru vachno ke udhghosh se sampurn charachar mehak rahi hai,
messages.fullText:
Guru vachno ke udhghosh se sampurn charachar mehak rahi hai,
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik Gyan hi akmatr vyavahar vartan ke dharatal per sehajatmak roop se sanchii samajh ban jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik Gyan hi akmatr vyavahar vartan ke dharatal per sehajatmak roop se sanchii samajh ban jata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik jeevan sakaratmakta ka upasak ho jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik jeevan sakaratmakta ka upasak ho jata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya jeevan vibhuti sampanna hai,Vivek vichar ki sampada ke Karan.
messages.fullText:
Manushya jeevan vibhuti sampanna hai,Vivek vichar ki sampada ke Karan.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Shaleenta,somyata,sehajta jeevan ke divya aabhushan hai.
messages.fullText:
Shaleenta,somyata,sehajta jeevan ke divya aabhushan hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik prayas jeevan   ko urjanvit banaye rakhne me hur pul sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik prayas jeevan   ko urjanvit banaye rakhne me hur pul sahayak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki sanjeevani hai,akmatr aur akmatr adhyatm.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki sanjeevani hai,akmatr aur akmatr adhyatm.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Naam simran jeevan ko satat sehaj banaye chalta hai.
messages.fullText:
Naam simran jeevan ko satat sehaj banaye chalta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sadachar,shubh vichar avam Krit hi jeevan me utsav nirmati karte hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadachar,shubh vichar avam Krit hi jeevan me utsav nirmati karte hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sacchhe guru ka agman jeevan ko satyaprakash se alokit ker deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Sacchhe guru ka agman jeevan ko satyaprakash se alokit ker deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ke vahan me baith jane per jeevan ka safar suhavna ho jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ke vahan me baith jane per jeevan ka safar suhavna ho jata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna pradarshan ka vishay nahi,akmatr svayam ki sadh hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna pradarshan ka vishay nahi,akmatr svayam ki sadh hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka satat gatiman rehna hi iski mehak hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka satat gatiman rehna hi iski mehak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Kaise ho,beta.
messages.fullText:
Kaise ho,beta.
Hari om.

messages.text:
Jeevan ki in svabhavik prakiryayen me ghabrana nahi,bus Vivek ke saath sarthak v nirarthak baton ka bhed samajhna jaroori hai,usike liye adhyatmik antehkaran banayen.vahi yeh bul deta hai.
God bless you.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki in svabhavik prakiryayen me ghabrana nahi,bus Vivek ke saath sarthak v nirarthak baton ka bhed samajhna jaroori hai,usike liye adhyatmik antehkaran banayen.vahi yeh bul deta hai.
God bless you.
Hari om.

messages.text: Hum apne jeevan ko hur pul shubh vicharon me salagn rakhne ka prayas karen,yehi sarvatha kalyankari hai.
messages.fullText:
Hum apne jeevan ko hur pul shubh vicharon me salagn rakhne ka prayas karen,yehi sarvatha kalyankari hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Vikas ki daur Hume apne sidhhanton,muulyon se duur ker deti hai,tabhi bhagvan ko anuruup leelayen Karni padti hai.
messages.fullText:
Vikas ki daur Hume apne sidhhanton,muulyon se duur ker deti hai,tabhi bhagvan ko anuruup leelayen Karni padti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan me umang ,ullas ki Devi ka aaradhan bane rehna chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me umang ,ullas ki Devi ka aaradhan bane rehna chahiye.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya Jeevan ka sarvocchh vaibhav hai,Atmgyan.
messages.fullText:
Manushya Jeevan ka sarvocchh vaibhav hai,Atmgyan.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik abhyas hi akmatr jeevan ko paripurn banane me sarvsamarth hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik abhyas hi akmatr jeevan ko paripurn banane me sarvsamarth hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhuta vichar Lakshmi,Gyan-vairagya Lakshmi ki aakankshi hoti hai .
messages.fullText:
Sadhuta vichar Lakshmi,Gyan-vairagya Lakshmi ki aakankshi hoti hai .
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvat Ras se bheega munn shant rehta hai,jabki vishay Ras se bheega munn udvign rehta hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvat Ras se bheega munn shant rehta hai,jabki vishay Ras se bheega munn udvign rehta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Manush jeevan akmatr apni anantata ko arjit ker lene ke liye mila hai.
messages.fullText:
Manush jeevan akmatr apni anantata ko arjit ker lene ke liye mila hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ke hur paksh ko santulan deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ke hur paksh ko santulan deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Vishay sangati ka asantulan jeevan ko bhay deta hai,jabki ram rus se adr munn ashavadi banata hai.
messages.fullText:
Vishay sangati ka asantulan jeevan ko bhay deta hai,jabki ram rus se adr munn ashavadi banata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang,sant sannidhi,unka anusheelan Kalyan ke putt kholta hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang,sant sannidhi,unka anusheelan Kalyan ke putt kholta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Akant pavitrata hi iishvareey samarthya ko hamare bheeter jagrit karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Akant pavitrata hi iishvareey samarthya ko hamare bheeter jagrit karti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Guru Purnima ke pavas mahaparv per sabhiko anant shubh kamnayen.
Guru dharm ke sakshat sakar vigreh hote hai,jahan se hur pul dharm ki hi fuhaaren nikalti hai.
Aise Divya mahatman ko apne jeevan Kal me paker hum sub dhanya dhanyata ka madhur ahsas karte hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru Purnima ke pavas mahaparv per sabhiko anant shubh kamnayen.
Guru dharm ke sakshat sakar vigreh hote hai,jahan se hur pul dharm ki hi fuhaaren nikalti hai.
Aise Divya mahatman ko apne jeevan Kal me paker hum sub dhanya dhanyata ka madhur ahsas karte hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru utsavdharmita,ullas dharmita v sehajdharmita ke mool strot hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru utsavdharmita,ullas dharmita v sehajdharmita ke mool strot hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka suraksha kavach hi akmatr jeevan ko sahi  ruup me disha bodh deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ka suraksha kavach hi akmatr jeevan ko sahi  ruup me disha bodh deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki Charan sharanta hume nishchint karti chalti hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ki Charan sharanta hume nishchint karti chalti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya jeevan hi veh achhook avsar hai,jisme alokik tatv ko uplabdh hua ja sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya jeevan hi veh achhook avsar hai,jisme alokik tatv ko uplabdh hua ja sakta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru Charan samarthya shubh sankalpon ki puurti ki jvalant jyot hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru Charan samarthya shubh sankalpon ki puurti ki jvalant jyot hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Samridhhi,prasannta,vichar bul akmatr guru Gyan se labdh hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Samridhhi,prasannta,vichar bul akmatr guru Gyan se labdh hoti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sansar ke samast dukh daridray ka shaman Karne vale akmatr shree bhagvan hai.
messages.fullText:
Sansar ke samast dukh daridray ka shaman Karne vale akmatr shree bhagvan hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Padarth alpata ka bodh karate hai,jabki Prasad sampurnta ka parichay dete hai.
messages.fullText:
Padarth alpata ka bodh karate hai,jabki Prasad sampurnta ka parichay dete hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Acchhe guno se svayam ko sarobar rakhna hi utsav hai.
messages.fullText:
Acchhe guno se svayam ko sarobar rakhna hi utsav hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa Hume chintaon ke sansar se utha chintan ke samrajya  me le aati hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa Hume chintaon ke sansar se utha chintan ke samrajya  me le aati hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hum apni hi socchh se vijayee hote hai,aur apni hi socchh se parajayee.
messages.fullText:
Hum apni hi socchh se vijayee hote hai,aur apni hi socchh se parajayee.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki satvikta hi akmatr iski sabalta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki satvikta hi akmatr iski sabalta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Apni sadhna se sadhak ko kabhi bhi santusht nahi hona chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Apni sadhna se sadhak ko kabhi bhi santusht nahi hona chahiye.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Narayan smriti hi akmatr jeevan ko sukhi karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Narayan smriti hi akmatr jeevan ko sukhi karti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan me seekhne ki pravarti prachand rehni chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me seekhne ki pravarti prachand rehni chahiye.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang ka jeevan me atmsat hote chalna hi sarvocchh upasna hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang ka jeevan me atmsat hote chalna hi sarvocchh upasna hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamari prarthnaon me artt bhav rehna chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Hamari prarthnaon me artt bhav rehna chahiye.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Narayan gati,mati hi akmatr moksh ka sadhan hai.
messages.fullText:
Narayan gati,mati hi akmatr moksh ka sadhan hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ko pug pug per dhairya avam titiksha ki aavashyakta hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ko pug pug per dhairya avam titiksha ki aavashyakta hoti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sant mahatmano ke jeevan ka anusheelan hi hamare jeevan ka dhyey hona chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Sant mahatmano ke jeevan ka anusheelan hi hamare jeevan ka dhyey hona chahiye.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hur pul Narayan smriti rahe.
messages.fullText:
Hur pul Narayan smriti rahe.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki disha aur Dasha ke sanvarak hote hai,guru,sant,mahatman.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki disha aur Dasha ke sanvarak hote hai,guru,sant,mahatman.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Han,beta.sub kripa hai.
Take care.
messages.fullText:
Han,beta.sub kripa hai.
Take care.
Hari om.

messages.text: Atmik prem ka koi aur vikalp nahi.
messages.fullText:
Atmik prem ka koi aur vikalp nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charno me hi akmatr manushya jeevan ki anmolta ke vaibhav ka bodh hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru charno me hi akmatr manushya jeevan ki anmolta ke vaibhav ka bodh hota hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sanyaman sadaiv svayam ka hota hai,yeh koi thop nahi.
messages.fullText:
Sanyaman sadaiv svayam ka hota hai,yeh koi thop nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hum sada sada prakash margi rahen.
messages.fullText:
Hum sada sada prakash margi rahen.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hriday sparshit baat hi pranamya hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Hriday sparshit baat hi pranamya hoti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Samarpan hi akmatr jeevan ki nishchintata hai.
messages.fullText:
Samarpan hi akmatr jeevan ki nishchintata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Apni seemaon,samarthya,shamta ko samajhte hue shubh karyon me salangnata jeevan me rehni chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Apni seemaon,samarthya,shamta ko samajhte hue shubh karyon me salangnata jeevan me rehni chahiye.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm hi akmatr hume jeevan ko sehajtam,sugamtam v sundertam ruup me  jeene ki vidha sikhata hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm hi akmatr hume jeevan ko sehajtam,sugamtam v sundertam ruup me  jeene ki vidha sikhata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Samarpan se badh ker koi sadhna nahi.
messages.fullText:
Samarpan se badh ker koi sadhna nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Katha keval sun bharne ke liye hi nahi apitu pul pul atmsat ker jeene ke liye hai.
messages.fullText:
Katha keval sun bharne ke liye hi nahi apitu pul pul atmsat ker jeene ke liye hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Narayan ko sehajta,saralta,bhavmayta hi priya hai,pradarshan nahi.
messages.fullText:
Narayan ko sehajta,saralta,bhavmayta hi priya hai,pradarshan nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang hi akmatr hume veh drishti deta hai,ki hum sarvatr narayan darshan ker saken.
messages.fullText:
Satsang hi akmatr hume veh drishti deta hai,ki hum sarvatr narayan darshan ker saken.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Samarpan hi jeevan ka Sangeet hai.
messages.fullText:
Samarpan hi jeevan ka Sangeet hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hum sabhiko adhyatmik vyaktitv ki param avashyakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Hum sabhiko adhyatmik vyaktitv ki param avashyakta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Svaruup bodh hi akmatr saanchee svatantrata ka udhghoshak hai.
messages.fullText:
Svaruup bodh hi akmatr saanchee svatantrata ka udhghoshak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Shuddhh vicharon ki nirmal dhar jeevan ko samriddhh banati hai.
messages.fullText:
Shuddhh vicharon ki nirmal dhar jeevan ko samriddhh banati hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvan ki saanchee kripa ka murm satsang ke jeevan me avtaran ke baad hi svayam ko anavrit karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan ki saanchee kripa ka murm satsang ke jeevan me avtaran ke baad hi svayam ko anavrit karta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Shradhhamayee bhavnaon ka sailab ati ati madhur hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Shradhhamayee bhavnaon ka sailab ati ati madhur hota hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru aashish bade hi mook hote hai,gopneey dhang se apna kam karte hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru aashish bade hi mook hote hai,gopneey dhang se apna kam karte hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka jeevan me shubh agman akmatr hume apne asal ghar ki aur ruukh karvane ke liye hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ka jeevan me shubh agman akmatr hume apne asal ghar ki aur ruukh karvane ke liye hota hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atm Gyan hi manushya jeevan ki Iishvar pradat saanchii dharohar hai.
messages.fullText:
Atm Gyan hi manushya jeevan ki Iishvar pradat saanchii dharohar hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki saralta sehajta,svabhavikta,hi iska utsav hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki saralta sehajta,svabhavikta,hi iska utsav hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke sankeern roop ko guru kripa hi akmatr viratt ruup dene me sarvsamarth hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke sankeern roop ko guru kripa hi akmatr viratt ruup dene me sarvsamarth hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka hur lamha pujneey hai, kyonki usme Narayan ka vas hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka hur lamha pujneey hai, kyonki usme Narayan ka vas hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Akant ki pavasta apuurv samarthya ko jagrit karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Akant ki pavasta apuurv samarthya ko jagrit karti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Ishvar ki mridul kripa ka ahsas amrittulya hai.
messages.fullText:
Ishvar ki mridul kripa ka ahsas amrittulya hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru sannidhi me satat reh pane per hi unki amodya shakti ka ahsas hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru sannidhi me satat reh pane per hi unki amodya shakti ka ahsas hota hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Iisht smriti jeevan ki rahon ko sugamta pradan karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Iisht smriti jeevan ki rahon ko sugamta pradan karti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hum sub apne jeevan ko parmarthik rang me rangne ka prayas karen.
messages.fullText:
Hum sub apne jeevan ko parmarthik rang me rangne ka prayas karen.
Hari sharnam.

messages.fullText:

messages.text: Manushya ki prarabdh potli me nur se  Narayan hona likha hai.

messages.text: Guru sannidhi iishvar ki viratta ke dwar khol deti hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ashrey se badh ker Jeevan ka koi aur sambal nahin.
messages.fullText:
Guru ashrey se badh ker Jeevan ka koi aur sambal nahin.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Vichar ki shakti apar apar ,athah  athah hai.
messages.fullText:
Vichar ki shakti apar apar ,athah  athah hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru sannidhi ki fulshruti Jeevan me sveekriti,sehajta  sugamta v sarvbhomik prem hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Iish icchha hi sarvopari hai,jagtik sanchalan usi ka vidhan hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang ka satatya hi hume mai mere ki abhipsaon se upper utha sarv ke liye jeene ki vidha sikhata hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jate hue varsh se guru kripa svaruup labhya anant divya shikshaon ko hum sabhika shat shat pranam.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Nav varsh ki shubh kamnayen.
Beete varsh ki sikhavan iss varsh ka hamara achran bune.
messages.fullText:

Beete varsh ki sikhavan iss varsh ka hamara achran bune.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sradhha ruupi mahatatv akmatr  guru kripa se hi labhya hota hai aur uska sarankshan bhi akmatr unhi ki ahatukeey kripa hoti hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa hi akmatr hume antas ki hur pul vyavastatha pradan karne me sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Sadhna ka satatya hi  hamara charitr hota jata hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru prasadi Jeevan ki divyata ke kapat sadaiv khule rakhti hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru prasadi Jeevan ki divyata ke kapat sadaiv khule rakhti hai.

messages.text: Guru kripa ki chatr chhanv me hi akmatr hamari buddhi me suvicharnayen ,Satkarm prernayen upajti hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Divya antehkaran nirmati me akmatr guru prasadik vicharon ki atmsatta hi hetu hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Katha shravan Jeevan ki divyata ko udhgatit karne me satat sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Katha shravan Jeevan ki divyata ko udhgatit karne me satat sahayak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke badalte aayamon me atm smriti hi akmatr sabal aadhar hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke badalte aayamon me atm smriti hi akmatr sabal aadhar hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa ka sabal aadhar hi akmatr hume   Sansar ki jakdano se upper uthane vala hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.fullText:
Sadguru àgman hi akmatr Jeevan me alokik  shringhar ki bayar lata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan Darshan ki barikiyon ka ambar hai,guru shree charano ki ott.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.fullText:
Guru charno ke prati hamari shradhha ka satatya hi Jeevan ka uttrayan hai.

messages.fullText:
Jeevan me guru ka aagman ise saanche arth de deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hi akmatr hamare sucharitr ko udhghatit karne me sarv saksham hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hi akmatr hamare sucharitr ko udhghatit karne me sarv saksham hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sharnagati hi akmatr Jeevan ki sarvatta hai.
messages.fullText:
Sharnagati hi akmatr Jeevan ki sarvatta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhan akmatr vahi hai,jo atmprakash paida ker de.
messages.fullText:
Sadhan akmatr vahi hai,jo atmprakash paida ker de.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Samay ki balvatta apar apar,athah athah hai.
messages.fullText:
Samay ki balvatta apar apar,athah athah hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki kushalta akmatr svayam ke satya ko uplabdh hone me hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki kushalta akmatr svayam ke satya ko uplabdh hone me hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa svaruup hamare nanhe nanhe prayas hi sanmarg prashastikaran me sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa svaruup hamare nanhe nanhe prayas hi sanmarg prashastikaran me sahayak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Nitya vidyaman satta hi akmatr satya hai ,parmatma hai.
messages.fullText:
Nitya vidyaman satta hi akmatr satya hai ,parmatma hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Apni sankirntaon se upper uthna hi Jeevan ka dhyey hona chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Apni sankirntaon se upper uthna hi Jeevan ka dhyey hona chahiye.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki sehajta,sugamta v svabhavikta akmatr Hari charan sharan me nivasit hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki sehajta,sugamta v svabhavikta akmatr Hari charan sharan me nivasit hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru sehajta,sugamta v saralta ke devta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru sehajta,sugamta v saralta ke devta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamari chetna ka nit nit arohan hi hamara Gantatr Divas hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamari chetna ka nit nit arohan hi hamara Gantatr Divas hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke vividh aayamo me tham ker khade rehne ka samarthya shree guru charno se hi milta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke vividh aayamo me tham ker khade rehne ka samarthya shree guru charno se hi milta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Gyan jeevan me amrit aur agyan vish paida ker deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Gyan jeevan me amrit aur agyan vish paida ker deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm akmatr svayam me parivartan ki mang ki upasna hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm akmatr svayam me parivartan ki mang ki upasna hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charano ki sharan se badhker kalyankari kuch bhi aur ho hi nahi sakta.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Vichar ki viratata sare brahmand ko apna bana sakti hai.
messages.fullText:
Vichar ki viratata sare brahmand ko apna bana sakti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya jeevan ki maang akmatr anand hai,sukh nahi,veh to matr bhranti hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satehi jeevan nipat bhrantiyon se bhara hota hai.

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hamare jeevan ke hur pul ko sarthak banane me param sahayak hai.

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm bul hi hamare deh adhyas per sadaiv bhari hai.

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru vachano ka samarthya hi akmatr hamare bheeter ke chipe hue amrit ko udhghatit karne me sarvsamarth hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Abhyas ka satatya sadhna ko svabhav banata chalta hai.

Abhyas ka satatya sadhna ko svabhav banata chalta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.fullText:
Atm nishchay hi akmatr samast bhrantiyon ka nirakaran kar pane me hetu hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

Adhyatm hi akmatr manushya jeevan ki sanjeevani hai.
Hari sharnam.

Satguru ki bhaktvasalta ko pul pul pranam.
Hari sharnam.

Hari sharnam.

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru se badh ker hitaishi koi aur ho hi nahi sakta.isiliye to ve hamare sirmor hai.

messages.text: Apne abhyas ka satatya satat bane rehna chahiye.

Hari sharnam.

messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki mati se chal ker hi hum akmatr apne gantavya tuk pahunch sakte hai,apni mun mati se chal ker nahi.
messages.fullText:
Guru ki mati se chal ker hi hum akmatr apne gantavya tuk pahunch sakte hai,apni mun mati se chal ker nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.fullText:
Satguru kripa akmatr gehan anubhuti ka vishay hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki Karunamayee kripa ka koi orr chorr nahi.
messages.fullText:
Guru ki Karunamayee kripa ka koi orr chorr nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sanchee sujagiyat jeevan ko akmatr guru charan sharan rehker hi milti hai.

messages.text: Guru pradat marg hi akmatr sehajdatri hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Naitikta ka bul apar apar,athah athah hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna ka satatya hamari seemaon ko prakashit karta jata hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.fullText:
Satya ki ott bahut shaktishali hoti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jagat mun ke prapanch se itar kucch aur nahi.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charan rujj jeevan ki sanjeevani hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru charan rujj jeevan ki sanjeevani hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Svayam se sacchha aur imandar hona badi sadhna hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

Hari sharnam.

messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charan ashrey labhya hone per hi akmatr manushya jeevan ki svarnmayee avsarta ka bodh ho pata hai.

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Samarpan bhagvateey tatv hai,jo guru kripa se hamare marg ka prashastikaran karta hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charan sannidhi ki mahaprasadi jeevan ki sehajta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru charan sannidhi ki mahaprasadi jeevan ki sehajta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charan sharan ka ashrey hi akmatr jeevan ko sahi disha de pata hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satguru shree charno ki kripamayee prasadi hai,yeh jeevan.isse itar aur kucchh nahi.

messages.text: Guru charno ka adrishya bul hi akmatr jeevan ka sanchha aadhar hota hai
messages.fullText:
Guru charno ka adrishya bul hi akmatr jeevan ka sanchha aadhar hota hai
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charno ka adrishya bul hi akmatr jeevan ka sanchha aadhar hota hai
messages.fullText:
Guru charno ka adrishya bul hi akmatr jeevan ka sanchha aadhar hota hai
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charan sharan ki haritima hi akmatr manushyatv ki sanjeevani hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charan bul hi akmatr sadhak ko sahi disha nirdesh dene me sarv samarth hai.

messages.fullText:

messages.text: Atm gyan ka divya prakash  hi akmatr antas timir ko duur bhagane me sarvsamarth hai.
messages.fullText:
Atm gyan ka divya prakash  hi akmatr antas timir ko duur bhagane me sarvsamarth hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki saralta sehajta,svabhavikta se badh ker koi aur iish vardan nahi.

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Vishvas sarvocchh raksha kavachh hai,jo akmatr kripamayee tatv hai.
messages.fullText:
Vishvas sarvocchh raksha kavachh hai,jo akmatr kripamayee tatv hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Iishvar kal ki nitya naveen chetanta hai.
messages.fullText:
Iishvar kal ki nitya naveen chetanta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvan vartman me hamare hi purusharth me nivas karte hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan vartman me hamare hi purusharth me nivas karte hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charno ka divya,adrishya,suvasit samarthya hi akmatr hamare antas ko poshit karne me sarv samarth hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru charno ka divya,adrishya,suvasit samarthya hi akmatr hamare antas ko poshit karne me sarv samarth hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki karunatmak kripa chanv tale hi akmatr hum saanchhi vishranti ko anubhut karte hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ki karunatmak kripa chanv tale hi akmatr hum saanchhi vishranti ko anubhut karte hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmik gyan ki aadhar bhumi hai,sansarik akarshano se uprati.
messages.fullText:
Atmik gyan ki aadhar bhumi hai,sansarik akarshano se uprati.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan hi akmatr jeevan ke santulan me pul pul sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan hi akmatr jeevan ke santulan me pul pul sahayak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Iisht aadhar hi sarvopari hai.
messages.fullText:
Iisht aadhar hi sarvopari hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Om jeevani shakti ka param udhghosh hai.
messages.fullText:
Om jeevani shakti ka param udhghosh hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki sarthakta sveekaryata v samarpan me vas karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki sarthakta sveekaryata v samarpan me vas karti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvan ke samrajya me hur pul rehker hi sacchhi vishranti hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan ke samrajya me hur pul rehker hi sacchhi vishranti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Samarpan hi jeevan hai,isse itar kucchh aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Samarpan hi jeevan hai,isse itar kucchh aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ruup naiya ke khevanhar hai,akmatr sadguru.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ruup naiya ke khevanhar hai,akmatr sadguru.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charan ashrey hi akmatr jeevan ka sarvasv hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru charan ashrey hi akmatr jeevan ka sarvasv hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru pradat mati hi sumati hai,jo sarthakta ke dwar kholti hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru pradat mati hi sumati hai,jo sarthakta ke dwar kholti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Padarthik sang jeevan ko durgam aur guru ka sang jeevan ko sugam banata hai.
messages.fullText:
Padarthik sang jeevan ko durgam aur guru ka sang jeevan ko sugam banata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sharnagati se badh ker koi sadhan nahi.
messages.fullText:
Sharnagati se badh ker koi sadhan nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ki sanjeevani  hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ki sanjeevani  hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka mool dhyey satat shrey marg yani parmatmik rah per chalte rehna hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka mool dhyey satat shrey marg yani parmatmik rah per chalte rehna hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Iishvar ki sarvagyata ka ahsas akmatr guru kripa se hi sambhav hai,
messages.fullText:
Iishvar ki sarvagyata ka ahsas akmatr guru kripa se hi sambhav hai,
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sweekriti avam samarpan jeevan ke ka v kha hai(hindi ke prime alfabet)hai.ak doosre ke poorak hai.
messages.fullText:
Sweekriti avam samarpan jeevan ke ka v kha hai(hindi ke prime alfabet)hai.ak doosre ke poorak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Kaise ho,beta
Ghar me sub theek hai.
messages.fullText:
Kaise ho,beta
Ghar me sub theek hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru ka sarv kalyanmayee udghosh hi hum sabhike jeevan ka suraksha kavacchh hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ka sarv kalyanmayee udghosh hi hum sabhike jeevan ka suraksha kavacchh hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik parivesh me satat rehker hi akmatr dheere dheere hamare agyan ki nivriti sambhav hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik parivesh me satat rehker hi akmatr dheere dheere hamare agyan ki nivriti sambhav hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik aura hi akmatr hume atm bul,nirbhayta avam santulan deta hai anya kucchh aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik aura hi akmatr hume atm bul,nirbhayta avam santulan deta hai anya kucchh aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Kal ka yeh avasar akmatr simat ker jeevan ke satya ko labdh ho Jane ka hai.
messages.fullText:
Kal ka yeh avasar akmatr simat ker jeevan ke satya ko labdh ho Jane ka hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ke vishudhh atishay prem ka avlamb hi akmatr jeevan ko sahi disha me niranter agrasarit karne vala hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ke vishudhh atishay prem ka avlamb hi akmatr jeevan ko sahi disha me niranter agrasarit karne vala hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki kripamayee chatr chanv hi hume jeevan ke durgam pathon per sheetalta pradan ker puneh puneh urjanvit karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ki kripamayee chatr chanv hi hume jeevan ke durgam pathon per sheetalta pradan ker puneh puneh urjanvit karti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru pradat atm gyan hi akmatr jeevan ke beehadon ko apni sheetal bayar se upvan svaruup banata chalta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru pradat atm gyan hi akmatr jeevan ke beehadon ko apni sheetal bayar se upvan svaruup banata chalta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik sadhan hi akmatr anant ki aur le jane me hetu hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik sadhan hi akmatr anant ki aur le jane me hetu hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atul samarthya ke strot hai,akmatr shree guru charan.
messages.fullText:
Atul samarthya ke strot hai,akmatr shree guru charan.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmikta jeevan ko sehaj,svabhavik,Saras banaye rakhne me pul pul sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmikta jeevan ko sehaj,svabhavik,Saras banaye rakhne me pul pul sahayak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charno ka akmatr anusheelan satat hote rehne per hi jeevan ka durgam safar bhi aasan bhasne lagta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru charno ka akmatr anusheelan satat hote rehne per hi jeevan ka durgam safar bhi aasan bhasne lagta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru, sant,mahatmaon ke marg darshan me satat reh ker hi akmatr atm gyan ki paripakvata sambhav hai
messages.fullText:
Guru, sant,mahatmaon ke marg darshan me satat reh ker hi akmatr atm gyan ki paripakvata sambhav hai
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik abhyas ke liye jeevan me jadta se satat algav ki prakriya param avashyak hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik abhyas ke liye jeevan me jadta se satat algav ki prakriya param avashyak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka naaveenya akmatr antehkaran ke adhyatmik hone me hi samahit hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka naaveenya akmatr antehkaran ke adhyatmik hone me hi samahit hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka saar hai sveekriti v sharnagati.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka saar hai sveekriti v sharnagati.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru pradat atm gyan hi akmatr jeevan ke sunehre paksh ka ashvasan deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru pradat atm gyan hi akmatr jeevan ke sunehre paksh ka ashvasan deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare shubh karm hi hamare bhavi sanskaron ka sampadan karte hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamare shubh karm hi hamare bhavi sanskaron ka sampadan karte hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ka utkarsh,ullas,utsav hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ka utkarsh,ullas,utsav hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka saanchha soundarya,samridhhii,vaibhav akmatr atm bodh me aaseen hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka saanchha soundarya,samridhhii,vaibhav akmatr atm bodh me aaseen hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamara hi jad bhav shaithilyata ko aur hamara hi atmik bhav sabalta ko labdh karata hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamara hi jad bhav shaithilyata ko aur hamara hi atmik bhav sabalta ko labdh karata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charan ashrey hi akmatr jeevan ki sarthakta ke kapat kholta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru charan ashrey hi akmatr jeevan ki sarthakta ke kapat kholta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki sarthak sampannta ke liye akmatr iisht sannidhi hi chahiye,jad sang nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki sarthak sampannta ke liye akmatr iisht sannidhi hi chahiye,jad sang nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satya anveshna ka satatya hi akmatr jeevan ko sadgati dene me sarvsamarth hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya anveshna ka satatya hi akmatr jeevan ko sadgati dene me sarvsamarth hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sant sadguru,mahatmaon,vigya purushon ko shradhha purvak shravan ker pane ki fulshruti ka naam hai,algav vilagta avam viratta.
messages.fullText:
Sant sadguru,mahatmaon,vigya purushon ko shradhha purvak shravan ker pane ki fulshruti ka naam hai,algav vilagta avam viratta.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa sarvprtham hume vani ki Sarasata me lati hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa sarvprtham hume vani ki Sarasata me lati hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm hi akmatr hamare agyan ki durbaltaon ka parichay de unki jadon ko ukhad fenkne me satat sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm hi akmatr hamare agyan ki durbaltaon ka parichay de unki jadon ko ukhad fenkne me satat sahayak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atm gyan Hume sunder smritiyon me rehne ki vidha sikhata hai.
messages.fullText:
Atm gyan Hume sunder smritiyon me rehne ki vidha sikhata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru v iisht ak hi sikke ke do pehluu hai,yani ubhairuup hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru v iisht ak hi sikke ke do pehluu hai,yani ubhairuup hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ko apne adarsh anuruup sundertam ruup me jeene per hi iske sunder visarjan ke prati nishchint raha ja sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ko apne adarsh anuruup sundertam ruup me jeene per hi iske sunder visarjan ke prati nishchint raha ja sakta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa hi akmatr Hume sadvicharon se poorit rakh jeevan ko hur pul suvasit rakhne me sarvsamarth hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa hi akmatr Hume sadvicharon se poorit rakh jeevan ko hur pul suvasit rakhne me sarvsamarth hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan hi akmatr hume chahurmukh sujagta me rakh pane me sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan hi akmatr hume chahurmukh sujagta me rakh pane me sahayak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka charaveti charaveti sidhhant sarvocchh hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka charaveti charaveti sidhhant sarvocchh hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki uthti girti lehron ke madhya atmgyan hi akmatr madhyasthta baithane me pul pul sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki uthti girti lehron ke madhya atmgyan hi akmatr madhyasthta baithane me pul pul sahayak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmik geeton me hi akmatr jeevan ka utsav hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmik geeton me hi akmatr jeevan ka utsav hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ruup lata ka saanchha aashrey hai akmatr atm gyan ruup vatt vriksh,ye hi to guru charno ki mahaprasadi hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ruup lata ka saanchha aashrey hai akmatr atm gyan ruup vatt vriksh,ye hi to guru charno ki mahaprasadi hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Apne iisht ki kripa bagair hume kabhi bhi kripa anubhuti ho nahi sakti.
messages.fullText:
Apne iisht ki kripa bagair hume kabhi bhi kripa anubhuti ho nahi sakti.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmbodh ke saath hi akmatr jeevan ka sahi sahi darshan sambhav hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmbodh ke saath hi akmatr jeevan ka sahi sahi darshan sambhav hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka saanchha sambal hai,akmatr guru charan ashrey.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka saanchha sambal hai,akmatr guru charan ashrey.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Dehik jeevan ka fulsafa hai,nashvarta nashvarta nashvarta.....
Atmik jeevan ka fulsafa hai,ajarta amarta divyata.
messages.fullText:
Dehik jeevan ka fulsafa hai,nashvarta nashvarta nashvarta.....
Atmik jeevan ka fulsafa hai,ajarta amarta divyata.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Vivek vichar ki sadhna hamare drishtikon ko svasth banati hai.
messages.fullText:
Vivek vichar ki sadhna hamare drishtikon ko svasth banati hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Apne svayam ko jaan lena hi jeevan ka abhinandan hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne svayam ko jaan lena hi jeevan ka abhinandan hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan dhara  satat iisht charno ko sparshit karne per hi sarthak ho pati hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan dhara  satat iisht charno ko sparshit karne per hi sarthak ho pati hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan hi akmatr hamari socchh per niyantran rakh pane me sarv samarth hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan hi akmatr hamari socchh per niyantran rakh pane me sarv samarth hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atm sanyaman hi akmatr jeevan siddhhi ke dwar khol pane me sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Atm sanyaman hi akmatr jeevan siddhhi ke dwar khol pane me sahayak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan hi jeevan ki sadabaharita hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan hi jeevan ki sadabaharita hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ko kucchh iss tarah se jee saken ki prasthan sukhad bun sake,aur yeh akmatr guru ke bataye marg per satat chalte rehne per hi sambhavit hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ko kucchh iss tarah se jee saken ki prasthan sukhad bun sake,aur yeh akmatr guru ke bataye marg per satat chalte rehne per hi sambhavit hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Apne antehkaran ko adhyatmik bana lena hi sarvshreshth purusharth hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne antehkaran ko adhyatmik bana lena hi sarvshreshth purusharth hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka hur vakya shishya ki shradhha ke aura me mahamantr ho jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ka hur vakya shishya ki shradhha ke aura me mahamantr ho jata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm ki louu antas me sadaiv prajvalit rahe,bujhe nahi.
messages.fullText:
Dharm ki louu antas me sadaiv prajvalit rahe,bujhe nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Vairagya yukt abhyas ka satatya hi gantavya tuk pahunchane me sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Vairagya yukt abhyas ka satatya hi gantavya tuk pahunchane me sahayak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki pravahmanta me dharm hi akmatr pul pul sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki pravahmanta me dharm hi akmatr pul pul sahayak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan ki bhor satat buni rahe,aisi hamari prarthna ho shree Hari charno me.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan ki bhor satat buni rahe,aisi hamari prarthna ho shree Hari charno me.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru pradat atmgyan ke sehcher bun Jane per hum sukh dukh ke hichkolon se uuper uthte jate hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru pradat atmgyan ke sehcher bun Jane per hum sukh dukh ke hichkolon se uuper uthte jate hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charno se udne vali sheetal,mridul,pavas bayar ka sparsh hamare antas ko bag bag ker deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru charno se udne vali sheetal,mridul,pavas bayar ka sparsh hamare antas ko bag bag ker deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan hi akmatr jeevan ke hur pul ka saanchha sathi hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan hi akmatr jeevan ke hur pul ka saanchha sathi hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa hi akmatr Hume manushya tun ki avsar garima,mahima ka bodh karati hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa hi akmatr Hume manushya tun ki avsar garima,mahima ka bodh karati hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Asangta jeevan ka sarvocchh shastr hai.
messages.fullText:
Asangta jeevan ka sarvocchh shastr hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru tatv ka jagran akmatr guru satta ke ashrey me hi hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru tatv ka jagran akmatr guru satta ke ashrey me hi hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan hi akmatr jeevan ki adol adharshila hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan hi akmatr jeevan ki adol adharshila hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satguru hi akmatr hamare antas ke chaitanya prakash ko udhghatit karne me sarvsamarth hai.
messages.fullText:
Satguru hi akmatr hamare antas ke chaitanya prakash ko udhghatit karne me sarvsamarth hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan hi akmatr jeevan ke satya se parichit ker tamam bhrantiyon se uuper utha deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan hi akmatr jeevan ke satya se parichit ker tamam bhrantiyon se uuper utha deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Beta apni next ease se kul parson me baat ker lena.
messages.fullText:
Beta apni next ease se kul parson me baat ker lena.
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru ke aashishon me atmgyan ki sampoornta hi samahit hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ke aashishon me atmgyan ki sampoornta hi samahit hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atm gyan ki sadhna ka satatya jeevan ko shubh sankalpit karta jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Atm gyan ki sadhna ka satatya jeevan ko shubh sankalpit karta jata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna ka satatya avam akhandata hi akmatr jeevan sarthakta ke marg ko prashast karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna ka satatya avam akhandata hi akmatr jeevan sarthakta ke marg ko prashast karti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang ka satatya hamare bheeter gyan avam vairagya agni ko prajvalit karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang ka satatya hamare bheeter gyan avam vairagya agni ko prajvalit karta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sant Mahatmaon ke shree pad chinhon ka satat anusheelan hi akmatr jeevan sarthakta ki labdhata me hetu hai.
messages.fullText:
Sant Mahatmaon ke shree pad chinhon ka satat anusheelan hi akmatr jeevan sarthakta ki labdhata me hetu hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke saralikaran,soundaryakaran,dedipyamanta me akmatr adhyatm hi sahayak hai ,kucchh aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke saralikaran,soundaryakaran,dedipyamanta me akmatr adhyatm hi sahayak hai ,kucchh aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki dhanyata akmatr atmbodh me samahit hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki dhanyata akmatr atmbodh me samahit hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Koi baat nahi,next turn per baat karenge.
messages.fullText:
Koi baat nahi,next turn per baat karenge.
Hari om.

messages.text: Samarpan se badhker koi sundertam cheej nahi.
messages.fullText:
Samarpan se badhker koi sundertam cheej nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Kal ki pratyek vela pradamya hai.
messages.fullText:
Kal ki pratyek vela pradamya hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ak devta hai,to isme hone vala pratyek karm upasna banta jaye.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ak devta hai,to isme hone vala pratyek karm upasna banta jaye.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hume pul pul adhyatmik uddan ki aur prerit karte hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hume pul pul adhyatmik uddan ki aur prerit karte hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm apne saanche ghar ki aur loutne ki pavas vidha hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm apne saanche ghar ki aur loutne ki pavas vidha hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik bayar ki sheetalta,sarasta,mridulta ka divya sparsh hum sabhike jeevan ko bag bag ker deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik bayar ki sheetalta,sarasta,mridulta ka divya sparsh hum sabhike jeevan ko bag bag ker deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmbodh ka divya prakash jeevan ke pratyek pehluu ko spasht karta jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmbodh ka divya prakash jeevan ke pratyek pehluu ko spasht karta jata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik gyan ki sheetal,mridul,suvasit bayar jeevan ki durgamtaon ko hava hava karti jati hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik gyan ki sheetal,mridul,suvasit bayar jeevan ki durgamtaon ko hava hava karti jati hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke avidyamayee veg ko akmatr adhyatm hi dheerta,gambheerta avam divyata pradan karne me sarvsaksham hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke avidyamayee veg ko akmatr adhyatm hi dheerta,gambheerta avam divyata pradan karne me sarvsaksham hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charno ki karunatmak vatsalyamayee mridul kripa hi akmatr jeevan ki saanchhi sanjeevani hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru charno ki karunatmak vatsalyamayee mridul kripa hi akmatr jeevan ki saanchhi sanjeevani hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa hamare kalyan ke liye kis gopneey dhang se marg taiyar ker rahi hoti hai,shabdateet hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa hamare kalyan ke liye kis gopneey dhang se marg taiyar ker rahi hoti hai,shabdateet hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kis kis ruup me pragat ho hamare jeevan dwar per choukasta ke liye dastak de jate hai.sub hamare hi kalyan me nihit hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru kis kis ruup me pragat ho hamare jeevan dwar per choukasta ke liye dastak de jate hai.sub hamare hi kalyan me nihit hota hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Svayam me parivartan ki icchha hi akmatr hume samaj,parivar ke liye sehkari tatv banati hai.
messages.fullText:
Svayam me parivartan ki icchha hi akmatr hume samaj,parivar ke liye sehkari tatv banati hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik jeevan ki aadhar shila hai, akmatr shree guru charan ashrey.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik jeevan ki aadhar shila hai, akmatr shree guru charan ashrey.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Svayam me puurnta ka bhram hi hume vapis sansar ki dul dul me pahuncha deta hai,ateh apne abhyas me hume ati chaukas rehne ki avashyakta hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Svayam me puurnta ka bhram hi hume vapis sansar ki dul dul me pahuncha deta hai,ateh apne abhyas me hume ati chaukas rehne ki avashyakta hoti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm ke abhav me jeevani shakti ka prashastikaran ho nahi pata.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm ke abhav me jeevani shakti ka prashastikaran ho nahi pata.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamari apni hi bahir mukhta hume apne anter me loutane me vilamb ka karan hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamari apni hi bahir mukhta hume apne anter me loutane me vilamb ka karan hoti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ko pradarshan se duur rakh iski satyata ke bodh ko sudridhh karta jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ko pradarshan se duur rakh iski satyata ke bodh ko sudridhh karta jata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ki satrangita ko santulan pradan karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ki satrangita ko santulan pradan karta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki hur paheli ka hul hai,adhyatm ki sharan jana.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki hur paheli ka hul hai,adhyatm ki sharan jana.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik jeevan ki alokikta pratipul pranamya hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik jeevan ki alokikta pratipul pranamya hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamari hi avidya ,agyan hamari avyavastha ka karan hai,kucchh aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Hamari hi avidya ,agyan hamari avyavastha ka karan hai,kucchh aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Aap sabhiko bahut bahut shubh kanayen.
God bless newly weds.
messages.fullText:
Aap sabhiko bahut bahut shubh kanayen.
God bless newly weds.
Hari om.

messages.text: Adhyatmik rah per chal ker hi akmatr jeevan ki sarthakta ko labdh hua ja sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik rah per chal ker hi akmatr jeevan ki sarthakta ko labdh hua ja sakta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Dharm hi akmatr jeevan ke utthaan ka sehaj sadhan hai.
Hari  sharnam.
messages.fullText:
Dharm hi akmatr jeevan ke utthaan ka sehaj sadhan hai.
Hari  sharnam.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Vicharon ki sampannta iishvar pradat samridhii ko udhghatit karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Vicharon ki sampannta iishvar pradat samridhii ko udhghatit karti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru jeevan ke sanjeevani prakash hote hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru jeevan ke sanjeevani prakash hote hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sanyaman ke paath ka pul pul abhyas jeevan ko kalyan ke marg per agrasarit karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Sanyaman ke paath ka pul pul abhyas jeevan ko kalyan ke marg per agrasarit karta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan hi akmatr jeevan ka anterang sakha hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan hi akmatr jeevan ka anterang sakha hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik path per chalte rehne ka satatya hi hume sarthak disha nirdesh deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik path per chalte rehne ka satatya hi hume sarthak disha nirdesh deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ki sadabaharta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ki sadabaharta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka mridul marg nirdeshan hi hum sabhiko  sahi track per rakhne me sahayak hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ka mridul marg nirdeshan hi hum sabhiko  sahi track per rakhne me sahayak hota hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Bhram,bhay,chinaton se mukt hone ke liye jeevan ka adarshyukt hona param param avashyak hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhram,bhay,chinaton se mukt hone ke liye jeevan ka adarshyukt hona param param avashyak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Aaj ke pavas divas per antas svatantrata ki divya samvednaon ko shat shat pranam.
messages.fullText:
Aaj ke pavas divas per antas svatantrata ki divya samvednaon ko shat shat pranam.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satat shreshthter hote chalna hi akmatr manushya jeevan ka dhyey hai.
messages.fullText:
Satat shreshthter hote chalna hi akmatr manushya jeevan ka dhyey hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sarvhitay,sarvsukhay,sarvmanglik bhav hi parmarth sidhii me hetu hai.
messages.fullText:
Sarvhitay,sarvsukhay,sarvmanglik bhav hi parmarth sidhii me hetu hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adarsh avlamban jeevan path ki durgamtaon ka saralikaran karne me pul pul sahayak hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Adarsh avlamban jeevan path ki durgamtaon ka saralikaran karne me pul pul sahayak hota hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Asatya se satya ki aur chalne ki iishvar charno me prarthna hi sarvocchh prarthna hai.
messages.fullText:
Asatya se satya ki aur chalne ki iishvar charno me prarthna hi sarvocchh prarthna hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru pradat atmik subul jeevan ke pratyek pul ka divya shrighar karta chala jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru pradat atmik subul jeevan ke pratyek pul ka divya shrighar karta chala jata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm avlamban hi akmatr jeevan dhara ko amritmayee banane me pul pul sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm avlamban hi akmatr jeevan dhara ko amritmayee banane me pul pul sahayak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Raksha Bandhan ki shubh kamnayen. 
Adhyatm manushya jeevan ka sarvocchh raksha suutr hai.
messages.fullText:
Raksha Bandhan ki shubh kamnayen. 
Adhyatm manushya jeevan ka sarvocchh raksha suutr hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan me adarsh avlamban hur pul moolyon ka nivesh karta jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me adarsh avlamban hur pul moolyon ka nivesh karta jata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka sang jeevan ke ang pratyang ko upasna bana deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ka sang jeevan ke ang pratyang ko upasna bana deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan ke abhav me hum jeevan ke saanche arth ko kabhi bhi labdh ho nahi sakte.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan ke abhav me hum jeevan ke saanche arth ko kabhi bhi labdh ho nahi sakte.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Santon ke santatv ke divyatam abhushan hai,unki daya aur karuna.
messages.fullText:
Santon ke santatv ke divyatam abhushan hai,unki daya aur karuna.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik jeevan parmatmik bul se poorit hota hai,jabki sansarik jeevan jad sanchay se.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik jeevan parmatmik bul se poorit hota hai,jabki sansarik jeevan jad sanchay se.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Geeta Hume pul pul jeevan ke santulan ka paath padhati hai.
messages.fullText:
Geeta Hume pul pul jeevan ke santulan ka paath padhati hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sarvocchh sadhna hai,apne deh adhyas ko tod atmasth ho jana.
messages.fullText:
Sarvocchh sadhna hai,apne deh adhyas ko tod atmasth ho jana.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm jeevan ki sehajta,saralta,sugamta,sarasta,sushishtata ko udhghatit karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm jeevan ki sehajta,saralta,sugamta,sarasta,sushishtata ko udhghatit karta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sacchhe guru apne shishyatv ko kabhi bhi apne se duur nahi hone dete isiliye to ve hum sabke akarshan ka kendra bun jate hai.
messages.fullText:
Sacchhe guru apne shishyatv ko kabhi bhi apne se duur nahi hone dete isiliye to ve hum sabke akarshan ka kendra bun jate hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm hi akmatr hume vichar ki gambheerta deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm hi akmatr hume vichar ki gambheerta deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Vichar ka bul hume pul pul bhogon ke parinam se parichit karva suraksha kavacchh bun jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Vichar ka bul hume pul pul bhogon ke parinam se parichit karva suraksha kavacchh bun jata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki jhanki ko sundertam bhavnaon aur  vicharon se susajjit karte chalen.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki jhanki ko sundertam bhavnaon aur  vicharon se susajjit karte chalen.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik neenv per hi akmatr jeevan ki sahi imarat ki nirmati hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik neenv per hi akmatr jeevan ki sahi imarat ki nirmati hoti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charan kripa hi akmatr sadhan ko svabhav me utar pane me hetu hai,yeh apne karne se nahi.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Bhog ke parinam se parichit rehne vala kabhi dukhi ho nahi sakta.
messages.fullText:
Bhog ke parinam se parichit rehne vala kabhi dukhi ho nahi sakta.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik jeevan vishvas ki dridh neenv per khada hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik jeevan vishvas ki dridh neenv per khada hota hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvan ka vidhan hume jeevant paath padhata hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan ka vidhan hume jeevant paath padhata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: You have to say something,if so I can talk after 6 pm.
messages.fullText:
You have to say something,if so I can talk after 6 pm.
Hari om.

messages.text: O.k,beta.
messages.fullText:
O.k,beta.
Hari om.

messages.text: Apne bheeter ke adhurepun,khalipan,nairashya se uuper uth pane ke liye hum sabhiko ak saanche mentor ki avashyakta hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne bheeter ke adhurepun,khalipan,nairashya se uuper uth pane ke liye hum sabhiko ak saanche mentor ki avashyakta hoti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Agyanta ki chadar jeevan ki yatharthta ko sadaiv dhake hi rehti hai.
messages.fullText:
Agyanta ki chadar jeevan ki yatharthta ko sadaiv dhake hi rehti hai.

messages.text: Adhyatmik rah per hi saralta,sehajta,sugamta ke pushp sadaiv khile rehte hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik rah per hi saralta,sehajta,sugamta ke pushp sadaiv khile rehte hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Iisht ki nikatta hume abhayta  deti hai, Jabki iisht se duuri jeevan ko bhaybheet rakhti hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm ka pravesh hi jeevan ko prakashit ker pane me sarvsamarth hai.
messages.fullText:
Dharm ka pravesh hi jeevan ko prakashit ker pane me sarvsamarth hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya jeevan vichar ki upasna ke liye hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya jeevan vichar ki upasna ke liye hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Shubh sankalp ka satatya jeevan me satat bune rehna chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Shubh sankalp ka satatya jeevan me satat bune rehna chahiye.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Yogyata v sadupyog hi akmatr adhikaron ki janani hai keval adhikaron ki mang nahi.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Santon ki daya v karuna ke hi hum sub kayal hote hai.
messages.fullText:
Santon ki daya v karuna ke hi hum sub kayal hote hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan hi akmatr jeevan ki sabal lathi hai,Jise pakad ker safar atmvishvas se paripurn reh sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan hi akmatr jeevan ki sabal lathi hai,Jise pakad ker safar atmvishvas se paripurn reh sakta hai.

messages.text: Jeevan me sacchhe guru ka prakatay sarvocch vibhuti hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm ka hamare antas me pravesh hote hi jeevan apne saanche arthon ko kholne lagta hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Adhyatmik gyan jeevan ko pug pug per sugam,sehaj aur svabhavik banaye chalta hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Guru kripa hamari drishti ka soundariyakaran karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa hamari drishti ka soundariyakaran karti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka adhyatmik rookh bin iish kripa ke sambhav hi nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka adhyatmik rookh bin iish kripa ke sambhav hi nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sundertam smritiyan iisht sannidhi ka ahsas hi hai.
messages.fullText:
Sundertam smritiyan iisht sannidhi ka ahsas hi hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki hur baji akmatr iishvar ki aur lagne ke liye hai,anyatha jeevan nirarthak hi siddhh ho jata  hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki hur baji akmatr iishvar ki aur lagne ke liye hai,anyatha jeevan nirarthak hi siddhh ho jata  hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki hur baji akmatr iishvar ki aur lagne ke liye hai,anyatha jeevan nirarthak hi siddhh ho jata  hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Jeevan ruup dariya me samanvay ki aahutiyon ka santulan satat bane rehna chahiye.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Sadhak ka dharm hai,ki veh apne akant ki pavasta ke vishay me satat jagruuk rahe.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Jeevan ki sarthakta akmatr atm bodh me vilayta  me hi samahit hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki sarthakta akmatr atm bodh me vilayta  me hi samahit hai.

messages.text: Atmgyan ki sunehari rashmiyon ko nit nit,pul pul naman.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan ki sunehari rashmiyon ko nit nit,pul pul naman.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Vidya ki chaitanyata vinaysheelta se aati hai.
messages.fullText:
Vidya ki chaitanyata vinaysheelta se aati hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satguru ashrey hi akmatr jeevan ke mridultam sangeet ka dwar kholta hai.
messages.fullText:
Satguru ashrey hi akmatr jeevan ke mridultam sangeet ka dwar kholta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna svayam me gambhirta ka satatya chahti hai,halkapun nahi.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna svayam me gambhirta ka satatya chahti hai,halkapun nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Vichar ka surya jeevan me sadaiv alokit rehna chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Vichar ka surya jeevan me sadaiv alokit rehna chahiye.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ke prem,audarya v karuna ki koi seema nahi ,veh anant anant hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ke prem,audarya v karuna ki koi seema nahi ,veh anant anant hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru gyan ka deep satat prajvalit rahe hum sabhike jeevan me.
messages.fullText:
Guru gyan ka deep satat prajvalit rahe hum sabhike jeevan me.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Navratri atm sinchan ka mahaparv hai.
Shubh kamnayen.
messages.fullText:

Shubh kamnayen.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satguru kripa jeevan ki visham se visham paheli ko kitna sundertam ruup de deti hai.

messages.text: Atmik bul hi jeevan ka sarvopari avlamb hai,jo akmatr guru kripa se hi ankurit hota hai.

messages.text: Pravartiyan sansar ki aur Jabki nivriti iishvar ki aur rookh karati hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Atmgyan ka ujjas hi jeevan ka suuryoday hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan ka ujjas hi jeevan ka suuryoday hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik sadhna jeevan ko gourav bodh ka ahsas karati hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik sadhna jeevan ko gourav bodh ka ahsas karati hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Tyagpurvak jiye Jane vala jeevan hur pul ki upasna bun jata hai.
Ramnavami ki shubh kamnayen.
messages.fullText:
Tyagpurvak jiye Jane vala jeevan hur pul ki upasna bun jata hai.
Ramnavami ki shubh kamnayen.

messages.text: Jeevan ka sanyaman hi akmatr atmdwar ko kholne me hetu hai.

messages.text: Atmgyan ka prakash hi akmatr jeevan ki spashttaon me pul pul sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:

Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik rah per satat chalne ke liye jeevan me clearity ka hona param avashyak hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Manushya jeevan akmatr svayam ko pehchan isme avasthit hone ke liye mila hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.fullText:

messages.text: Jeevan ki sugamta,sehajta avam svabhavikta akmatr atmbodh me chipi hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Jeevan ruup udhyan ko antim shan tuk niranter sanvarne ,sudharne ke prayas satat chalne chahiye.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Jeevan ki saanchhi tapashcharya sarvpratham svayam ke kalyan ke prati jagrukta hai,tabhi hum kucchh aage bhi de sakte hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki saanchhi tapashcharya sarvpratham svayam ke kalyan ke prati jagrukta hai,tabhi hum kucchh aage bhi de sakte hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke safar ki mridulta,yatharthta,soumyata akmatr adhyatm me hi chipi hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke safar ki mridulta,yatharthta,soumyata akmatr adhyatm me hi chipi hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hamare bheeter ki pardarshita dekhna chahte hai,thagi nahi.
messages.fullText:
Guru hamare bheeter ki pardarshita dekhna chahte hai,thagi nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sansar ki aapadhapi me atmgyan hi pul pul hamara sacchha bandhu ,sakha, mitr hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Sansar ki aapadhapi me atmgyan hi pul pul hamara sacchha bandhu ,sakha, mitr hota hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan hi akmatr jeevan ka shashvat bul hai,anya sub shanbhangur.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan hi akmatr jeevan ka shashvat bul hai,anya sub shanbhangur.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sharnagati hi akmatr sarvocchh sadhan hai.
messages.fullText:
Sharnagati hi akmatr sarvocchh sadhan hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki gatimanta bheeter se satat apne iisht ki aur rehni chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki gatimanta bheeter se satat apne iisht ki aur rehni chahiye.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik jeevan hi jeevan hai anyatha jeevan hur pul sansar me bojhiltaon se hi ghira rehta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik jeevan hi jeevan hai anyatha jeevan hur pul sansar me bojhiltaon se hi ghira rehta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan ki deep jyoti ka avlamb hi akmatr jeevan ko prakashit ker pata hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan ki deep jyoti ka avlamb hi akmatr jeevan ko prakashit ker pata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan hi akmatr antaskanti ke satat vistar me hetu hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan hi akmatr antaskanti ke satat vistar me hetu hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki haritima akmatr aur akmatr atmgyan me samahit hai,sansar me nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki haritima akmatr aur akmatr atmgyan me samahit hai,sansar me nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm ki bheeg sansar ki tapish se hume duur rakhti hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm ki bheeg sansar ki tapish se hume duur rakhti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sansar ka ramav bin HARI KRIPA shithil nahi ho pata.
messages.fullText:
Sansar ka ramav bin HARI KRIPA shithil nahi ho pata.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa se hi akmatr samay ki gati,svabhav avam fulshruti ka parichay milta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa se hi akmatr samay ki gati,svabhav avam fulshruti ka parichay milta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan me adhyatm ka samavesh jitna shighr ho sake,utna hi kalyankari hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me adhyatm ka samavesh jitna shighr ho sake,utna hi kalyankari hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Mun ki taleenta ke liye akmatr vishay hai,Hari charan. Anya kucchh bhi aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Mun ki taleenta ke liye akmatr vishay hai,Hari charan. Anya kucchh bhi aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sacchha guru svayam ke achran se saralta,sehajta v sadgi ka hi udghosh karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Sacchha guru svayam ke achran se saralta,sehajta v sadgi ka hi udghosh karta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Iishvar ne manushya ko apni hi samarthya ka adhikari banaya hai,per apni hi agyantavash veh iss bodh se anibhigya hai.
messages.fullText:
Iishvar ne manushya ko apni hi samarthya ka adhikari banaya hai,per apni hi agyantavash veh iss bodh se anibhigya hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan hi akmatr mun,budhii avam indriyon ki sanyamanta me pul pul sahayak hai,kartapun nahi.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan hi akmatr mun,budhii avam indriyon ki sanyamanta me pul pul sahayak hai,kartapun nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki hur paheli ka uttar Hume shastron me milta hai,aur veh akmatr gurumukh se  hi sunker udhghatit hote hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki hur paheli ka uttar Hume shastron me milta hai,aur veh akmatr gurumukh se  hi sunker udhghatit hote hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Apni sanskriti me reh ker jeena aur marna hi dharm hai.
messages.fullText:
Apni sanskriti me reh ker jeena aur marna hi dharm hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Sant,mahatmano,gurujano ki anukampa ka sambal hi akmatr hamare jeevan ki sanjeevani hai.
Hari sharnam.

Divya atmano ko hum sabhi ki aur se varshik shraddhh per shraddhha suman arpit.
messages.fullText:
Sant,mahatmano,gurujano ki anukampa ka sambal hi akmatr hamare jeevan ki sanjeevani hai.
Hari sharnam.

Divya atmano ko hum sabhi ki aur se varshik shraddhh per shraddhha suman arpit.
Hari om.

messages.text: Atmgyan antasvistar me sahayak hai,jabki sansar bahary vistar me.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan antasvistar me sahayak hai,jabki sansar bahary vistar me.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya iishvareey samarthya ka poorn adhikari hai,parantu baharly vishayon ka akarshan use barabar bhramit kiye rehta hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya iishvareey samarthya ka poorn adhikari hai,parantu baharly vishayon ka akarshan use barabar bhramit kiye rehta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm jeene ki sugam samajh deta hai,jabki sansar  kadam kadam per durgamta paida karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm jeene ki sugam samajh deta hai,jabki sansar  kadam kadam per durgamta paida karta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik rahee ka jeevan anand se paripurn hota chalta hai,jabki sansari rahgeer ka vyathaon se uljha hua.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik rahee ka jeevan anand se paripurn hota chalta hai,jabki sansari rahgeer ka vyathaon se uljha hua.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan dhara ko sabal rakhne ke liye atmgyan hi akmatr saanchha sambal hai ,kucchh aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan dhara ko sabal rakhne ke liye atmgyan hi akmatr saanchha sambal hai ,kucchh aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka sundertam shringhar hai atmbodh.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka sundertam shringhar hai atmbodh.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atm parichay jeevan ki sarvshreshth poonji hai.
messages.fullText:
Atm parichay jeevan ki sarvshreshth poonji hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya jeevan pradarshan ke liye nahi ,apitu antas divyata ki samridhi ke liye parmatma ka diya amulya uphar hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya jeevan pradarshan ke liye nahi ,apitu antas divyata ki samridhi ke liye parmatma ka diya amulya uphar hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan me sakaratmak sakriyata ka satatya satat rehna chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me sakaratmak sakriyata ka satatya satat rehna chahiye.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmikta ka rookh jeevan me akmatr iish kripa se hi sambhav hai,karne se nahi.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmikta ka rookh jeevan me akmatr iish kripa se hi sambhav hai,karne se nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmbodh jeevan ko gouravanvit karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmbodh jeevan ko gouravanvit karta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ka sarvocchh sambal hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ka sarvocchh sambal hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmnishchay hi jeevan ka saanchha manorath hai,jiski puurnata sambhav hai,nashvar sansar ke  manorath adhure hi rehte hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmnishchay hi jeevan ka saanchha manorath hai,jiski puurnata sambhav hai,nashvar sansar ke  manorath adhure hi rehte hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya jeevan ki sarthakta akmatr adhyatmik pathik bun ker chalte rehne me hi samahit hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya jeevan ki sarthakta akmatr adhyatmik pathik bun ker chalte rehne me hi samahit hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki atyantik bahirmukhta iske patan me hi sahayak hoti hai,uddhhar me kabhi nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki atyantik bahirmukhta iske patan me hi sahayak hoti hai,uddhhar me kabhi nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan me sacchhe adarsh ka aadhar ise sugam banaye chalta hai,koi lada ladi nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me sacchhe adarsh ka aadhar ise sugam banaye chalta hai,koi lada ladi nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sadguru sannidhi ka divya prakash hi akmatr jeevan ki rah ke kantakon ko sehaj ruup se aktaraf karne me pul pul sahayak  hai,hamara kartapana nahi.
messages.fullText:
Sadguru sannidhi ka divya prakash hi akmatr jeevan ki rah ke kantakon ko sehaj ruup se aktaraf karne me pul pul sahayak  hai,hamara kartapana nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik rah svayam se svayam ki imandari per hi prakashit ho pati hai,anyatha  uske pathik hone ka bhram hi rehta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik rah svayam se svayam ki imandari per hi prakashit ho pati hai,anyatha  uske pathik hone ka bhram hi rehta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan jeevan ke pratyek pul ka navsrijan karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan jeevan ke pratyek pul ka navsrijan karta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Aakar ki drishti se hur pul parivartan hai jabki astitv ki drishti se koi parivartan nahi,bus mai vahi hun.ye hi atmgyan hai.
messages.fullText:
Aakar ki drishti se hur pul parivartan hai jabki astitv ki drishti se koi parivartan nahi,bus mai vahi hun.ye hi atmgyan hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan rah ki mridulta akmatr atmbodh me hi samahit hai,anya kisi aur me nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan rah ki mridulta akmatr atmbodh me hi samahit hai,anya kisi aur me nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki visham se visham gutthii ko suljhane me akmatr adhyatm hi sahayak hai,kuchh bhi aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki visham se visham gutthii ko suljhane me akmatr adhyatm hi sahayak hai,kuchh bhi aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charan pradat gyan hi akmatr hume hamari nijta ka parichay deta hai,koi aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Guru charan pradat gyan hi akmatr hume hamari nijta ka parichay deta hai,koi aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki bhor,stithi,saanjh bus aur bus guru ke sarthak,divya v mridul vicharon me doobi rahe.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki bhor,stithi,saanjh bus aur bus guru ke sarthak,divya v mridul vicharon me doobi rahe.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya jeevan akmatr aur akmatr parmarth sidhii ke liye hi mila hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya jeevan akmatr aur akmatr parmarth sidhii ke liye hi mila hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamari sanskriti avam sanskar hi akmatr hume jeevan moolyon per adig rakhte hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamari sanskriti avam sanskar hi akmatr hume jeevan moolyon per adig rakhte hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki sarthakta iske pratyek paripeksh me akmatr atmsanyaman per hi adharit hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki sarthakta iske pratyek paripeksh me akmatr atmsanyaman per hi adharit hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmikta sadguno ki Khan hai,ateh hamara jeevan adhyatmik bun sake, kucchh aise prayas rahen.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmikta sadguno ki Khan hai,ateh hamara jeevan adhyatmik bun sake, kucchh aise prayas rahen.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Atm nirikshan,atm avlokan hamare antergat ke iishvareey subul avam soundarya ko udhghatit karta hai,hume bhaybheet nahi karta.
messages.fullText:
Atm nirikshan,atm avlokan hamare antergat ke iishvareey subul avam soundarya ko udhghatit karta hai,hume bhaybheet nahi karta.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki rahon ka madhurya akmatr adhyatmik dagar per chalte rehne per hi mehsuus kiya ja sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki rahon ka madhurya akmatr adhyatmik dagar per chalte rehne per hi mehsuus kiya ja sakta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Behte  jeevan ka bus ak chor pakad use lagker sudharlen, poora jeevan hi sanvar jayega.
messages.fullText:
Behte  jeevan ka bus ak chor pakad use lagker sudharlen, poora jeevan hi sanvar jayega.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki saanchhi samajh kholne me akmatr aur akmatr gurucharan sharan hi sahayak hai,kucchh bhi aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki saanchhi samajh kholne me akmatr aur akmatr gurucharan sharan hi sahayak hai,kucchh bhi aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik jagrukta avam vinaysheelta ak duusre ke poorak hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik jagrukta avam vinaysheelta ak duusre ke poorak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka hur sthayee samadhan akmatr adhyatmik galiyaron me hi mil sakta hai,kisi aur jagah nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka hur sthayee samadhan akmatr adhyatmik galiyaron me hi mil sakta hai,kisi aur jagah nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Mun ka sthayee samadhan pa lena hi jeevan ka sarvocchh udyog hai,jo akmatr kripamayee tatv hai.
messages.fullText:
Mun ka sthayee samadhan pa lena hi jeevan ka sarvocchh udyog hai,jo akmatr kripamayee tatv hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare samast bhramon ka nivaran akmatr atmgyan me samahit hai,sansar ki bhatkano me nahi.
messages.fullText:
Hamare samast bhramon ka nivaran akmatr atmgyan me samahit hai,sansar ki bhatkano me nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik jeevan me sarv ke prati sadbhavnaon,shubh kamnaon,sarvmanglikta ka ankuran  hota chalta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik jeevan me sarv ke prati sadbhavnaon,shubh kamnaon,sarvmanglikta ka ankuran  hota chalta hai.
