Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Svayam ke prati puuri puuri javabdehi rakhna sarvocchh dharm suutron me agraneey hai.
messages.fullText:
Svayam ke prati puuri puuri javabdehi rakhna sarvocchh dharm suutron me agraneey hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hum sub apni sundertam bhavnaon se iss amulya jeevan ko hur pul shringharit karte chalen,isime jeevan ki sarthakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Hum sub apni sundertam bhavnaon se iss amulya jeevan ko hur pul shringharit karte chalen,isime jeevan ki sarthakta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke pratyek mod per guru pradat atmik gyan hi akmatr sahayak hota hai,kucchh bhi aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke pratyek mod per guru pradat atmik gyan hi akmatr sahayak hota hai,kucchh bhi aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik gyan ki sarvocchhta,sarvmayta avam sarvprabhuta akmatr guru kripa svaruup hi samajh aa pati hai,mun, budhii ke sahare nahi.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik gyan ki sarvocchhta,sarvmayta avam sarvprabhuta akmatr guru kripa svaruup hi samajh aa pati hai,mun, budhii ke sahare nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charno ke prati , shradhha ruup savan ki rim jhim se mera antas sadaiv adr rahe,aisi hum sabhiki svakalyan hetu bhavna satat prajvalit rahe.
messages.fullText:
Guru charno ke prati , shradhha ruup savan ki rim jhim se mera antas sadaiv adr rahe,aisi hum sabhiki svakalyan hetu bhavna satat prajvalit rahe.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jaate hue varsh ki divyatam samvednaon, shikshaon avam madhurtam anubhutiyon ke mool,shree guru charno me vinamr pranam.
messages.fullText:
Jaate hue varsh ki divyatam samvednaon, shikshaon avam madhurtam anubhutiyon ke mool,shree guru charno me vinamr pranam.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Vivek manushya jeevan ki amulya nidhi hai,jo vastav me atmgyan ke bagair supt avastha me hi rehta hai.
messages.fullText:
Vivek manushya jeevan ki amulya nidhi hai,jo vastav me atmgyan ke bagair supt avastha me hi rehta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adarshyukt jeevan sanyaman me lata hai,jabi adarshviheen udandata me.
messages.fullText:
Adarshyukt jeevan sanyaman me lata hai,jabi adarshviheen udandata me.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Karm hi iss shrishti ka beej hai,ateh sabhika jeevan apne apne beeje hue karm anusar hota hai.ye gyan hi sajagta hai.
messages.fullText:
Karm hi iss shrishti ka beej hai,ateh sabhika jeevan apne apne beeje hue karm anusar hota hai.ye gyan hi sajagta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru dwar ashrey hi akmatr jeevan ko hur baat ka utter dene me paripurn hai,sansar ki koi bhi cheej nahi.
messages.fullText:
Guru dwar ashrey hi akmatr jeevan ko hur baat ka utter dene me paripurn hai,sansar ki koi bhi cheej nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik dhara hi akmatr jeevan ki shushkata ko madhur ras deker amritmay banane me sarvsamarth hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik dhara hi akmatr jeevan ki shushkata ko madhur ras deker amritmay banane me sarvsamarth hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru,sant,mahatmano,vigya purushon ki sannidhi ke alokik  madhurtam parivesh ko adhyatmik jeevan hone per hi anubhut kiya ja sakta hai,anyatha nahi.
messages.fullText:
Guru,sant,mahatmano,vigya purushon ki sannidhi ke alokik  madhurtam parivesh ko adhyatmik jeevan hone per hi anubhut kiya ja sakta hai,anyatha nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Apni jhuthii ahmanyata se uuper uth satya me avasthit hote chalna hi satsang hai.
messages.fullText:
Apni jhuthii ahmanyata se uuper uth satya me avasthit hote chalna hi satsang hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Apne hi bheeter satya anveshna ka vardan hi satguru kripa hai.
Hari  sharnam.
messages.fullText:
Apne hi bheeter satya anveshna ka vardan hi satguru kripa hai.
Hari  sharnam.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna ki akmatr fulshruti hai,svayam  ko paa jana.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna ki akmatr fulshruti hai,svayam  ko paa jana.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Achran ki sadacharita jeevan ka bahut bada subul hai.
messages.fullText:
Achran ki sadacharita jeevan ka bahut bada subul hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Nirabhimanta bahut badi sadhna hai,jo akmatr guru ki charan sharanta me hi dhire dhire falit hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Nirabhimanta bahut badi sadhna hai,jo akmatr guru ki charan sharanta me hi dhire dhire falit hoti hai.
Hari om.

messages.text:
Jeevan  ka arohan hi saanchhi utsavdharmita hai.
Makar sankranti ki shubh kamnayen.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan  ka arohan hi saanchhi utsavdharmita hai.
Makar sankranti ki shubh kamnayen.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya jeevan hi akmatr svautthan ka achhook avsar hai,kucchh aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Manushya jeevan hi akmatr svautthan ka achhook avsar hai,kucchh aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya jeevan ki yatra ka antim charan dhyey iishvar ruup hi ho jana hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya jeevan ki yatra ka antim charan dhyey iishvar ruup hi ho jana hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Kaise ho,beta.
Satsang me nahi aa rahe ho,kya baat hai.sub theek to hai.
messages.fullText:
Kaise ho,beta.
Satsang me nahi aa rahe ho,kya baat hai.sub theek to hai.
Hari om.

messages.text:
Theek kiya,beta. 
Take care.
messages.fullText:
Theek kiya,beta. 
Take care.
Hari om.

messages.text: Atmbodh ka abhav hi akmatr jeevan ke bhram,bhatkan,bhrantiyan hai,ateh hamare prayas shant,sehaj,svabhavik rehne ke liye iss aur bhi hone bahut avashyak hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmbodh ka abhav hi akmatr jeevan ke bhram,bhatkan,bhrantiyan hai,ateh hamare prayas shant,sehaj,svabhavik rehne ke liye iss aur bhi hone bahut avashyak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan dhara adhyatmik rang me rach bas jaye,isse sundertam kucchh aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan dhara adhyatmik rang me rach bas jaye,isse sundertam kucchh aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm hi akmatr manushya jeevan ke saanche murm ko prakashit ker pane me sarvsamarth hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm hi akmatr manushya jeevan ke saanche murm ko prakashit ker pane me sarvsamarth hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satya ki labdhata sansarik akarshano ko tucchh bana deti hai,fir apna samay vahan vyarth na ker yatharthta ki aur loutne lagta hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya ki labdhata sansarik akarshano ko tucchh bana deti hai,fir apna samay vahan vyarth na ker yatharthta ki aur loutne lagta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke prashno ko saanche utter akmatr adhyatmik dagar per satat chalte hue hi mil pate hai ,ise hi iish kripa kehte hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke prashno ko saanche utter akmatr adhyatmik dagar per satat chalte hue hi mil pate hai ,ise hi iish kripa kehte hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Ahankar  kabhi bhi kisika siddhh nahi hota, jabki vinaysheelta ki siddhhi puurn ruup se sambhav hai.
messages.fullText:
Ahankar  kabhi bhi kisika siddhh nahi hota, jabki vinaysheelta ki siddhhi puurn ruup se sambhav hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charan sharan ka prabhav hi hume dhairya,sehansheelta ,sarvmanglik bhav ke divyatam prakash me aasin ker sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru charan sharan ka prabhav hi hume dhairya,sehansheelta ,sarvmanglik bhav ke divyatam prakash me aasin ker sakta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna ki sidhhta svayam ko sarvatr labdh kara deti hai,sab kuchh mai hi to hun.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna ki sidhhta svayam ko sarvatr labdh kara deti hai,sab kuchh mai hi to hun.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Bhajan jeevan ko jeene ki,bhogne ki saanchhi vidha sikhata hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhajan jeevan ko jeene ki,bhogne ki saanchhi vidha sikhata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke rangon me samanvay se hi iska soundarya khil uthta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke rangon me samanvay se hi iska soundarya khil uthta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ki saanchhi sanjeevani hai,kucchh aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ki saanchhi sanjeevani hai,kucchh aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamari socchh me hur pul sabke hit ka bhav rahe,ye hi saanchhi upasna hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamari socchh me hur pul sabke hit ka bhav rahe,ye hi saanchhi upasna hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Adhyatmik suvass hi jeevan ko utsavdharmita pradan karne me akmatr hetu hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik suvass hi jeevan ko utsavdharmita pradan karne me akmatr hetu hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik gyan hi jeevan ko asal samridhii pradan karta hai ,kyonki yeh iishvar aur apni akatmata ka vishay hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik gyan hi jeevan ko asal samridhii pradan karta hai ,kyonki yeh iishvar aur apni akatmata ka vishay hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki gehanta ke mantr akmatr sadguru sannidhi me hi labhya hai,kahin aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki gehanta ke mantr akmatr sadguru sannidhi me hi labhya hai,kahin aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ko saanchhi vidya milti hai akmatr guru charan sharan pane ke baad.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ko saanchhi vidya milti hai akmatr guru charan sharan pane ke baad.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare svabhav ka mool hai,anand v shanti ,bus hum isime reh saken.
messages.fullText:
Hamare svabhav ka mool hai,anand v shanti ,bus hum isime reh saken.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki suvasita akmatr aur akmatr adhyatmik dagar per satat chalte rehne me hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki suvasita akmatr aur akmatr adhyatmik dagar per satat chalte rehne me hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan me saanche adarsh ka agman hi akmatr iska sundertam Basant  hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me saanche adarsh ka agman hi akmatr iska sundertam Basant  hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Sub kripa hai, beta.
Jaldi hi baithenge satsang ke liye.
messages.fullText:
Sub kripa hai, beta.
Jaldi hi baithenge satsang ke liye.
Hari om.

messages.text: Astha ki prachandata hi hamare bheeter sweekriti paida ker pati hai.
messages.fullText:
Astha ki prachandata hi hamare bheeter sweekriti paida ker pati hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Guru,sant mahatmano ke shree vachano ke prati grahya budhii badi kripa se hi nirmit hoti hai.
Hari  sharnam.
messages.fullText:
Guru,sant mahatmano ke shree vachano ke prati grahya budhii badi kripa se hi nirmit hoti hai.
Hari  sharnam.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan dhara me bus apna poora poora samarpan udelte chalen,khevanhar avashya par utarega.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan dhara me bus apna poora poora samarpan udelte chalen,khevanhar avashya par utarega.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan marg ka prashastikaran karne me sacchhe adarsh ki hi akmatr aham bhumika hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan marg ka prashastikaran karne me sacchhe adarsh ki hi akmatr aham bhumika hoti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Deh pinjar ki asakti se badh ker aur koi avidya nahi,ateh jeevan me satarkata ka satatya bana rahe.
messages.fullText:
Deh pinjar ki asakti se badh ker aur koi avidya nahi,ateh jeevan me satarkata ka satatya bana rahe.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna ki anavratta ie liye apne aahar v sang ke prati bahut choukas rahen.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna ki anavratta ie liye apne aahar v sang ke prati bahut choukas rahen.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Abhyas aur vairagya ka satatya saath saath chalna chahiye,ak sadhak ke jeevan me.
messages.fullText:
Abhyas aur vairagya ka satatya saath saath chalna chahiye,ak sadhak ke jeevan me.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhak ko mun karm v vachan se ak rehne ka prayas karte rehna chahiye,sadhna me tabhi bul aata hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhak ko mun karm v vachan se ak rehne ka prayas karte rehna chahiye,sadhna me tabhi bul aata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Hamare hi bheeter ka snehan hamare antehpur ko sanvedansheel banata hai.
Hari  sharnam.
messages.fullText:
Hamare hi bheeter ka snehan hamare antehpur ko sanvedansheel banata hai.
Hari  sharnam.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Manush Jeevan ke saanche arthon ko pragat ker pane me akmatr guru kripa hi hetu hai.
messages.fullText:
Manush Jeevan ke saanche arthon ko pragat ker pane me akmatr guru kripa hi hetu hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa se hi jeevan ke sunehre pulon ka udbhav hota hai,anyatha avidya ki kalima se hi yeh anmol jeevan ghira reh jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa se hi jeevan ke sunehre pulon ka udbhav hota hai,anyatha avidya ki kalima se hi yeh anmol jeevan ghira reh jata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan- maran,labh hani,sukh dukh sub kucchh shree narayan hai,aisa bhav bun pana sadguru kripa ke uprant deergh kalik sadhna ke satatya se hi akmatr sambhav hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan- maran,labh hani,sukh dukh sub kucchh shree narayan hai,aisa bhav bun pana sadguru kripa ke uprant deergh kalik sadhna ke satatya se hi akmatr sambhav hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Iss charachar me sub kucchh iishvar se aaya hai,usise poshit horaha hai aur usime lay ho jata hai ateh sub kucchh iishvar hi hai.
messages.fullText:
Iss charachar me sub kucchh iishvar se aaya hai,usise poshit horaha hai aur usime lay ho jata hai ateh sub kucchh iishvar hi hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka vishuddh saanchapan akmatr sadguru kripa se adhyatmik dwar khulne per hi milta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka vishuddh saanchapan akmatr sadguru kripa se adhyatmik dwar khulne per hi milta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm ki saanchhi samajh hi akmatr atmbodh ka dwar khol pati hai,jo akmatr gurukripa se itar kucchh aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm ki saanchhi samajh hi akmatr atmbodh ka dwar khol pati hai,jo akmatr gurukripa se itar kucchh aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka safar adhyatmik fuhaaron se satat bheegte rehne per hi sheetal reh pata hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka safar adhyatmik fuhaaron se satat bheegte rehne per hi sheetal reh pata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Parinam ki chintayen satkarmon ke abhav me hi rehti hai,anyatha nahi.
messages.fullText:
Parinam ki chintayen satkarmon ke abhav me hi rehti hai,anyatha nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Apne iisht ki ramanta amrit ka sraav karti hai jabki sansar ki ramanta  sadhak ke liye vishatmak hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne iisht ki ramanta amrit ka sraav karti hai jabki sansar ki ramanta  sadhak ke liye vishatmak hoti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Atm anusandhan hi akmatr jeevan ka mool dhyey hai,iss prakash se hi disha aur dasha sudharti hai.
Hari  sharnam.
messages.fullText:
Atm anusandhan hi akmatr jeevan ka mool dhyey hai,iss prakash se hi disha aur dasha sudharti hai.
Hari  sharnam.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Prakritisth purush hi jeevan me anandit reh sakta hai,isse duuri vikriti  paida karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Prakritisth purush hi jeevan me anandit reh sakta hai,isse duuri vikriti  paida karti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamara sang saath hamare jeevan ka mook parichayak hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamara sang saath hamare jeevan ka mook parichayak hota hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamara agyan, moodhta,alasya hi hume apne aap se milne nahi deta.
messages.fullText:
Hamara agyan, moodhta,alasya hi hume apne aap se milne nahi deta.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Bhagvan ki satta anantata ki prateek hai.
Mahashivratri ki anant shubh kamnayen.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan ki satta anantata ki prateek hai.
Mahashivratri ki anant shubh kamnayen.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvateey aadhar se badhker kucchh bhi aur nahi,shesh sub bhranti hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvateey aadhar se badhker kucchh bhi aur nahi,shesh sub bhranti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Astha ki prachandata hi akmatr svikriti ke putt kholti hai.
Hari  sharnam.
messages.fullText:
Astha ki prachandata hi akmatr svikriti ke putt kholti hai.
Hari  sharnam.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm jeevan ki veh sabal lathi hai jiske sahare bhishan se bhishan pagdandiyon se paar hua ja sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm jeevan ki veh sabal lathi hai jiske sahare bhishan se bhishan pagdandiyon se paar hua ja sakta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sharnagati bhagvateey bul ki pradhanta se hoti hai,svayam ke karne se nahi.
messages.fullText:
Sharnagati bhagvateey bul ki pradhanta se hoti hai,svayam ke karne se nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa hamare jeevan ki daud ko Hari charno ki aur rookh kara deti hai,sansar ki aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa hamare jeevan ki daud ko Hari charno ki aur rookh kara deti hai,sansar ki aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki dhoop chhanv ka astitv akmatr iishvar ki chaitanyata se hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki dhoop chhanv ka astitv akmatr iishvar ki chaitanyata se hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hum sabki daud anand ki aur hai,per vo sansarik vishayon me nahi hai,ateh hur duniyavee prapt cheej ke sukh ka basipun hume fir andhi daud me bhatakne ke liye majboor kiye rehta hai.isiliye adhyatm jeevan ki avashyakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Hum sabki daud anand ki aur hai,per vo sansarik vishayon me nahi hai,ateh hur duniyavee prapt cheej ke sukh ka basipun hume fir andhi daud me bhatakne ke liye majboor kiye rehta hai.isiliye adhyatm jeevan ki avashyakta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhak ke jeevan sarthakta me satsang ke avlamban ke saath abhyas avam vairagya ka satatya param avashyak hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhak ke jeevan sarthakta me satsang ke avlamban ke saath abhyas avam vairagya ka satatya param avashyak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sacchhe guru ka agman hamare jeevan ke mayno ka sundertam ruupantaran ker deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Sacchhe guru ka agman hamare jeevan ke mayno ka sundertam ruupantaran ker deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa ki vatsalyamayee, madhur,karunamayee pushpanjali ko hamara satat samarpan bana rahe.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa ki vatsalyamayee, madhur,karunamayee pushpanjali ko hamara satat samarpan bana rahe.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ka sampoorn darshan karvane me sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm hi akmatr jeevan ka sampoorn darshan karvane me sahayak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satguru sannidhi ka bul jeevan unnayan ki uddan me pul pul sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Satguru sannidhi ka bul jeevan unnayan ki uddan me pul pul sahayak hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru sannidhi jeevan marg ka satat saralikaran karti jati hai,duvidhayen nahi rehne deti.
messages.fullText:
Guru sannidhi jeevan marg ka satat saralikaran karti jati hai,duvidhayen nahi rehne deti.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki satyata ka bodh hi hume nishchintata dene me sarvsamarth  hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki satyata ka bodh hi hume nishchintata dene me sarvsamarth  hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki divya sambhavnayen akmatr guru charan sharan reh ker hi udhghatit ho pati hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki divya sambhavnayen akmatr guru charan sharan reh ker hi udhghatit ho pati hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Svayam me vapis laut tik jana hi jeevan ki akmatr jeet hai,anyatha page page har hi hai.
messages.fullText:
Svayam me vapis laut tik jana hi jeevan ki akmatr jeet hai,anyatha page page har hi hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Saptrangi prakriti ka pratyek avyav hume apne antas ki aur loutne ki shan shan satat prerna deta rehta hai ,bus hum samajh saken.
Holi ke parv ki anant shubh kamnayen.
messages.fullText:
Saptrangi prakriti ka pratyek avyav hume apne antas ki aur loutne ki shan shan satat prerna deta rehta hai ,bus hum samajh saken.
Holi ke parv ki anant shubh kamnayen.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm ka naikatya jeevan ko prasadik ker deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Dharm ka naikatya jeevan ko prasadik ker deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Hamari atma hi akmatr paripurntam tatv hai,agyantavash hum mun ke chakkar me funs bhramit hote rehte hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamari atma hi akmatr paripurntam tatv hai,agyantavash hum mun ke chakkar me funs bhramit hote rehte hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan me parivartan mayavi nartan hai,succhh kucchh bhi nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me parivartan mayavi nartan hai,succhh kucchh bhi nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Apne jeevan me kalyan aur mangal ke deep satat prajvalit kiye aage badhte jayen.
messages.fullText:
Apne jeevan me kalyan aur mangal ke deep satat prajvalit kiye aage badhte jayen.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Divya santon ki katha kal saat dino ki divine ritu hoti hai,jo apna gehan prabhav anant kal ke liye hamare antas me chod jati hai.
messages.fullText:
Divya santon ki katha kal saat dino ki divine ritu hoti hai,jo apna gehan prabhav anant kal ke liye hamare antas me chod jati hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhak ka sunder mun ,nibhrant budhii avam sthir chit rehna chahiye.iska sukh ati ati pavas hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhak ka sunder mun ,nibhrant budhii avam sthir chit rehna chahiye.iska sukh ati ati pavas hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki haritima akmatr adhyatm me  vaas  karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki haritima akmatr adhyatm me  vaas  karti hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik dor hi akmatr jeevan ki saanchhi tham hai,kucchh aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik dor hi akmatr jeevan ki saanchhi tham hai,kucchh aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki sarthak puunji bus aur bus yeh vartman pul hai,kul naam ki koi cheej nahi kyonki ak beet chuka aur ak agyat hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki sarthak puunji bus aur bus yeh vartman pul hai,kul naam ki koi cheej nahi kyonki ak beet chuka aur ak agyat hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan parikrama ke antim charan se pehle hi hum vishranti paa len,sadhak ke kucchh aise hi prayas rehne chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan parikrama ke antim charan se pehle hi hum vishranti paa len,sadhak ke kucchh aise hi prayas rehne chahiye.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa ki nirali,anupam,advitya jhoom ko shat shat naman ker aage hi aage badhte rahen.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa ki nirali,anupam,advitya jhoom ko shat shat naman ker aage hi aage badhte rahen.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan me adhyatmikta hi akmatr iska sarvasv hai,anya kucchh bhi aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me adhyatmikta hi akmatr iska sarvasv hai,anya kucchh bhi aur nahi.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jagat nahi ,hai hi jagdish. Jeevan me iish kripa se hi akmatr iss sunehlepun ko anubhut kiya ja sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jagat nahi ,hai hi jagdish. Jeevan me iish kripa se hi akmatr iss sunehlepun ko anubhut kiya ja sakta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Mun ki pavasta ka sukh alokik hai,jo akmatr guru kripa se hi anubhut ho pata hai.
messages.fullText:
Mun ki pavasta ka sukh alokik hai,jo akmatr guru kripa se hi anubhut ho pata hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Guru vachan hamare bheeter sakaratmak vaicharik andolan  ker dete hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru vachan hamare bheeter sakaratmak vaicharik andolan  ker dete hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang me beete shan hi akmatr jeevan sarthakta ki aur hume jagrit karte hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang me beete shan hi akmatr jeevan sarthakta ki aur hume jagrit karte hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke sangharshon ko atmgyan upasna bana deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke sangharshon ko atmgyan upasna bana deta hai.
Hari sharnam.

messages.text:
Guru kripa kevalam...,
Bahut sudertam....
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa kevalam...,
Bahut sudertam....
Hari om.

messages.text: Apne hone ke arth ko siddhh ker lena,use prapt ho jana hi jeevan ki safalta hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne hone ke arth ko siddhh ker lena,use prapt ho jana hi jeevan ki safalta hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Guru pradat marg per chal ker hi jeevan ki sarthakta ko  labdh hua jaa sakta hai,anyatr koi marg nahi.
messages.fullText:
Guru pradat marg per chal ker hi jeevan ki sarthakta ko  labdh hua jaa sakta hai,anyatr koi marg nahi.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charanta sharanta hi akmatr sarvocchh kripamayee shiksha deeksha hai,anyatr kucchh bhi nahi.
messages.fullText:
Guru charanta sharanta hi akmatr sarvocchh kripamayee shiksha deeksha hai,anyatr kucchh bhi nahi.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Hamara hur thought, vachan aur karm sampurn charachar ke hit me ho.
messages.fullText:
Hamara hur thought, vachan aur karm sampurn charachar ke hit me ho.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Satya shravan se bhay,bhram,bhranti ka nivaran hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya shravan se bhay,bhram,bhranti ka nivaran hota hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan hume sabke beech rehte hue sabse nyara hoker rehne ki vidha sikhata hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan hume sabke beech rehte hue sabse nyara hoker rehne ki vidha sikhata hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang ki niranterta ahankar ka nirmulan ker pavitr antehkaran ki nirmati me sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang ki niranterta ahankar ka nirmulan ker pavitr antehkaran ki nirmati me sahayak hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna ki chaitanyata utroter badhti chalni chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna ki chaitanyata utroter badhti chalni chahiye.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Satya ka sang milne per hi hume hamari khoyee smriti apne svayam ki vapis milti hai,jo jeevan ko saanchhi svasthta deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya ka sang milne per hi hume hamari khoyee smriti apne svayam ki vapis milti hai,jo jeevan ko saanchhi svasthta deti hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Vedant hume sarvatr samanvay ki vidha sikhata hai.
messages.fullText:
Vedant hume sarvatr samanvay ki vidha sikhata hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang adhyatm path pradarshak avam jeevan siddhi ka sehaj marg hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang adhyatm path pradarshak avam jeevan siddhi ka sehaj marg hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Guru vachano ke prati poorn shradhha hi ise jeevant rakhti hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru vachano ke prati poorn shradhha hi ise jeevant rakhti hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text:
Manushya  bus manushya bun sake,isse badhker koi upadhi nahi.
Satya  sharnam.
messages.fullText:
Manushya  bus manushya bun sake,isse badhker koi upadhi nahi.
Satya  sharnam.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Sansar ke kisi bhi sandarbh me deal karne ke liye hume adhyatmik urja ki hi avashyakta hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Sansar ke kisi bhi sandarbh me deal karne ke liye hume adhyatmik urja ki hi avashyakta hoti hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Kritagyata ke pratham svar akmatr apne guru ke liye hote hai.
messages.fullText:
Kritagyata ke pratham svar akmatr apne guru ke liye hote hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka pramukh dhyey Satya arjan hi hona chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka pramukh dhyey Satya arjan hi hona chahiye.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Apne munn ko sahi samajh dene ke liye atmagyan ki strength chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Apne munn ko sahi samajh dene ke liye atmagyan ki strength chahiye.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang aur svadhyay pavitr antehkaran ki nirmati me satat hetu hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang aur svadhyay pavitr antehkaran ki nirmati me satat hetu hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Guru shishya ke bheeter udyamta ka bhav jagrit karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru shishya ke bheeter udyamta ka bhav jagrit karta hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan me akmatr iishvar alamban hi rehna chahiye,ve hi sub kucchh hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me akmatr iishvar alamban hi rehna chahiye,ve hi sub kucchh hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Saanchhi safalta atma ki qualities me hi samahit hai.
messages.fullText:
Saanchhi safalta atma ki qualities me hi samahit hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Vairagya parinam ke Satya ko samajhne me hetu hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Vairagya parinam ke Satya ko samajhne me hetu hota hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Kamnaon ke abhav me hi Parmatma ka pradurbhav hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Kamnaon ke abhav me hi Parmatma ka pradurbhav hota hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Apne pichle pul se agle pul me shikshit ho behter hote chalen.
messages.fullText:
Apne pichle pul se agle pul me shikshit ho behter hote chalen.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Satya ki jigyasa satguru,sant,mahatmaon ko shradhha purvak sun ker hi santusht ho pati hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya ki jigyasa satguru,sant,mahatmaon ko shradhha purvak sun ker hi santusht ho pati hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Asal acharya vahi hai,jahan achran ki pardarshita ho.
messages.fullText:
Asal acharya vahi hai,jahan achran ki pardarshita ho.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Sacche guru ki sannidhi me sehaj ruup se anter parishkrit,rupantarit hue chalta hai.
messages.fullText:
Sacche guru ki sannidhi me sehaj ruup se anter parishkrit,rupantarit hue chalta hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna ke adhikari bhed se hi Bhagvat anubhuti hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna ke adhikari bhed se hi Bhagvat anubhuti hoti hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Hamara hur thought,hur vachan aur karm sampurn charachar ke hur jeev ko pavitrata,shanti,prem dene vala ho,ye hi jeevan ka sarvocchh yagya hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamara hur thought,hur vachan aur karm sampurn charachar ke hur jeev ko pavitrata,shanti,prem dene vala ho,ye hi jeevan ka sarvocchh yagya hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Sarvopari dharm hai,svayam ki real strength ko samajhna aur usme satat tike rehne ka abhyas, tabhi hum apne aas pas ko bhi sabalta ke hi spandan de payenge.
messages.fullText:
Sarvopari dharm hai,svayam ki real strength ko samajhna aur usme satat tike rehne ka abhyas, tabhi hum apne aas pas ko bhi sabalta ke hi spandan de payenge.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Saanchhi samajh se pehle paripurn ho jao,fir Jo bhi karoge vo sub sadhna bun jayegi.
messages.fullText:
Saanchhi samajh se pehle paripurn ho jao,fir Jo bhi karoge vo sub sadhna bun jayegi.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya vichar ka upasak hai,ateh vicharsheel rahen.
messages.fullText:
Manushya vichar ka upasak hai,ateh vicharsheel rahen.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Guru vachan vo darpan hai, jo hume satat sudharne sanvarne ke liye prerit karte hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru vachan vo darpan hai, jo hume satat sudharne sanvarne ke liye prerit karte hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Sant,Mahatma,Gurujan prerna purush hote hai,bus hum unse satat seekhte chalen.
messages.fullText:
Sant,Mahatma,Gurujan prerna purush hote hai,bus hum unse satat seekhte chalen.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hume svabodh me la svayam ki hi upasna me le aate hai,jisme jadta ke liye koi sthan nahi hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hume svabodh me la svayam ki hi upasna me le aate hai,jisme jadta ke liye koi sthan nahi hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki utkrishtata akmatr atmbodh me hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki utkrishtata akmatr atmbodh me hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik sadhan hamara svabhav bun Jaye,ye hi saancchi sadhna hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik sadhan hamara svabhav bun Jaye,ye hi saancchi sadhna hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Apne asal svarup ke sadguno ka sehaj ruup se sampurn çharachar me sancharan hone den,yeh hur manushya ruup jeev ka sarvpratham dharm hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne asal svarup ke sadguno ka sehaj ruup se sampurn çharachar me sancharan hone den,yeh hur manushya ruup jeev ka sarvpratham dharm hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke unnayan ke liye guru vachno ko satat aatmsat karte chalna param avashyak hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke unnayan ke liye guru vachno ko satat aatmsat karte chalna param avashyak hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Atm urja sabse badi urja hai,ye hi jeevan shakti hai.
messages.fullText:
Atm urja sabse badi urja hai,ye hi jeevan shakti hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Atma Raja hai,prakriti raja ke ashrey se chalti hai.
messages.fullText:
Atma Raja hai,prakriti raja ke ashrey se chalti hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Pratyek vyakti apne apne sanskar ke accordingly hi comfortable hota hai,ateh hur ak ko veh svatantrata milni chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Pratyek vyakti apne apne sanskar ke accordingly hi comfortable hota hai,ateh hur ak ko veh svatantrata milni chahiye.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang hume sumati pradan ker atm avam anatm ki pehchan deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang hume sumati pradan ker atm avam anatm ki pehchan deta hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna ke satatya v dirghkalikta ka kabhi bhi vismaran na ho.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna ke satatya v dirghkalikta ka kabhi bhi vismaran na ho.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Ahankar hamari shakti ko dhvast ker deta hai,ateh akmatr Bhagvat charno ke ashrey ka satatya bana rahe.
messages.fullText:
Ahankar hamari shakti ko dhvast ker deta hai,ateh akmatr Bhagvat charno ke ashrey ka satatya bana rahe.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Satya svaruup vibhuti ka akarshan atmik prem hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya svaruup vibhuti ka akarshan atmik prem hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya jeevan gaurav anubhuti ke liye hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya jeevan gaurav anubhuti ke liye hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Hum hur cheej me Karan ki khoj karte hai,to manushya jeevan pane ka bhi sarvocchh Karan dhundhne ka prayas kyon nahi karte.
messages.fullText:
Hum hur cheej me Karan ki khoj karte hai,to manushya jeevan pane ka bhi sarvocchh Karan dhundhne ka prayas kyon nahi karte.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm hamare jeevan ko secure karta hai,iss lok me bhi aur isse aage bhi.
messages.fullText:
Dharm hamare jeevan ko secure karta hai,iss lok me bhi aur isse aage bhi.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang jeevan ki durlabhtam vibhuti hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang jeevan ki durlabhtam vibhuti hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka pramukh dhyey Satya arjan hi hona chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka pramukh dhyey Satya arjan hi hona chahiye.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Hamara hur thought,vachan aur karm sampurn charachar ke hur jeev ko yatharth se jodne vala ho.
messages.fullText:
Hamara hur thought,vachan aur karm sampurn charachar ke hur jeev ko yatharth se jodne vala ho.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna hamara jeevan,svabhav,dharna avam charitr bun Jaye.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna hamara jeevan,svabhav,dharna avam charitr bun Jaye.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text:
Hari om,beta.
Ghar valon ke pahunchne per hi vahan se aana.
Bahut bahut shukrane hamare beton ke.
messages.fullText:
Hari om,beta.
Ghar valon ke pahunchne per hi vahan se aana.
Bahut bahut shukrane hamare beton ke.
Hari om.

messages.text:
Kripa hai,beta.
Anant shukrane hamare bachhon ke.
messages.fullText:
Kripa hai,beta.
Anant shukrane hamare bachhon ke.
Hari om.

messages.text: Chintan me Iishvar ke aate hi apna sthan dhamm,tirth ho jayega.
messages.fullText:
Chintan me Iishvar ke aate hi apna sthan dhamm,tirth ho jayega.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm ke aate hi jeevan me tamam ashdayen,kamnayen,vasnayen niyantrit ho jayengi.
messages.fullText:
Dharm ke aate hi jeevan me tamam ashdayen,kamnayen,vasnayen niyantrit ho jayengi.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Hum aavahan avam visarjan ke upasak hai,ateh Ishvar ki di huyee pratyek cheej vandaneey hai.
messages.fullText:
Hum aavahan avam visarjan ke upasak hai,ateh Ishvar ki di huyee pratyek cheej vandaneey hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Mujhe merepun ka parichay akmatr Sadguru se milta hai.
messages.fullText:
Mujhe merepun ka parichay akmatr Sadguru se milta hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Apeksharahit Mahapurush hi guru ho sakte hai,anya nahi.
messages.fullText:
Apeksharahit Mahapurush hi guru ho sakte hai,anya nahi.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya deh anantata ke arjan ke liye ak durlabhtam avsar hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya deh anantata ke arjan ke liye ak durlabhtam avsar hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhak ke jeevan me samay ,arth ka anushasan param avashyak hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhak ke jeevan me samay ,arth ka anushasan param avashyak hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvan ke haath ka upkaran matr bun Jane se ahankar vileen hota jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan ke haath ka upkaran matr bun Jane se ahankar vileen hota jata hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke prati dhanyata ka bodh akmatr adhyatmik sadhana se aata hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke prati dhanyata ka bodh akmatr adhyatmik sadhana se aata hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan satat utthan ka naam hai,patan ka nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan satat utthan ka naam hai,patan ka nahi.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik sampada se badh ker kucchh bhi nahi.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik sampada se badh ker kucchh bhi nahi.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Pratyek dharm hume apne mool sanskar ki aur loutne ki hi prerna deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Pratyek dharm hume apne mool sanskar ki aur loutne ki hi prerna deta hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Apne hone ke arth ko siddhh ker lena hi manushya jeevan ki sarthakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne hone ke arth ko siddhh ker lena hi manushya jeevan ki sarthakta hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan tyag aur vairagya ke saath vyateet karte hue apne anter aur bahar ko sundertam banate chalen.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan tyag aur vairagya ke saath vyateet karte hue apne anter aur bahar ko sundertam banate chalen.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare vichar ke bikhrav se arajakta avam achran ka dushan hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamare vichar ke bikhrav se arajakta avam achran ka dushan hota hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Anugreh ki chaya me satat jeena akmatr Sadguru kripa ke anugreh se hi sambhav hai.
messages.fullText:
Anugreh ki chaya me satat jeena akmatr Sadguru kripa ke anugreh se hi sambhav hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Sacche guru ki sannidhi sehaj ruup se hamare anter ko parishkrit karti chalti hai,basharte hum samarpit reh saken.
messages.fullText:
Sacche guru ki sannidhi sehaj ruup se hamare anter ko parishkrit karti chalti hai,basharte hum samarpit reh saken.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Shree Guru Purnima ke pavastam Mahaparv per Guru Charan Vandana karte hue sabhi ko bahut  bahut shubh kamnayen.
messages.fullText:
Shree Guru Purnima ke pavastam Mahaparv per Guru Charan Vandana karte hue sabhi ko bahut  bahut shubh kamnayen.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Maryadayen hamare satv yani mool ka sanvardhan ker hume bul deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Maryadayen hamare satv yani mool ka sanvardhan ker hume bul deti hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Gyan ke adhikari hone ke liye bhi sarvpratham antehkaran ruup bhoomi ki taiyari ki sadhna hai.
messages.fullText:
Gyan ke adhikari hone ke liye bhi sarvpratham antehkaran ruup bhoomi ki taiyari ki sadhna hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke andheron se joojhne ka samarthya akmatr guru se hi milta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke andheron se joojhne ka samarthya akmatr guru se hi milta hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Charitr ke chintan ko hi pranam hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Charitr ke chintan ko hi pranam hota hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki apurvatam ghatna hoti hai,ak jaage hue purush ka milna.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki apurvatam ghatna hoti hai,ak jaage hue purush ka milna.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang ki aur le Jane vala rasta rajpath hai,bhogi pravatiyon ko badhane vala path kupath hai .
messages.fullText:
Satsang ki aur le Jane vala rasta rajpath hai,bhogi pravatiyon ko badhane vala path kupath hai .
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan marg ke kantakon ko hatane me akmatr atmgyan hi hetu hai,anya kucchh aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan marg ke kantakon ko hatane me akmatr atmgyan hi hetu hai,anya kucchh aur nahi.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Parmatm tatv ki prapti ke liye jagrit Mahapurushon ka sang anivarya hai.
messages.fullText:
Parmatm tatv ki prapti ke liye jagrit Mahapurushon ka sang anivarya hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Svacchh,chamkili budhhi me hi atma ka pratibimb banta hai.
messages.fullText:
Svacchh,chamkili budhhi me hi atma ka pratibimb banta hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa svarup hum apni icchha shakti se apne sanskar badal sakte hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa svarup hum apni icchha shakti se apne sanskar badal sakte hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hume jeevan jeene ka vigyan sikhate hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hume jeevan jeene ka vigyan sikhate hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Sansarik sadhno ke ambar keval atripti dete hai,jabki sadhu ki sadhna use ucchhtam aasan per baithati hai.
messages.fullText:
Sansarik sadhno ke ambar keval atripti dete hai,jabki sadhu ki sadhna use ucchhtam aasan per baithati hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke hur paksh ko neeti chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke hur paksh ko neeti chahiye.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan ke bina jeevan ko kahin bhi hul nahi milne vala.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan ke bina jeevan ko kahin bhi hul nahi milne vala.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Prachand bhogvad hi jeevan ki durdasha ka karan hai.
messages.fullText:
Prachand bhogvad hi jeevan ki durdasha ka karan hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna ki rhythm satat buni rehni chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna ki rhythm satat buni rehni chahiye.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Iishvar abhi mukhta me hi sthayee soundarya v svasthya samahit hai.
messages.fullText:
Iishvar abhi mukhta me hi sthayee soundarya v svasthya samahit hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Samta vaicharik hoti hai,vyavaharik nahi .vyavahar maryadaon ke anukul hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Samta vaicharik hoti hai,vyavaharik nahi .vyavahar maryadaon ke anukul hota hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Sacchha guru apne shishya ko apne atmik garbh me dharan ker Bhagvateey samarthya ka aakar deta hai,bus shishya samarpit rahe.
messages.fullText:
Sacchha guru apne shishya ko apne atmik garbh me dharan ker Bhagvateey samarthya ka aakar deta hai,bus shishya samarpit rahe.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Budhhi ke bahut chalne se vichar me quality nahi aa pati,quantity jaroor badh jati hai.
messages.fullText:
Budhhi ke bahut chalne se vichar me quality nahi aa pati,quantity jaroor badh jati hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm ka abhav hi jeevan me dwand rakhta hai,anyatha jeevan ki kahani spasht hoti chalti hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm ka abhav hi jeevan me dwand rakhta hai,anyatha jeevan ki kahani spasht hoti chalti hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Shradhha mun budhhi ki alpagyata ko dur karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Shradhha mun budhhi ki alpagyata ko dur karti hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka pramukh dhyey Satya anveshdan hi honi chahiye,kucchh aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka pramukh dhyey Satya anveshdan hi honi chahiye,kucchh aur nahi.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang ki aur le Jane vala marg hi Rajpath hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang ki aur le Jane vala marg hi Rajpath hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna nirdosh v nishchal banati hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna nirdosh v nishchal banati hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm sampada hi jeevan me arth, Kam ko sanyat kar pane me akmatr hetu hai.
messages.fullText:
Dharm sampada hi jeevan me arth, Kam ko sanyat kar pane me akmatr hetu hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Brahmgyani ka jeevan dwar per agman hamari bigdi ko sanvar deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Brahmgyani ka jeevan dwar per agman hamari bigdi ko sanvar deta hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Mahapurushon ka agman hamare jeevan me satyug le aata hai.
messages.fullText:
Mahapurushon ka agman hamare jeevan me satyug le aata hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm hamare jeevan ko iss lok me bhi aur parlok me bhi surakshit karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Dharm hamare jeevan ko iss lok me bhi aur parlok me bhi surakshit karta hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Hum apni atma ke sadguno me rahen,sabke beech reh ker bhi sabse nyare.
messages.fullText:
Hum apni atma ke sadguno me rahen,sabke beech reh ker bhi sabse nyare.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna ki siddhi svayam ko hi labdh kera deti hai,vahan koi dusra nahi.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna ki siddhi svayam ko hi labdh kera deti hai,vahan koi dusra nahi.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Jahan Satya anveshna ki ruuchi hai,vahin sadbudhhi hai,anyatha durbudhi hi hai.
messages.fullText:
Jahan Satya anveshna ki ruuchi hai,vahin sadbudhhi hai,anyatha durbudhi hi hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Sampati ka prakar saanchha hona chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Sampati ka prakar saanchha hona chahiye.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Mujhe mere pun ka parichay akmatr Satguru deta hai,koi anya nahi.
messages.fullText:
Mujhe mere pun ka parichay akmatr Satguru deta hai,koi anya nahi.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Vedant ki taiyari ke liye shadsampati v mumuksha ka aadhar chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Vedant ki taiyari ke liye shadsampati v mumuksha ka aadhar chahiye.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm ke abhav me svayam per ankush nahi rehta,ateh jeevan satat dharmyukt rahe.
messages.fullText:
Dharm ke abhav me svayam per ankush nahi rehta,ateh jeevan satat dharmyukt rahe.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Jeev ka sanshay use sahi dekhne nahi deta,ye hi uske patan ka karan bun jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeev ka sanshay use sahi dekhne nahi deta,ye hi uske patan ka karan bun jata hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Jeev icchha,kamna parvash hoker hi avagaman me fansta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeev icchha,kamna parvash hoker hi avagaman me fansta hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Hamari atma hi samast vicharvan shaktiyon se ott prott hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamari atma hi samast vicharvan shaktiyon se ott prott hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hur cheej ko sahi tarike se samajh jeevan ki equation me apply karen.
messages.fullText:
Hur cheej ko sahi tarike se samajh jeevan ki equation me apply karen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jo hamare mun ki moodhta ko dhvast ker Satya marg per aarudh ker de,vahi satguru hai.
messages.fullText:
Jo hamare mun ki moodhta ko dhvast ker Satya marg per aarudh ker de,vahi satguru hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Jagat me hum sub mrig marichika ka anubhav karte rehte hai,kucchh bhi nahi hai ant me, per isse hi sub kucchh man ker bhramit hai.
messages.fullText:
Jagat me hum sub mrig marichika ka anubhav karte rehte hai,kucchh bhi nahi hai ant me, per isse hi sub kucchh man ker bhramit hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan Mai,merepun ki viratta me lata jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan Mai,merepun ki viratta me lata jata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Maryadayen hamare satv ko,hamare muul ko sanvardhit ker hume bul deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Maryadayen hamare satv ko,hamare muul ko sanvardhit ker hume bul deti hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan me satguru ka agman hi jeevan ko sugam banata hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me satguru ka agman hi jeevan ko sugam banata hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text:
Bilkul jao.
Pujya Swami ji ke shree charno me hamara vinamr shastang pranam kehna.
messages.fullText:
Bilkul jao.
Pujya Swami ji ke shree charno me hamara vinamr shastang pranam kehna.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan bahut mehanga hai,ateh iski kadr karen.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan bahut mehanga hai,ateh iski kadr karen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Charitr gatha bun jaye,udahran bun jaye,mantr bun jaye,ye hi gurudev ka hum subke liye Divya shikshan hai.
messages.fullText:
Charitr gatha bun jaye,udahran bun jaye,mantr bun jaye,ye hi gurudev ka hum subke liye Divya shikshan hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Mun ki yatharth avastha ka parichay hamare svapn de dete hai.
messages.fullText:
Mun ki yatharth avastha ka parichay hamare svapn de dete hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamari atma hi samast vicharvan shaktiyon se ott prott hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamari atma hi samast vicharvan shaktiyon se ott prott hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm jeevan ka Everest hai,jis tuk pahunchne ka pratyek adhikari hai .
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm jeevan ka Everest hai,jis tuk pahunchne ka pratyek adhikari hai .
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Meri Mai ka vishudhh svarup atma hai.
messages.fullText:
Meri Mai ka vishudhh svarup atma hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apne hone ke arth ko siddhh ker dena hi manushya jeevan ki safalta hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne hone ke arth ko siddhh ker dena hi manushya jeevan ki safalta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan utthan ka naam hai,patan ka nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan utthan ka naam hai,patan ka nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apni Chetna ke utkarsh ka divya drishtikon akmatr hume guru se milta hai.
messages.fullText:
Apni Chetna ke utkarsh ka divya drishtikon akmatr hume guru se milta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru se labhya atmgyan se hum samaj me apne right contributions dene ka art siikhte hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru se labhya atmgyan se hum samaj me apne right contributions dene ka art siikhte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vedant sarvpratham samanvay ki vidha sikhata hai.
messages.fullText:
Vedant sarvpratham samanvay ki vidha sikhata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Durgati se sadgati ki aur lejane vala param ashrey hai,akmatr Sadguru Charan Sharan.
messages.fullText:
Durgati se sadgati ki aur lejane vala param ashrey hai,akmatr Sadguru Charan Sharan.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka bul hi hume sidhhantik nishtha me lata hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ka bul hi hume sidhhantik nishtha me lata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sampurn charachar me pratyek cheej ka aadhar akmatr hamara astitv hi hai.
messages.fullText:
Sampurn charachar me pratyek cheej ka aadhar akmatr hamara astitv hi hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhno ka ambar atripti deta hai,jabki sadhu ki sadhna atma ke ucchhtam aasan per virajit karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhno ka ambar atripti deta hai,jabki sadhu ki sadhna atma ke ucchhtam aasan per virajit karti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Kritagyata ke svar sarvpratham Guru ke liye hote hai,jo hamari moodhta ko dhvast karte jate hai.
messages.fullText:
Kritagyata ke svar sarvpratham Guru ke liye hote hai,jo hamari moodhta ko dhvast karte jate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sharnagati se sunder jeevan ka koi abhushan nahi.
messages.fullText:
Sharnagati se sunder jeevan ka koi abhushan nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satyata ki neenv hai,pavitrata.
messages.fullText:
Satyata ki neenv hai,pavitrata.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka sarvocchh dhyey hai,svayam ko jan usme sthir ho jana.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka sarvocchh dhyey hai,svayam ko jan usme sthir ho jana.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hamare achran,charitr me vaas karte hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hamare achran,charitr me vaas karte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamari atma hi samast vicharvan shaktiyon se ott prott hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamari atma hi samast vicharvan shaktiyon se ott prott hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang adhyatm path pradarshak avam jeevan sidhhi ka sehaj marg hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang adhyatm path pradarshak avam jeevan sidhhi ka sehaj marg hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hamare antas ke parpanch ko shant karne me pul pul sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hamare antas ke parpanch ko shant karne me pul pul sahayak hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Mumuksha hamari sadaiv jeevant rehni chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Mumuksha hamari sadaiv jeevant rehni chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hum apni sudridh icchha se apne sanskaron ka rupantaran ker sakte hai.
messages.fullText:
Hum apni sudridh icchha se apne sanskaron ka rupantaran ker sakte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm hi jeevan ko vyavastha deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Dharm hi jeevan ko vyavastha deta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Shuddhh aham hamari Chetna ke utkarsh ka karan banta hai.
messages.fullText:
Shuddhh aham hamari Chetna ke utkarsh ka karan banta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru me Brahm satta satat mukher hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru me Brahm satta satat mukher hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Maryadayen hamare satv yani mool ka sanvardhan ker hume bul deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Maryadayen hamare satv yani mool ka sanvardhan ker hume bul deti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apne hone ke arth ko prove ker lena hi sacchhi kartavya nishtha hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne hone ke arth ko prove ker lena hi sacchhi kartavya nishtha hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Parinam ki chinta satkarmo ke abhav me hi hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Parinam ki chinta satkarmo ke abhav me hi hoti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare Sanskar hi hamara sansar banate hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamare Sanskar hi hamara sansar banate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Atma prakriti ke hur action ki gavah hai.
messages.fullText:
Atma prakriti ke hur action ki gavah hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Svayam ke avtaran ka naam hi jeevan hai.
messages.fullText:
Svayam ke avtaran ka naam hi jeevan hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vichar ki gati me mati bhi shamil hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Vichar ki gati me mati bhi shamil hoti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeev ki jeevantata ka aadhar hai,akmatr atmgyan.
messages.fullText:
Jeev ki jeevantata ka aadhar hai,akmatr atmgyan.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka gyan hi sacchhe sadhak ka bhojan hai, vairagya ki agni hi isse pàchane me sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ka gyan hi sacchhe sadhak ka bhojan hai, vairagya ki agni hi isse pàchane me sahayak hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka safalya guru charan anugreh hota hai,jo hume hamare mool ka pata dete hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka safalya guru charan anugreh hota hai,jo hume hamare mool ka pata dete hai.
Satya sharnam.

messages.text: Maryadayen hamare satv ka sanvardhan ker hume atmbali banati hai, deen nahi.
messages.fullText:
Maryadayen hamare satv ka sanvardhan ker hume atmbali banati hai, deen nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charan Sharan hi svayam ko pa sakne ka mool mantr hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru charan Sharan hi svayam ko pa sakne ka mool mantr hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sahi vichar hamari nirarthak poorv manyataon per prahar karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Sahi vichar hamari nirarthak poorv manyataon per prahar karta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya bodh hi akmatr asatya ki bhranti se mukt ker sakta hai,kucchh bhi aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Satya bodh hi akmatr asatya ki bhranti se mukt ker sakta hai,kucchh bhi aur nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka paryay hai,akmatr utkarsh.....
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka paryay hai,akmatr utkarsh.....
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya ke prakash se judte chalen,Iishvar bheeter hi pragat ho jayega.
messages.fullText:
Satya ke prakash se judte chalen,Iishvar bheeter hi pragat ho jayega.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik abhyas ka satatya santushti,samridhhi ka samratt bana deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik abhyas ka satatya santushti,samridhhi ka samratt bana deta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Svayam ki jankari me hi jeevan ka safalya chipa hai.
messages.fullText:
Svayam ki jankari me hi jeevan ka safalya chipa hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Budhhiman vahi hai,jo Guru se chirsthayee samadhan prapt ker le.
messages.fullText:
Budhhiman vahi hai,jo Guru se chirsthayee samadhan prapt ker le.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jub jeev vasna rahit ho jata hai,to vo bhagvan me leen ho unka parshad ho jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Jub jeev vasna rahit ho jata hai,to vo bhagvan me leen ho unka parshad ho jata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Deveeya sampada hi Dharm marg ka pathey hai.
messages.fullText:
Deveeya sampada hi Dharm marg ka pathey hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm jeevan ka Everest hai,jis per chadhne ka adhikar pratyek manushya ko mila hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm jeevan ka Everest hai,jis per chadhne ka adhikar pratyek manushya ko mila hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke prati dhanyata ka bodh akmatr adhyatm se aata hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke prati dhanyata ka bodh akmatr adhyatm se aata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm jeevan ki sarvopari divya sugandhi hai.
messages.fullText:
Dharm jeevan ki sarvopari divya sugandhi hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan me simplicity rakho,ise complicated mut banao,isi ke liye atm gyan ki avashyakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me simplicity rakho,ise complicated mut banao,isi ke liye atm gyan ki avashyakta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satvik tul ka prakash hume svayam ke karib le aata hai.
messages.fullText:
Satvik tul ka prakash hume svayam ke karib le aata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm uukt jeevan hi indriyon per ankush laga pane me samarth hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Dharm uukt jeevan hi indriyon per ankush laga pane me samarth hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Nirmal antehkaran hi hume sadhak banata hai,jo apne Kalyan ke prati jagrook karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Nirmal antehkaran hi hume sadhak banata hai,jo apne Kalyan ke prati jagrook karta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan mai pune ki viratta me lata chalta hai,hum sub ak hi hai,ak ke hi hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan mai pune ki viratta me lata chalta hai,hum sub ak hi hai,ak ke hi hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Svasth chamkili budhhi me hi atma ka reflection hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Svasth chamkili budhhi me hi atma ka reflection hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm jagat ka pehla sadhan shravan hai,yahin se hamare Kalyan ke kapatt khulte hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm jagat ka pehla sadhan shravan hai,yahin se hamare Kalyan ke kapatt khulte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka sang,satsang hamari svayam ki ajayta ke kapatt kholta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ka sang,satsang hamari svayam ki ajayta ke kapatt kholta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik antehkaran ki nirmati sarvocchh purusharth hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik antehkaran ki nirmati sarvocchh purusharth hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Atma Raja hai,prakriti Raja ke ashrey se chalti hai.
messages.fullText:
Atma Raja hai,prakriti Raja ke ashrey se chalti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apne mun ko sahi samajh dene ke liye atmgyan ki strength ki avashyakta hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne mun ko sahi samajh dene ke liye atmgyan ki strength ki avashyakta hoti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apni Chetna ko itna uuper uthate chalen ,ki hur baat bahut naganya ho jaye.
messages.fullText:
Apni Chetna ko itna uuper uthate chalen ,ki hur baat bahut naganya ho jaye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Kaise ho beta.
Apna dhyan rakho.
messages.fullText:
Kaise ho beta.
Apna dhyan rakho.
Hari om.

messages.text: Apne hone ke arth ko pragat ker lena hi saancchi kartavya nishtha hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne hone ke arth ko pragat ker lena hi saancchi kartavya nishtha hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki apurv ghatna hoti hai,ak jage hue purush ka milna,jo sidhii de aur sari kamnaon me adhyatm ki agni laga de.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki apurv ghatna hoti hai,ak jage hue purush ka milna,jo sidhii de aur sari kamnaon me adhyatm ki agni laga de.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Nirmal antehkaran hi hume sadhak banata hai.
messages.fullText:
Nirmal antehkaran hi hume sadhak banata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vairagya jeevan ka sarvocchh bhushan hai.
messages.fullText:
Vairagya jeevan ka sarvocchh bhushan hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hume sarthak jeevan jeene ka vigyan sikhate hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hume sarthak jeevan jeene ka vigyan sikhate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya akriti matr se hi manushya nahi hai,vo svabodh hone per hi manushyata ki aur mudta hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya akriti matr se hi manushya nahi hai,vo svabodh hone per hi manushyata ki aur mudta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Niyaman,sanyaman ka satat palan jeevan ko pushti tripti,santushti deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Niyaman,sanyaman ka satat palan jeevan ko pushti tripti,santushti deta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vishhay asakt mun ko kabhi bhi anand anubhuti ho nahi sakti.
messages.fullText:
Vishhay asakt mun ko kabhi bhi anand anubhuti ho nahi sakti.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna ka mahatvapurn ang hai,Acharya nishtha.Iske abhav me theek se Guru ki kahi baat hume samajh nahi aa pati.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna ka mahatvapurn ang hai,Acharya nishtha.Iske abhav me theek se Guru ki kahi baat hume samajh nahi aa pati.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru satyamurat hote hai,ateh unki sammukhta me Satya ka hi sauda karna chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Guru satyamurat hote hai,ateh unki sammukhta me Satya ka hi sauda karna chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhana path ka pathey akmatr guru parampara se milta hai,apni budhhi chalane se nahi.
messages.fullText:
Sadhana path ka pathey akmatr guru parampara se milta hai,apni budhhi chalane se nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm hi jeevan ko sthayee samadhan deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm hi jeevan ko sthayee samadhan deta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa bul hi akmatr hamari jhoothi ahmanyata ko dhvast ker pane me samarth hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa bul hi akmatr hamari jhoothi ahmanyata ko dhvast ker pane me samarth hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vishay asakt mun ko kabhi bhi anand anubhuti ho nahi sakti.
messages.fullText:
Vishay asakt mun ko kabhi bhi anand anubhuti ho nahi sakti.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ke prati shradhha ka charam hi apne bheeter svayam ke hone ke saanche arth ko udhghatit ker pane me samarth hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ke prati shradhha ka charam hi apne bheeter svayam ke hone ke saanche arth ko udhghatit ker pane me samarth hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik abhyas ka satatya jeevan ko param pushti,santushti, samriddhi pradan karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik abhyas ka satatya jeevan ko param pushti,santushti, samriddhi pradan karta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apne pass hone ka rus hi asal rus hai,baki sub bhranti.
messages.fullText:
Apne pass hone ka rus hi asal rus hai,baki sub bhranti.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Prachand bhogvadita hi jeevan ki durdashaon ka karan banti hai.
messages.fullText:
Prachand bhogvadita hi jeevan ki durdashaon ka karan banti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya ke prakash se judte chalen,Iishvar bheeter hi pragat hoga.
messages.fullText:
Satya ke prakash se judte chalen,Iishvar bheeter hi pragat hoga.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apni Chetna ko itna uuper uthate chalen ki jeevan ki koi bhi paristithi bahut chote aakar ki bun jaye,ye hi drishtikon hume Guru se milta hai.
messages.fullText:
Apni Chetna ko itna uuper uthate chalen ki jeevan ki koi bhi paristithi bahut chote aakar ki bun jaye,ye hi drishtikon hume Guru se milta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm hamare jeevan ka suraksha kavacchh hai,iss lok me bhi aur isse aage bhi.
messages.fullText:
Dharm hamare jeevan ka suraksha kavacchh hai,iss lok me bhi aur isse aage bhi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apna jeevan apni hi socchh avam kritya se paribhashit hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Apna jeevan apni hi socchh avam kritya se paribhashit hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Svabodh hone per hi manushya manushyata ki aur mudta hai.
messages.fullText:
Svabodh hone per hi manushya manushyata ki aur mudta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Koi baat nahi,beta.
messages.fullText:
Koi baat nahi,beta.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan me ucchhata ka udbhav hi sanchha utsav hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me ucchhata ka udbhav hi sanchha utsav hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jagrit,Brahmnishth Mahapurushon ki sannidhhi Bhagvat anugreh se hi milti hai.
messages.fullText:
Jagrit,Brahmnishth Mahapurushon ki sannidhhi Bhagvat anugreh se hi milti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna me sidhantik nishtha bahut anivarya hai,jo akmatr guru kripa,guru sannidhi,tatv nishtha se hi sambhav hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna me sidhantik nishtha bahut anivarya hai,jo akmatr guru kripa,guru sannidhi,tatv nishtha se hi sambhav hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ,sant mahatmano ke Shree mukh se nikle vakyon me Brahmbul hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ,sant mahatmano ke Shree mukh se nikle vakyon me Brahmbul hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Maryadayen hamare satv ka sanvardhan ker hume bul deti hai,yeh koi bandhan nahi hai.
messages.fullText:
Maryadayen hamare satv ka sanvardhan ker hume bul deti hai,yeh koi bandhan nahi hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apni Chetna ko itna uuper utha do,ki koi bhi paristithi bahut choti reh jaye.
messages.fullText:
Apni Chetna ko itna uuper utha do,ki koi bhi paristithi bahut choti reh jaye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya svayam siddhh hai ,kyonki uske bheeter Iishvar pratishthit hai,bus iss divyata se parichit karne ke liye hi Guru ka hamare jeevan me aagman hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya svayam siddhh hai ,kyonki uske bheeter Iishvar pratishthit hai,bus iss divyata se parichit karne ke liye hi Guru ka hamare jeevan me aagman hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Ucchhtam sopan ko chhune vala hamara charitr bune.
messages.fullText:
Ucchhtam sopan ko chhune vala hamara charitr bune.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Mumuksha hamari sadaiv jeevant rehni chahiye,tabhi Gurujano,satpurushon ki sannidhhi milti hai.
messages.fullText:
Mumuksha hamari sadaiv jeevant rehni chahiye,tabhi Gurujano,satpurushon ki sannidhhi milti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya ke prakash se judte chalen,Iishvar bheeter se hi pragat ho jayega,vo kahin duur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Satya ke prakash se judte chalen,Iishvar bheeter se hi pragat ho jayega,vo kahin duur nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apeksha rahit Mahapurush hi akmatr hamara Guru ho sakta hai,tabhi hamara jeevan sanvarna shuru hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Apeksha rahit Mahapurush hi akmatr hamara Guru ho sakta hai,tabhi hamara jeevan sanvarna shuru hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamari mun stithi hamare svayam per hi nirbhar hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamari mun stithi hamare svayam per hi nirbhar hoti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhikari purush ke jeevan me hi sachhe Guru ka pravesh hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhikari purush ke jeevan me hi sachhe Guru ka pravesh hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sharir ki tamam gatividhiyon ko dekhne vala Mai svayam hun.
messages.fullText:
Sharir ki tamam gatividhiyon ko dekhne vala Mai svayam hun.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Nav varsh me hamare prayas kucchh iss prakar vegman ho jayen,ki hum apne poorn nishchay me Guru kripa se aaroodh ho saken.
Nav varsh ki shubh kamnaon ke saath
messages.fullText:
Nav varsh me hamare prayas kucchh iss prakar vegman ho jayen,ki hum apne poorn nishchay me Guru kripa se aaroodh ho saken.
Nav varsh ki shubh kamnaon ke saath
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Apne lakshya se kabhi bhi na haten,sadhan se ak pul bhi virakt
na hon.
messages.fullText:
Apne lakshya se kabhi bhi na haten,sadhan se ak pul bhi virakt
na hon.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jagrit, Brahmnishth Mahapurushon ki sannidhhi Bhagvat anugreh se hi sambhav ho pati hai.
messages.fullText:
Jagrit, Brahmnishth Mahapurushon ki sannidhhi Bhagvat anugreh se hi sambhav ho pati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya ke prakash se judte chalen,Iishvar bheeter se hi pragat ho jayega.
messages.fullText:
Satya ke prakash se judte chalen,Iishvar bheeter se hi pragat ho jayega.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apne hone ke arth ko pragat ker pana hi sanchhi kartavya nishtha hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne hone ke arth ko pragat ker pana hi sanchhi kartavya nishtha hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik sadhan hamara svabhav bun jaye,ye hi sacchhi sadhna hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik sadhan hamara svabhav bun jaye,ye hi sacchhi sadhna hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke hur paksh ki gehari samvednayen guru kripa se ujagar ho jati hai,bus hum sajag rahen.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke hur paksh ki gehari samvednayen guru kripa se ujagar ho jati hai,bus hum sajag rahen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Mera hi agyan,avidya mujhe dhak leti hai,isike liye hum sabko guru charan prakash ki avashyakta hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Mera hi agyan,avidya mujhe dhak leti hai,isike liye hum sabko guru charan prakash ki avashyakta hoti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Iishvar se prem karne ke samast suutr satsang hai.
messages.fullText:
Iishvar se prem karne ke samast suutr satsang hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Kaki Kai janmo ke anugreh svaruup hume satpurushon,mahatmano ki sannidhi  milti hai.
messages.fullText:
Kaki Kai janmo ke anugreh svaruup hume satpurushon,mahatmano ki sannidhi  milti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare bahirmukh abhyas ne hi hume apne se duur avidya,abhav me rakha hua hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamare bahirmukh abhyas ne hi hume apne se duur avidya,abhav me rakha hua hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bahut bahut shukrane, beta.
messages.fullText:
Bahut bahut shukrane, beta.
Hari om.

messages.text: Dharm hamare jeevan ko secure karta hai,isi janm me nahi, isse aage bhi.
messages.fullText:
Dharm hamare jeevan ko secure karta hai,isi janm me nahi, isse aage bhi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apne munn ko sahi samajh dene ke liye hume atmgyan ki strength ki jaroorat hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne munn ko sahi samajh dene ke liye hume atmgyan ki strength ki jaroorat hoti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Mahan ashvarya jeevan ka akmatr Guru Shree charno me hi samahit hai.
Makar Sankranti ki pavastam vela me sabhiko shubh kamnayen.
messages.fullText:
Mahan ashvarya jeevan ka akmatr Guru Shree charno me hi samahit hai.
Makar Sankranti ki pavastam vela me sabhiko shubh kamnayen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke prati dhanyata ka bodh akmatr adhyatmik sadhna se hi aata hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke prati dhanyata ka bodh akmatr adhyatmik sadhna se hi aata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan mai pune ki viratta me lata hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan mai pune ki viratta me lata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhuon ki charcha me se hi apni sadhna path ke suutr mil jate hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhuon ki charcha me se hi apni sadhna path ke suutr mil jate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Mere hone ka sukh padarthon,vastu,vyaktiyon se nahi balki mere svayam se hai.
messages.fullText:
Mere hone ka sukh padarthon,vastu,vyaktiyon se nahi balki mere svayam se hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jo hamare hone ke arthon ko ujagar kare,vahi adhyatm hai.
messages.fullText:
Jo hamare hone ke arthon ko ujagar kare,vahi adhyatm hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare aas paas valon ki prasannta  hamare jeevan ke shreshth prakarno me bahut bada sambal banti hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamare aas paas valon ki prasannta  hamare jeevan ke shreshth prakarno me bahut bada sambal banti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare mun ki stithi hamare svayam per hi nirbhar hoti hai,kisi anya per nahi.
messages.fullText:
Hamare mun ki stithi hamare svayam per hi nirbhar hoti hai,kisi anya per nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sanyas ghatit hota hai,uska beej bahut pehle se hi bheeter pada hota hai,yeh odhne,lapetne ka svang nahi hota.
messages.fullText:
Sanyas ghatit hota hai,uska beej bahut pehle se hi bheeter pada hota hai,yeh odhne,lapetne ka svang nahi hota.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vivek vo prakash hai,jiske focus me keval Satya hi dikhega.
messages.fullText:
Vivek vo prakash hai,jiske focus me keval Satya hi dikhega.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sacche guru ki sannidhi se sehaj ruup se anter parishkar,rupantaran hota chalta hai
messages.fullText:
Sacche guru ki sannidhi se sehaj ruup se anter parishkar,rupantaran hota chalta hai
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamara hur thought, vachan,karm charachar ke pratyek jeevan ko pavitrata,shanti,prem ,prasannta dene vala ho.
messages.fullText:
Hamara hur thought, vachan,karm charachar ke pratyek jeevan ko pavitrata,shanti,prem ,prasannta dene vala ho.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charno se preeti satsang ka pehla suutr hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru charno se preeti satsang ka pehla suutr hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vichar ke bikhrav se arajakta avam aachran ka dushan hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Vichar ke bikhrav se arajakta avam aachran ka dushan hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki gehari samvednayen jeevan ke hur paksh me Guru kripa se ujagar ho jati hai,bus hum sajag reh saken.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki gehari samvednayen jeevan ke hur paksh me Guru kripa se ujagar ho jati hai,bus hum sajag reh saken.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Anand anubhuti sadaiv alokik hoti hai,lokik anubhav sukh abhas hote hai,anand kabhi nahi.
messages.fullText:
Anand anubhuti sadaiv alokik hoti hai,lokik anubhav sukh abhas hote hai,anand kabhi nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sacchhe Guru ki sannidhi me sehaj ruup se anter parishkar,rupantaran hota chalta hai.
messages.fullText:
Sacchhe Guru ki sannidhi me sehaj ruup se anter parishkar,rupantaran hota chalta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Samta vaicharik hoti hai,vyavaharik nahi.vyavahar maryadaon ke anukul hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Samta vaicharik hoti hai,vyavaharik nahi.vyavahar maryadaon ke anukul hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan me duaon ka bahut bada roll hota hai,ateh hum prasann rahen aur apne aas paas prasannta ka hi vistar karen,jo akmatr Hari charan ashrey me hi hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me duaon ka bahut bada roll hota hai,ateh hum prasann rahen aur apne aas paas prasannta ka hi vistar karen,jo akmatr Hari charan ashrey me hi hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Neend (avidya)se jagi Chetna utkrishth hoti jati hai.
messages.fullText:
Neend (avidya)se jagi Chetna utkrishth hoti jati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Mahapurush sadaiv hume hamare hi Kalyan ki baat batate hai,ateh jeevan me satsang ka satatya rahe.
messages.fullText:
Mahapurush sadaiv hume hamare hi Kalyan ki baat batate hai,ateh jeevan me satsang ka satatya rahe.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vedant hume samanvay ki vidha sikhata hai.
messages.fullText:
Vedant hume samanvay ki vidha sikhata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya Narayan vratt katha svayam ko satya pratigya hone ka vachan dena hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya Narayan vratt katha svayam ko satya pratigya hone ka vachan dena hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare ak vichar ki sabalta,soundarya hamare jeevan ko badal dalta hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamare ak vichar ki sabalta,soundarya hamare jeevan ko badal dalta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki atm sugandhi hi hamara asal parichay hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki atm sugandhi hi hamara asal parichay hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Bahut sunder....
Shukrane beta.
messages.fullText:
Bahut sunder....
Shukrane beta.
Hari om.

messages.text: Vichar ke bikhrav se arajakta v aachran ka dushan hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Vichar ke bikhrav se arajakta v aachran ka dushan hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jahan Satya anveshnda ki ruchii hoti hai,vahin sadbudhii hai.
messages.fullText:
Jahan Satya anveshnda ki ruchii hoti hai,vahin sadbudhii hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sansar ke vyavahar me avashyakta ki matra ka alp hi rehna chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Sansar ke vyavahar me avashyakta ki matra ka alp hi rehna chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Charitr tapascharya avam chintan se ujjaval hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Charitr tapascharya avam chintan se ujjaval hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hum Brahm kul ke Deepak hai,yeh ahsas hi sacchhi Poornima hai.
messages.fullText:
Hum Brahm kul ke Deepak hai,yeh ahsas hi sacchhi Poornima hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Maryadayen koi bandhan nahi hai,apitu jeevan ka satv soundarya hai.
messages.fullText:
Maryadayen koi bandhan nahi hai,apitu jeevan ka satv soundarya hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vichar se apne nishchay me pahunch tik jana hi dhyan hai.
messages.fullText:
Vichar se apne nishchay me pahunch tik jana hi dhyan hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Tum sabhike anant shukrane hai.Guru ka parivar hai,anant hai.sub svasth rahen.
messages.fullText:
Tum sabhike anant shukrane hai.Guru ka parivar hai,anant hai.sub svasth rahen.
Hari om.

messages.text: Manushya vichar ka upasak hai,ateh vichar ki seedhhi se utroter utkarshit hon.
messages.fullText:
Manushya vichar ka upasak hai,ateh vichar ki seedhhi se utroter utkarshit hon.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka sadhan bun jana hi sarvocchh sadhna hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka sadhan bun jana hi sarvocchh sadhna hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang avam svadhyay se kusanskaron ka shaman,ahankar ka nirmulan avam pavitr antehkaran ki nirmati hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang avam svadhyay se kusanskaron ka shaman,ahankar ka nirmulan avam pavitr antehkaran ki nirmati hoti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru me Brahm satta satat mukher hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru me Brahm satta satat mukher hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sant darshan ,sannidhhi hamare jeevan ke pap, tapon ka haran ker deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Sant darshan ,sannidhhi hamare jeevan ke pap, tapon ka haran ker deta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Atmvismriti hi hamare bhay,dukh,abhav ka karan hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmvismriti hi hamare bhay,dukh,abhav ka karan hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare aachar,vichar Mahapurushon ki sannidhi se hi sanvarte hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamare aachar,vichar Mahapurushon ki sannidhi se hi sanvarte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Chintan me Iishvar ke aate hi,Jahan rahenge vahi sthal dhaam,tirth ho jayega.
messages.fullText:
Chintan me Iishvar ke aate hi,Jahan rahenge vahi sthal dhaam,tirth ho jayega.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Gurujano,Mahapurushon ke mukh se Bhagvat agya hi nikalti hai,uska jeevan me anupalan hone se hamara hi Kalyan hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Gurujano,Mahapurushon ke mukh se Bhagvat agya hi nikalti hai,uska jeevan me anupalan hone se hamara hi Kalyan hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apni Chetna ko itna uuper uthate chalen,ki koi bhi parstithi bahut choti bun jaye.ye hi drishtikon hume Guru se milta hai.
messages.fullText:
Apni Chetna ko itna uuper uthate chalen,ki koi bhi parstithi bahut choti bun jaye.ye hi drishtikon hume Guru se milta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamari atma hi samast vicharvan shaktiyon se ott prott hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamari atma hi samast vicharvan shaktiyon se ott prott hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Svasthya,sunderta,sehajta ki kunji hai,atm sanyam.
messages.fullText:
Svasthya,sunderta,sehajta ki kunji hai,atm sanyam.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Samta vaicharik hoti hai, vyavaharik nahi.
Vyavahar maryadaon ke anukul hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Samta vaicharik hoti hai, vyavaharik nahi.
Vyavahar maryadaon ke anukul hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vedant sarvpratham samanvay ki vidha sikhata hai.
messages.fullText:
Vedant sarvpratham samanvay ki vidha sikhata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang aur svadhyay se kusanskaron ka shaman, ahankar ka nirmulan avam pavitr antehkaran ki nirmati hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang aur svadhyay se kusanskaron ka shaman, ahankar ka nirmulan avam pavitr antehkaran ki nirmati hoti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya ke prakash se jude rahen,Iishvar bheeter se hi pragat ho jayega.
messages.fullText:
Satya ke prakash se jude rahen,Iishvar bheeter se hi pragat ho jayega.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Andrik dharatal per hi sukh dukh ka anubhav hota hai,chetna ke budhhi se pare ho jane per hamara anubhav anand ka hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Andrik dharatal per hi sukh dukh ka anubhav hota hai,chetna ke budhhi se pare ho jane per hamara anubhav anand ka hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ko samadhan Vivek ,vichar v adhyatmik sadhna se milta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ko samadhan Vivek ,vichar v adhyatmik sadhna se milta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vidya hi akmatr hume purnata pradan karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Vidya hi akmatr hume purnata pradan karti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apne hone ke arthon ko prove ker lena hi saanchi kartavya nishtha hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne hone ke arthon ko prove ker lena hi saanchi kartavya nishtha hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka sarvocchh svasth upchar atm bodh me samahit hai,kisi anya me nahi.
