messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka sarvocchh svasth upchar atm bodh me samahit hai,kisi anya me nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm shabdon ki nahi,anupalan ki cheej hai.
messages.fullText:
Dharm shabdon ki nahi,anupalan ki cheej hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Kalyankari kalpana akmatr Iishvar ki hi hai,kisi anya ki nahi.
messages.fullText:
Kalyankari kalpana akmatr Iishvar ki hi hai,kisi anya ki nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Guru charan sharanta hi jeevan ka sarvocchh uddeshya hai.
Guru kripa kewalam.....
messages.fullText:
Guru charan sharanta hi jeevan ka sarvocchh uddeshya hai.
Guru kripa kewalam.....
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhog ke anubhav sukhi to kucchh der ko ker dete hai,per unme tripti bodh nahi hota jabki yog ka anubhav triptikarak,anand dayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhog ke anubhav sukhi to kucchh der ko ker dete hai,per unme tripti bodh nahi hota jabki yog ka anubhav triptikarak,anand dayak hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Atm bodh ka satat bane rehna hi saanchi Holi hai,jo akmatr Guru  anugreh se hi sambhav hai.
Holi ki anant shubh kamnayen.
Guru Darshan ki yeh Holi yatra sabhi.premiyon ke liye shubhta se paripurn rahe.
messages.fullText:
Atm bodh ka satat bane rehna hi saanchi Holi hai,jo akmatr Guru  anugreh se hi sambhav hai.
Holi ki anant shubh kamnayen.
Guru Darshan ki yeh Holi yatra sabhi.premiyon ke liye shubhta se paripurn rahe.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare satsang ki uniform hai, self discipline.bus yeh hume hamesha yaad rahe.
messages.fullText:
Hamare satsang ki uniform hai, self discipline.bus yeh hume hamesha yaad rahe.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sacchha guru shishya ko apne atmik garbh me dharan ker bhagvateey samarthya ka aakar deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Sacchha guru shishya ko apne atmik garbh me dharan ker bhagvateey samarthya ka aakar deta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Beta,Vani ready hone ke baad mujhe direct bhej dena,fir Anuradha aunty ko bhej dena.kai bar unhe vyastata me yaad nahi rehta.
Shukrane,
messages.fullText:
Beta,Vani ready hone ke baad mujhe direct bhej dena,fir Anuradha aunty ko bhej dena.kai bar unhe vyastata me yaad nahi rehta.
Shukrane,
Hari om.

messages.text: Hamara lakshya akmatr svaruup bodh hi hai,yehi hume anatm se mukt karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamara lakshya akmatr svaruup bodh hi hai,yehi hume anatm se mukt karta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka hona hi jeevan ko dharm siddhi deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ka hona hi jeevan ko dharm siddhi deta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru shishya ke bandhutv ki pavasta ko bin sadguru anugreh ke kabhi samjha nahi ja sakta.
messages.fullText:
Guru shishya ke bandhutv ki pavasta ko bin sadguru anugreh ke kabhi samjha nahi ja sakta.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apne jeevan ko hi sadhna ke anukul sadhan bana lena hi svayam me badi sadhna hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne jeevan ko hi sadhna ke anukul sadhan bana lena hi svayam me badi sadhna hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Svacchh,chamkili budhhi me hi atma ka reflection hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Svacchh,chamkili budhhi me hi atma ka reflection hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang bahut jeevant ruup me hota hai,jisme hume akmatr Guru sammukhta ki avashyakta hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang bahut jeevant ruup me hota hai,jisme hume akmatr Guru sammukhta ki avashyakta hoti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Higher frequency ke saath baithne se apni frequency bhi uuper uthegi,ateh sang ke vishay me hume bahut jagrook rehna chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Higher frequency ke saath baithne se apni frequency bhi uuper uthegi,ateh sang ke vishay me hume bahut jagrook rehna chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Chintan ki vishudhta hi svayam yani iishvar ke karib lati hai.
messages.fullText:
Chintan ki vishudhta hi svayam yani iishvar ke karib lati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vivek ki paripurnata hi Satya ke kapat khol pane me samarth hai.
messages.fullText:
Vivek ki paripurnata hi Satya ke kapat khol pane me samarth hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Budhhi ke bahut chalne se vichar me quality nahi aa pati, quantity jaroor badh jati hai.
messages.fullText:
Budhhi ke bahut chalne se vichar me quality nahi aa pati, quantity jaroor badh jati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Anukultaon ki icchha hume hamesha partantr rakhti hai.
messages.fullText:
Anukultaon ki icchha hume hamesha partantr rakhti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Dharm hi hamare future ko secure karta hai,issi lok me nahi ,iss janm se aage bhi.
messages.fullText:
Dharm hi hamare future ko secure karta hai,issi lok me nahi ,iss janm se aage bhi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa se hum ego consciousness se soul consciousness me aa apni alokikta  ko labdh hote hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa se hum ego consciousness se soul consciousness me aa apni alokikta  ko labdh hote hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang adhyatm path pradarshak avam jeevan siddhhi ka sehaj marg hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang adhyatm path pradarshak avam jeevan siddhhi ka sehaj marg hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Bahut bahut shukrane.....,beta.
Anand aa gaya.
messages.fullText:
Bahut bahut shukrane.....,beta.
Anand aa gaya.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Yatharthvadi hi jeevan ka saancha sukh le pata hai.
messages.fullText:
Yatharthvadi hi jeevan ka saancha sukh le pata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamara vaidik dharm hume karm v upasna ka svatantrya deta hai,hamari anter kamnaon ke anurup Bhagvan ruup dharan karte hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamara vaidik dharm hume karm v upasna ka svatantrya deta hai,hamari anter kamnaon ke anurup Bhagvan ruup dharan karte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Shubh ki icchha rakhen aur Satya ko janne se badh ker shubh kya ho sakta hai,jisme sabhi kucchh samahit hai.
messages.fullText:
Shubh ki icchha rakhen aur Satya ko janne se badh ker shubh kya ho sakta hai,jisme sabhi kucchh samahit hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sharir ka sahi sahi Gyan bhi atmgyan ke dwara hi sambhav hai.
messages.fullText:
Sharir ka sahi sahi Gyan bhi atmgyan ke dwara hi sambhav hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bin vairagya ke sadhna jad hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Bin vairagya ke sadhna jad hoti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Andh kamnaon ka sainya dul hi hume iss Maya me dodata rehta hai.
messages.fullText:
Andh kamnaon ka sainya dul hi hume iss Maya me dodata rehta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hum Guru ki roshni ke ang bun jayen.Guru vachan jeevan ke liye hai,bus achran ho jayen.
messages.fullText:
Hum Guru ki roshni ke ang bun jayen.Guru vachan jeevan ke liye hai,bus achran ho jayen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Devi mahapurusharth se pragat hoti hai,ateh apne dwandon ko jeet manojayee hon.
messages.fullText:
Devi mahapurusharth se pragat hoti hai,ateh apne dwandon ko jeet manojayee hon.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Tatv bodh hone per sansar nahi rehta.jaise hi hum apne mool me lotenge,hu jagat ke sakshi ho jayenge.
messages.fullText:
Tatv bodh hone per sansar nahi rehta.jaise hi hum apne mool me lotenge,hu jagat ke sakshi ho jayenge.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Shishya guru ki pehchaan bun jaye,bus guru hi guru reh jayen,kucchh aur reh hi na paye.
messages.fullText:
Shishya guru ki pehchaan bun jaye,bus guru hi guru reh jayen,kucchh aur reh hi na paye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Anant hi Satya hai,satyanishth hi dharmnishth hai.
messages.fullText:
Anant hi Satya hai,satyanishth hi dharmnishth hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Prasannta padarth,vyakti,ghatna sapeksh nahi,akmatr vichar sapeksh hai.
messages.fullText:
Prasannta padarth,vyakti,ghatna sapeksh nahi,akmatr vichar sapeksh hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Deh abhiman ka vismaran hi samadhi hai.uska karm nishkarm ho jata hai,svateh hi sharir se kriyayen hoti chalengi,vyavahar me poora vivek ka prakash rahega.
messages.fullText:
Deh abhiman ka vismaran hi samadhi hai.uska karm nishkarm ho jata hai,svateh hi sharir se kriyayen hoti chalengi,vyavahar me poora vivek ka prakash rahega.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jub bhi hum bheeter se jaag apne uddeshya ki poorti me salagn ho saken,ye hi  jeevan ka sundertam samay hai .
messages.fullText:
Jub bhi hum bheeter se jaag apne uddeshya ki poorti me salagn ho saken,ye hi  jeevan ka sundertam samay hai .
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Shubh ki icchha rakhen.Bhagvan ki charcha,vichar se badhker shubh kucchh aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Shubh ki icchha rakhen.Bhagvan ki charcha,vichar se badhker shubh kucchh aur nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Prakriti aur Purush ka vishleshan hi Vivek hai.jeev anek hai,Parmatma ak hai.
messages.fullText:
Prakriti aur Purush ka vishleshan hi Vivek hai.jeev anek hai,Parmatma ak hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sant aur satsang hume keval Iishvar kripa se milte hai.
messages.fullText:
Sant aur satsang hume keval Iishvar kripa se milte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Brahmbodh hone ke baad kisi cheej ko janne ki icchha nahi reh jati.
messages.fullText:
Brahmbodh hone ke baad kisi cheej ko janne ki icchha nahi reh jati.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvat smriti hi akmatr hur rog ka nidan hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvat smriti hi akmatr hur rog ka nidan hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang ki niranterta hume hamari moodh manyataon se door rakhti hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang ki niranterta hume hamari moodh manyataon se door rakhti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeev hur pul mun ke saath hai,isiliye teen kaleshon ke saath hai.iska nidan hai akmatr adhyatm.
messages.fullText:
Jeev hur pul mun ke saath hai,isiliye teen kaleshon ke saath hai.iska nidan hai akmatr adhyatm.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka akmatr samadhan hai,Adhyatm.....anya kucchh bhi aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka akmatr samadhan hai,Adhyatm.....anya kucchh bhi aur nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Gyan hi akmatr hamare Satya ko prakashit karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Gyan hi akmatr hamare Satya ko prakashit karta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Atmjyot hi to akmatr jeevan ki jeevantata hai,baki sub avidya ka khel hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmjyot hi to akmatr jeevan ki jeevantata hai,baki sub avidya ka khel hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Mahapurushon ke charno me atyadhik urja rehti hai,ateh unke charno ka dhyan karna chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Mahapurushon ke charno me atyadhik urja rehti hai,ateh unke charno ka dhyan karna chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Parmatma ki pratyek abhivyakti me arth v shikshan samaya hai.
messages.fullText:
Parmatma ki pratyek abhivyakti me arth v shikshan samaya hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang ka satatya hume apni moodh manyataon se duur karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang ka satatya hume apni moodh manyataon se duur karta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvan ki charcha,vichar se badh ker kucchh bhi aur nahi,isi me jeevan ki shubhta hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan ki charcha,vichar se badh ker kucchh bhi aur nahi,isi me jeevan ki shubhta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Atmbodh ke baad kucchh bhi janne ki icchha svateh hi shant ho jati hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmbodh ke baad kucchh bhi janne ki icchha svateh hi shant ho jati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Shradhha,vishvas se hi Guru ka gyan falit hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Shradhha,vishvas se hi Guru ka gyan falit hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Prayashchit se shuchita ka sanskar udit hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Prayashchit se shuchita ka sanskar udit hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya sharir akmatr dharm sadhan hai.sare abhav,pratikultayen jeevan ki agyan me hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya sharir akmatr dharm sadhan hai.sare abhav,pratikultayen jeevan ki agyan me hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Samarth Purush ka agman hi jeevan ko sarthakta ki raah dikhla sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Samarth Purush ka agman hi jeevan ko sarthakta ki raah dikhla sakta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki sabse apurv ghatna hoti hai,ak jage hue Purush ka milna.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki sabse apurv ghatna hoti hai,ak jage hue Purush ka milna.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vivek jeevan ki sarvocchh sampada hai,jo akmatr Guru anugreh se hi jeevant ho pata hai.
messages.fullText:
Vivek jeevan ki sarvocchh sampada hai,jo akmatr Guru anugreh se hi jeevant ho pata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sarvocchh sadhan hai,akmatr satguru vachno ko shraddha purvak sunna.
messages.fullText:
Sarvocchh sadhan hai,akmatr satguru vachno ko shraddha purvak sunna.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Maya se bachne ke liye akmatr Mayapati ki hi sharan hai,kucchh aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Maya se bachne ke liye akmatr Mayapati ki hi sharan hai,kucchh aur nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Punya se milne vali cheejen bàdal jati hai,parantu kripa se milne vali cheej badalti nahi .
messages.fullText:
Punya se milne vali cheejen bàdal jati hai,parantu kripa se milne vali cheej badalti nahi .
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare shubh karm hi hamara saath dete hai,baki sub jahan me dheere dheere saath chodte chalte hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamare shubh karm hi hamara saath dete hai,baki sub jahan me dheere dheere saath chodte chalte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya janm ko pashuvat mut vyatit Karo,yeh sarvocchh lakshya hetu mila hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya janm ko pashuvat mut vyatit Karo,yeh sarvocchh lakshya hetu mila hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya anusandhan hi jeevan ka akmatr sarvocchh uddeshya hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya anusandhan hi jeevan ka akmatr sarvocchh uddeshya hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Nitya vidyaman satta ko hi Satya kehte hai,jisme chetna hai,navinyata hai.
messages.fullText:
Nitya vidyaman satta ko hi Satya kehte hai,jisme chetna hai,navinyata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhu parmarth hota hai,svabhav se hi sarvhitay bhav me rehta hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhu parmarth hota hai,svabhav se hi sarvhitay bhav me rehta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamara vaidik dharm hume karm, upasna ka svatantrya deta hai.jaisi jaisi vasna manushya me hoti hai,anurup Bhagvan ruup dharan karte hai uske liye .
messages.fullText:
Hamara vaidik dharm hume karm, upasna ka svatantrya deta hai.jaisi jaisi vasna manushya me hoti hai,anurup Bhagvan ruup dharan karte hai uske liye .
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jo atm anatm ka bhed ker sake use Vivek kehte hai.
messages.fullText:
Jo atm anatm ka bhed ker sake use Vivek kehte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Shukrane beta.
messages.fullText:
Shukrane beta.
Hari om.

messages.text: Sant ka prakatay hum sabhi ke liye hota hai,parantu vishvas, shradhha ka prakar apne apne anusar arth uthata jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Sant ka prakatay hum sabhi ke liye hota hai,parantu vishvas, shradhha ka prakar apne apne anusar arth uthata jata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Antarik dusht pravartiyon se bachne ke liye akmatr Guru charan ashrey ka bul chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Antarik dusht pravartiyon se bachne ke liye akmatr Guru charan ashrey ka bul chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Koi baat nahi.
messages.fullText:
Koi baat nahi.
Hari om.

messages.text: Manojai ki sakriyata ke prayas hi jeevan hai,jagat jeetne ki kori kalpana mithyatv me hi raman karna hai.
messages.fullText:
Manojai ki sakriyata ke prayas hi jeevan hai,jagat jeetne ki kori kalpana mithyatv me hi raman karna hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang atm prakash ke uday ki pavas sthali hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang atm prakash ke uday ki pavas sthali hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan me krambadhhta chahiye,anyatha yeh bikhra bikhra hi reh jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan me krambadhhta chahiye,anyatha yeh bikhra bikhra hi reh jata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vishayon me asakti hi bandhan hai,anyatha hai hi mukti.
messages.fullText:
Vishayon me asakti hi bandhan hai,anyatha hai hi mukti.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvan ki shreshthtam abhivyakti pavitrata hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan ki shreshthtam abhivyakti pavitrata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki abhivyakti Brahm ko prakashit karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ki abhivyakti Brahm ko prakashit karti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamari chetna ka tul hi hamare liye vidhi nishedh ka nirnay karta hai,isse hi Guru anugreh ki divya prasadi kehte hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamari chetna ka tul hi hamare liye vidhi nishedh ka nirnay karta hai,isse hi Guru anugreh ki divya prasadi kehte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apne mool dharm me sthit hona hi manushya jeevan ka param kartavya hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne mool dharm me sthit hona hi manushya jeevan ka param kartavya hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Kal ke kalevar nitya badalte hai,ateh samay ka samman karte hue apne prati kathor rehna seekhen.
messages.fullText:
Kal ke kalevar nitya badalte hai,ateh samay ka samman karte hue apne prati kathor rehna seekhen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Mun ki aushadh akmatr satsang me hi milti hai,isse hi Guru anugreh kehte hai.
messages.fullText:
Mun ki aushadh akmatr satsang me hi milti hai,isse hi Guru anugreh kehte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bin vairagya ke sadhna akdam jad hoti hai,sharir ka gyan bhi atmgyan ke dwara hi sambhav hai.
messages.fullText:
Bin vairagya ke sadhna akdam jad hoti hai,sharir ka gyan bhi atmgyan ke dwara hi sambhav hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan apne aap me bahumulya dhan hai,ateh isse prapt hur cheej ka hum mulya samjh saken.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan apne aap me bahumulya dhan hai,ateh isse prapt hur cheej ka hum mulya samjh saken.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sant ka prakatay hum sabhi ke liye hota hai,parantu apni apni shradhha avam vishvas ke adhar per hum alag alag arth utha lete hai.
messages.fullText:
Sant ka prakatay hum sabhi ke liye hota hai,parantu apni apni shradhha avam vishvas ke adhar per hum alag alag arth utha lete hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare jeevan ki purnata karm(dharm),gyan aur bhakti ke samanvay me hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamare jeevan ki purnata karm(dharm),gyan aur bhakti ke samanvay me hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Chetna ka tul hi svateh do,s and don't,s ka nirnay karta hai,ye hi to sadguru ki divya anugreh prasadi hoti hai.
Guru kripa kewalam...
messages.fullText:
Chetna ka tul hi svateh do,s and don't,s ka nirnay karta hai,ye hi to sadguru ki divya anugreh prasadi hoti hai.
Guru kripa kewalam...
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Karm jeevan ko paribhashit karte hai,ateh hum apne dharm me satat rehne ka prayas karen.
messages.fullText:
Karm jeevan ko paribhashit karte hai,ateh hum apne dharm me satat rehne ka prayas karen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apne isht se duuri hi jeevan me bhay lati hai,ateh jeevan adhyatmik bune.
messages.fullText:
Apne isht se duuri hi jeevan me bhay lati hai,ateh jeevan adhyatmik bune.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki pratikulta ko utthan ki urja buna len,ye hi adhyatm hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki pratikulta ko utthan ki urja buna len,ye hi adhyatm hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Prakriti aur Purush ka vishleshan hi Vivek hai,jeev anek hain, Parmatma ak hai.
messages.fullText:
Prakriti aur Purush ka vishleshan hi Vivek hai,jeev anek hain, Parmatma ak hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Nitya vidyaman satta ko hi Satya kehte hai, jisme chetna hai navinyata, hai.
messages.fullText:
Nitya vidyaman satta ko hi Satya kehte hai, jisme chetna hai navinyata, hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru,Iishvar kal se pare ki satta hai,jinhen hum deh me rehte hue kabhi nahi samajh sakte.
messages.fullText:
Guru,Iishvar kal se pare ki satta hai,jinhen hum deh me rehte hue kabhi nahi samajh sakte.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare astitva me asatya,apavitr ke liye koi svikriti nahi hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamare astitva me asatya,apavitr ke liye koi svikriti nahi hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Andh kamnaon ka sainya dul hume jeevan paryant doudata rehta hai,ateh svayam ke bodh ki aur agrasarit hon.
messages.fullText:
Andh kamnaon ka sainya dul hume jeevan paryant doudata rehta hai,ateh svayam ke bodh ki aur agrasarit hon.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan apne aap me sarvadhik bahumulya dhan hai,ateh iss jeevan ko prapt pratyek cheej bahumulya hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan apne aap me sarvadhik bahumulya dhan hai,ateh iss jeevan ko prapt pratyek cheej bahumulya hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya hone ka arth hi hai -Brahm ki viratta,anantata ko labdh hona.yeh samarthya usse janm se hi prapt hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya hone ka arth hi hai -Brahm ki viratta,anantata ko labdh hona.yeh samarthya usse janm se hi prapt hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki rehani me absorb ho jana hi shishya ka saancha shishyatv hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ki rehani me absorb ho jana hi shishya ka saancha shishyatv hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Theek,beta.
messages.fullText:
Theek,beta.
Hari om.

messages.text: Vidyamayee jeevan hi jeevan hai,avidyamayee jeevan maran hai nirjeevita hai.
messages.fullText:
Vidyamayee jeevan hi jeevan hai,avidyamayee jeevan maran hai nirjeevita hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Drishyon ki anukulta v pratikulta hi sukh dukh hai.meri hi agyanta mere anand ko kho deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Drishyon ki anukulta v pratikulta hi sukh dukh hai.meri hi agyanta mere anand ko kho deti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru me puuri tareh absorb ho jana hi shishya ka saancha shishyatv hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru me puuri tareh absorb ho jana hi shishya ka saancha shishyatv hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Atmvat jeevan hi manushya deh ki anmolta ko Guru kripa svarup  samajh pata hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmvat jeevan hi manushya deh ki anmolta ko Guru kripa svarup  samajh pata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Svanveshna ke antim charan tuk pahunchne ke liye budhhi ki svasthta ka charam chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Svanveshna ke antim charan tuk pahunchne ke liye budhhi ki svasthta ka charam chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang hume apni moodh manyataon se hatata hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang hume apni moodh manyataon se hatata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jub bhi kabhi sadhna ka paripak hoga,to uski fulshruti anand hi hoga.
messages.fullText:
Jub bhi kabhi sadhna ka paripak hoga,to uski fulshruti anand hi hoga.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Koi baat nahi.
messages.fullText:
Koi baat nahi.
Hari om.

messages.text: Atmik samridhhi hi saanchhi samridhhi hai,jo puri charachar me akta ka anubhav karati hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmik samridhhi hi saanchhi samridhhi hai,jo puri charachar me akta ka anubhav karati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya anusandhan hi jeevan ka sarvocchh udeshya hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya anusandhan hi jeevan ka sarvocchh udeshya hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya ki aakul pyas hi hume manushya hone ka dharm samjhati hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya ki aakul pyas hi hume manushya hone ka dharm samjhati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Andh kamnaon ka sainya dul hume jeevan paryant doudata rehta hai,sadvichar me hi adrishya bul samahit hai.
messages.fullText:
Andh kamnaon ka sainya dul hume jeevan paryant doudata rehta hai,sadvichar me hi adrishya bul samahit hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang ki niranterta avidya ki paash ko shithil ker deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang ki niranterta avidya ki paash ko shithil ker deti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki maang svayam ke anand ruup ki aur loutna hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki maang svayam ke anand ruup ki aur loutna hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hume hamare hi hit ki baat bata ker durgati se bachate hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hume hamare hi hit ki baat bata ker durgati se bachate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hum mrit ko Chetan man ker baithe hai,bus ye hi gaflat hai.
messages.fullText:
Hum mrit ko Chetan man ker baithe hai,bus ye hi gaflat hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hriday gufa me Bhagvan naam satat chalte rehne se hi prakash hota hai,keval baharly prakalpon se nahi.

messages.text: Hamare jeevan ki purnata karm,gyan v bhakti ke samanvay me hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Satsang, vo prakash hai jisme hamare bhram,bhrantiyon ka nirmulan hone lagta hai.
messages.fullText:

messages.text: Mun ki nirmalta sadhak ki bahut badi punji hai.
messages.fullText:
Mun ki nirmalta sadhak ki bahut badi punji hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Theek,beta.
God bless you.
messages.fullText:
Theek,beta.
God bless you.
Hari om.

messages.text: Manushya ki Brahmakar vriti ho jana hi uska pratham Dharm hai.
messages.fullText:

Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Prasannta padarth,vyakti,ghatna sapeksh nahi apitu vichar sapeksh hai.
messages.fullText:
Prasannta padarth,vyakti,ghatna sapeksh nahi apitu vichar sapeksh hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Pehle buno aadmi,fir milenge aadmi,fir dikhenge aadmi.
messages.fullText:
Pehle buno aadmi,fir milenge aadmi,fir dikhenge aadmi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Guru Poornima ke param pavastam parv per sabhi ko anant anant shubh kamnayen.
Guru hamari param Dharmmayee adhyatmik maang hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru Poornima ke param pavastam parv per sabhi ko anant anant shubh kamnayen.
Guru hamari param Dharmmayee adhyatmik maang hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Ujalon ki upasna karen,atit ke andheron aur bhavishya ke agyat galiyaron me mut bhatko.
messages.fullText:
Ujalon ki upasna karen,atit ke andheron aur bhavishya ke agyat galiyaron me mut bhatko.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Atm Vidya hi saanchhi Vidya hai,jo hume yatharth ka bodh karati hai,Manya amanya me bhed batati hai.
messages.fullText:
Atm Vidya hi saanchhi Vidya hai,jo hume yatharth ka bodh karati hai,Manya amanya me bhed batati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke hur paksh ke liye mitvyayee hon,jeevani urja ko sambhalker vivekpurn hoker kharch karen,vicharvan rahen hur pul.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke hur paksh ke liye mitvyayee hon,jeevani urja ko sambhalker vivekpurn hoker kharch karen,vicharvan rahen hur pul.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke hur paksh ke liye mitvyayee hon,jeevani urja ko sambhalker vivekpurn hoker kharch karen,vicharvan rahen hur pul.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke hur paksh ke liye mitvyayee hon,jeevani urja ko sambhalker vivekpurn hoker kharch karen,vicharvan rahen hur pul.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya sidhhi ke liye keval Satya sune.
messages.fullText:
Satya sidhhi ke liye keval Satya sune.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka sang hume tyagpurvak sansar me rehne,isse bhogne ki vidha sikhata hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ka sang hume tyagpurvak sansar me rehne,isse bhogne ki vidha sikhata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Lokhitay,lokmanglay bhav v karya hi asal Bhajan hai.
messages.fullText:
Lokhitay,lokmanglay bhav v karya hi asal Bhajan hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Acchhi dharnaon ke saath Kam karne se Bhagvan pul pul sahayak hote hai.
messages.fullText:
Acchhi dharnaon ke saath Kam karne se Bhagvan pul pul sahayak hote hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhu parmarth hota hai,svabhav se hi sarvhitay bhav me rehta hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhu parmarth hota hai,svabhav se hi sarvhitay bhav me rehta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Saanchhi samadhi vahi hai,jahan turk kutark, sub shant ho jayen.
messages.fullText:
Saanchhi samadhi vahi hai,jahan turk kutark, sub shant ho jayen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Parmatma se jeevatma ke milan ka setu hai, sadhu Mahatma ,Guru.
messages.fullText:
Parmatma se jeevatma ke milan ka setu hai, sadhu Mahatma ,Guru.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya anantata ko labdh ho sakta hai ,jabki devtaon ki samarthya to simit si hai,Aisa suavsar hai hamare pass.
messages.fullText:
Manushya anantata ko labdh ho sakta hai ,jabki devtaon ki samarthya to simit si hai,Aisa suavsar hai hamare pass.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Aastha ki neenv jitni gehari hogi,utni hi Bhagvan ki kripa aur uske vidhan ki mangalmayta ka bodh hota rahega.
messages.fullText:
Aastha ki neenv jitni gehari hogi,utni hi Bhagvan ki kripa aur uske vidhan ki mangalmayta ka bodh hota rahega.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Mool bhakti satsang hai,poori imandari se Satya ka sang.....
messages.fullText:
Mool bhakti satsang hai,poori imandari se Satya ka sang.....
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Anand mun,budhhi,indriyon ki satta se pare hai,mun sukh dukh ke khel ka maidan hai.
messages.fullText:
Anand mun,budhhi,indriyon ki satta se pare hai,mun sukh dukh ke khel ka maidan hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvan ki viratta ka anubhav akmatr Guru ke hi anugreh se hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan ki viratta ka anubhav akmatr Guru ke hi anugreh se hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apne sadhan ke prati aknishtha rehni chahiye,tabhi hum  kucchh uuper uth pate hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne sadhan ke prati aknishtha rehni chahiye,tabhi hum  kucchh uuper uth pate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Nirvishayee sadhak ko hi parasatta ka sneh milta hai.
messages.fullText:
Nirvishayee sadhak ko hi parasatta ka sneh milta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Munn ki akagrata siddhh hue bagair Guru ke vachan theharte nahi,amliyat me aa nahi pate.
messages.fullText:
Munn ki akagrata siddhh hue bagair Guru ke vachan theharte nahi,amliyat me aa nahi pate.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki karunatmak kripa ka koi orr chor nahi hota,veh anant hai,apar apar ,athah athah hai.....
messages.fullText:
Guru ki karunatmak kripa ka koi orr chor nahi hota,veh anant hai,apar apar ,athah athah hai.....
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Gyani prakriti me karyon ko hota hua dekhta hai,karta nahi.
messages.fullText:
Gyani prakriti me karyon ko hota hua dekhta hai,karta nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik jagat ka sarvocchh sadhan hai,shravan.uske baad hi kucchh kucchh sanvar pata hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik jagat ka sarvocchh sadhan hai,shravan.uske baad hi kucchh kucchh sanvar pata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Yogi jeevan Poornima ka ujjas hai,jabki bhogi jeevan amavasya ka andhkar.
messages.fullText:
Yogi jeevan Poornima ka ujjas hai,jabki bhogi jeevan amavasya ka andhkar.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhakt use kehte hai,jiski astha ki neenv sudridh ho,fir Bhagvan ka hur ruup, vyavastha,vidhan mangalmayee bhasta hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhakt use kehte hai,jiski astha ki neenv sudridh ho,fir Bhagvan ka hur ruup, vyavastha,vidhan mangalmayee bhasta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru jeev ke jeevatv ko lay karke use purnata me avasthit karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru jeev ke jeevatv ko lay karke use purnata me avasthit karta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Prakriti aur Purush ka vishleshan hi Vivek hai,jeev anek hai, parantu Parmatma ak hai.
messages.fullText:
Prakriti aur Purush ka vishleshan hi Vivek hai,jeev anek hai, parantu Parmatma ak hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hriday gufa me satat naam chalne se hi vahan prakash hota hai,keval baharly sadhano se nahi.
messages.fullText:
Hriday gufa me satat naam chalne se hi vahan prakash hota hai,keval baharly sadhano se nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik jagat ka sarvocchh sadhan hai,shravan.tatpashchat hi kuchh kuchh sanvarna shuru ho pata hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik jagat ka sarvocchh sadhan hai,shravan.tatpashchat hi kuchh kuchh sanvarna shuru ho pata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Mun ka adhar Satya hai,Satya mun me nahi rehta,vo mun ke vilop me hai.
messages.fullText:
Mun ka adhar Satya hai,Satya mun me nahi rehta,vo mun ke vilop me hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya ko udhghatit ker lena hi iss manushya jeevan ka sarvocchh lakshya hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya ko udhghatit ker lena hi iss manushya jeevan ka sarvocchh lakshya hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya ko udhghatit ker lena hi manushya jeevan ka sarvocchh udeshya hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya ko udhghatit ker lena hi manushya jeevan ka sarvocchh udeshya hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru sarvatam bhav se sansar ko dekhne ki vidha sikhate hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru sarvatam bhav se sansar ko dekhne ki vidha sikhate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Munn,vachan,karm se ak rehne per anter bul badhta hai.
messages.fullText:
Munn,vachan,karm se ak rehne per anter bul badhta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vishayon se vimukhta ke liye antrik urja chahiye,ateh atm nishchay me rahen.
messages.fullText:
Vishayon se vimukhta ke liye antrik urja chahiye,ateh atm nishchay me rahen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru pradat gyan hi akmatr jeevan ko sthayee samadhan deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru pradat gyan hi akmatr jeevan ko sthayee samadhan deta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan moolyon ki kabhi avhelna na ho.paramparaon ka anugaman yug anusar hota chale.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan moolyon ki kabhi avhelna na ho.paramparaon ka anugaman yug anusar hota chale.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Shree Krishna Janmashtami ki shubh kamnayen.
Yeh pavastam divas hume Satya bodh ker apne janm ko sarthak karne ki prerna deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Shree Krishna Janmashtami ki shubh kamnayen.
Yeh pavastam divas hume Satya bodh ker apne janm ko sarthak karne ki prerna deta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru Puran Purush hote hai,unke dwara sarvatr Mangal hi ho raha hota hai.

Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Yatharthta hi vyakti ko apne svayam se parichit karvati hai.
messages.fullText:
Yatharthta hi vyakti ko apne svayam se parichit karvati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Shravan ka prakar gehan hue bagair saanche ruup me kuchh samajh nahi aa pata,ateh Iishvar Preeti hamare jeevan me utroter badhti chale.

Shravan ka prakar gehan hue bagair saanche ruup me kuchh samajh nahi aa pata,ateh Iishvar Preeti hamare jeevan me utroter badhti chale.
Guru sharnam.

messages.fullText:

Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Svayam ko jaan lena hi manushya deh ka sarvshresth udyam hai.
messages.fullText:
Svayam ko jaan lena hi manushya deh ka sarvshresth udyam hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sidhhantik nishtha hi gehan anubhuti me lati hai,iss nishtha ko Guru bul pradan karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Sidhhantik nishtha hi gehan anubhuti me lati hai,iss nishtha ko Guru bul pradan karta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Munn, vachan, karm se ak rehne per anter bul badhta hai,vishayon se vimukhta ke liye antrik bul chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Munn, vachan, karm se ak rehne per anter bul badhta hai,vishayon se vimukhta ke liye antrik bul chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru jeev ke jeevatv ko lay karke use purnata me avasthit karta hai.

Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang gyan yagya hota hai,jiski mahima Guru kripa se hi samajh aa pati hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang gyan yagya hota hai,jiski mahima Guru kripa se hi samajh aa pati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hamari aankhon se,hamari sugandhi se hamari chetna ke stur ko bhanp lete hai.

Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Avidya,aasakti ki paash bahut moti hai,use niranter Satya abhyas ke satatya se lay karne ki avashyakta hai.
messages.fullText:

Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Antrik kusang se bachne ke liye Guru sannidhi ke prabhav ka satatya chahiye.
messages.fullText:

Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvan anugreh sadhya hai,jabki sansar devta sadhan sadhya hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan anugreh sadhya hai,jabki sansar devta sadhan sadhya hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeev ruupi pushp apni mool dal per vapis lote bagair murjha jata hai .
messages.fullText:
Jeev ruupi pushp apni mool dal per vapis lote bagair murjha jata hai .

messages.text: Samay ruup ratn ka satat sadupyog hota rahe.
messages.fullText:
Samay ruup ratn ka satat sadupyog hota rahe.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Yeh Dharti gyan,vairagya avam bhakti ke liye hai.
messages.fullText:

Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik jagat ka sarvocchh sadhan hai,shravan.iske baad hi kucchh sanvar pata hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik jagat ka sarvocchh sadhan hai,shravan.iske baad hi kucchh sanvar pata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki pratikultaon ko apne utthan ki urja bana len.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki pratikultaon ko apne utthan ki urja bana len.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apni jhuthi ahmanyata ko apne vishudh aham tuk pahunchane ki prakriya ko hi yog kehte hai.
messages.fullText:

Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Munn ki nirmalta sadhak ki bahut badi punji hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Munn ki nirmalta sadhak ki bahut badi punji hoti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Prakriti ke antergat sub simit hai,jabki Iishvar ke chintan ke antergat hum anant ho jate hai.
messages.fullText:
Prakriti ke antergat sub simit hai,jabki Iishvar ke chintan ke antergat hum anant ho jate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hriday gufa me satat naam ka aadhar liye rehne se hi vahan prakash hota hai, keval baharly sadhano se nahi.
messages.fullText:
Hriday gufa me satat naam ka aadhar liye rehne se hi vahan prakash hota hai, keval baharly sadhano se nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Gyan,vairagya ke abhav me Bhakti pradarshan hi ho jati hai.

Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jagat ka satat badalte chalna hi iska mithyatv hai,yeh akmatr brahm ki hi sankalpana hai.
messages.fullText:

Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sabhi sadhno ki fulshruti hai,antehkaran ki shudhhi.
messages.fullText:
Sabhi sadhno ki fulshruti hai,antehkaran ki shudhhi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sansar ki vastu padarthon,drishyon me jo rus hai,Param ki vibhuti hai,ateh hum hur cheej ka samman v sadupyog karna seekhen.
messages.fullText:

Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Janm janmatron ke shubh karmo yani angreh se hi hume katha Nayak Sadguru milte hai.
messages.fullText:

Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik yatra ka satatya hi mukti ka ahsas karata hai.
messages.fullText:

Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya jeevan ke adhbudh samarthya ko uske Param Pita ne janm se hi pradan Kiya hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya jeevan ke adhbudh samarthya ko uske Param Pita ne janm se hi pradan Kiya hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan upasana hai,ateh use utsav ruup banalen.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan upasana hai,ateh use utsav ruup banalen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvan anugreh sadhya hai,sadhan sadhya nahi.sansar,devta sahan sadhya hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan anugreh sadhya hai,sadhan sadhya nahi.sansar,devta sahan sadhya hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatmik svasthya antas me navachar paida ker deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik svasthya antas me navachar paida ker deta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Acche bhavishya ki chinta na karen,uske liye bus vartman me sahi socch ke saath sahi karyon me salagn rahen.
messages.fullText:
Acche bhavishya ki chinta na karen,uske liye bus vartman me sahi socch ke saath sahi karyon me salagn rahen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Antarik kusang se bachne ke liye prabal sadhna chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Antarik kusang se bachne ke liye prabal sadhna chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hume drishya prapanch ko dekh vartan ki vidha sikhata hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hume drishya prapanch ko dekh vartan ki vidha sikhata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvat smriti hi hur rog ki divyatam aushadh hai,ateh svarup smriti me satat rahen.
messages.fullText:

Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru "Puran Purush" hote hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru "Puran Purush" hote hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya sabse bada prakash hai,usi ke abhav me hume jagat ka mithyatv dikh nahi pata.
messages.fullText:

Guru sharnam.

messages.fullText:

messages.text: Satya ke sang ki yatra ko samarpit rehna hi mukti hai.

Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Mrityu kramik ghatna hai,hur pul ghat rahi hai.samay ruup ratn ka sadupyog karen.
messages.fullText:
Mrityu kramik ghatna hai,hur pul ghat rahi hai.samay ruup ratn ka sadupyog karen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare yog Shem ko vahan karne ke liye Bhagvan hur yug me aate hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamare yog Shem ko vahan karne ke liye Bhagvan hur yug me aate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm keval baharly shiksha nahi,veh to jeevan jeene ki saanchhi kala hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm keval baharly shiksha nahi,veh to jeevan jeene ki saanchhi kala hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya ke adhbudh samarthya ko Bhagvan ne janm se hi pradan Kiya hai,kyonki veh Parmatma ki hi santan hai.
messages.fullText:

Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vichar ki gati me mati bhi shamil rehni chahiye,anyatha shabd ladkhadakar girne lagte hai.
messages.fullText:
Vichar ki gati me mati bhi shamil rehni chahiye,anyatha shabd ladkhadakar girne lagte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya ki aakul pyas ke liye hi Bhagvan hamare jeevan me Satguru bhej dete hai.
messages.fullText:
