Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Iishvar ki shreshthtam abhivyakti pavitrata hai.
messages.fullText:
Iishvar ki shreshthtam abhivyakti pavitrata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya ki urja apar apar,athah athah hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya ki urja apar apar,athah athah hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hum sub sansar ke khel me param Satya ko hi khoj rahe hai,bus Sadguru ka jeevan me agman hamari drishti ko bheetar hi vidyaman apne satyasvarup ki aur ker deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Hum sub sansar ke khel me param Satya ko hi khoj rahe hai,bus Sadguru ka jeevan me agman hamari drishti ko bheetar hi vidyaman apne satyasvarup ki aur ker deta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sansar tabhi tuk sukhi dukhi karta hai,jab talak atmbodh nahi hua.
messages.fullText:
Sansar tabhi tuk sukhi dukhi karta hai,jab talak atmbodh nahi hua.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Nitya vidyaman satta hi Satya hai,jisme chetna hai,navinyata hai.
messages.fullText:
Nitya vidyaman satta hi Satya hai,jisme chetna hai,navinyata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vidya hamare munn ko niyantrit karna sikhati hai.
messages.fullText:
Vidya hamare munn ko niyantrit karna sikhati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hamare jeevan ko surabhit ker lok parlok ko sanvarta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hamare jeevan ko surabhit ker lok parlok ko sanvarta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apne vichar ki gati me mati  bhi shamil honi chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Apne vichar ki gati me mati  bhi shamil honi chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Munn se vilag hone per hi hamari mukti hai.
messages.fullText:
Munn se vilag hone per hi hamari mukti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru vidhi vyavastha ka naam hai,jo hume sadaiv hit ki baat batla durgati se bachate hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru vidhi vyavastha ka naam hai,jo hume sadaiv hit ki baat batla durgati se bachate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bin vairagya sadhna jadvat hoti hai,ateh satsang ka satatya rahe.
messages.fullText:
Bin vairagya sadhna jadvat hoti hai,ateh satsang ka satatya rahe.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hamare hriday ke netr khol bhavrajni ke kalesh duur ker dete hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hamare hriday ke netr khol bhavrajni ke kalesh duur ker dete hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Lokik gyan hume jeevan nirvah ki samagri deta hai,jabki Raj Vidya hume jeevan deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Lokik gyan hume jeevan nirvah ki samagri deta hai,jabki Raj Vidya hume jeevan deta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvan ki charcha,vichar se shubh aur kya hoga,bus Satya ko janne ki icchha karen.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan ki charcha,vichar se shubh aur kya hoga,bus Satya ko janne ki icchha karen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Atmgyan sansar ki sarvshresth sampada hai,iske abhav me hi vyakti teen tapon se yukt hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmgyan sansar ki sarvshresth sampada hai,iske abhav me hi vyakti teen tapon se yukt hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Atmras suukh Jane per mansik vyadhi aati hai,ateh Satya se hi judav rakhen.
messages.fullText:
Atmras suukh Jane per mansik vyadhi aati hai,ateh Satya se hi judav rakhen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki sammukhta me vastvik Satya ko janne ke hi prashn karne chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Guru ki sammukhta me vastvik Satya ko janne ke hi prashn karne chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvan ka vidhan sarvatha nirdosh hai,unki kripa sadaiv hur jeev per hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan ka vidhan sarvatha nirdosh hai,unki kripa sadaiv hur jeev per hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Subkucchh Bhagvan ki kripa ka naam hai,,apni budhhi,shram,yukti ka yahan kucchh bhi nahi hai,ahankar avashya hai.
messages.fullText:
Subkucchh Bhagvan ki kripa ka naam hai,,apni budhhi,shram,yukti ka yahan kucchh bhi nahi hai,ahankar avashya hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sabhi sadhno ki fulshruti hai,antehkaran ki shudhhi .tabhi Guru vakyam ke murm khul pate hai.
messages.fullText:
Sabhi sadhno ki fulshruti hai,antehkaran ki shudhhi .tabhi Guru vakyam ke murm khul pate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sansar naam ruup se exist karta hai,Maya nartaki hai,sabko naam ruup me nachati hai.
messages.fullText:
Sansar naam ruup se exist karta hai,Maya nartaki hai,sabko naam ruup me nachati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Shubh ki hi icchha Karo,Iishvareey charcha,vichar se badh kar kya shubh ho sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Shubh ki hi icchha Karo,Iishvareey charcha,vichar se badh kar kya shubh ho sakta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki apurv ghatna hoti hai,ak jage hue Purush ka milna.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki apurv ghatna hoti hai,ak jage hue Purush ka milna.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Gyan ko nakar dene per jeevan shoonya ho jayega.
messages.fullText:
Gyan ko nakar dene per jeevan shoonya ho jayega.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apni moodh manyataon per hume satat karya ker unhen parishkrit karna chahiye.isime hamare jeevan ka utkarsh samahit hai.
messages.fullText:
Apni moodh manyataon per hume satat karya ker unhen parishkrit karna chahiye.isime hamare jeevan ka utkarsh samahit hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya janm ki durlabhta ka ahsas akmatr Sadguru kripa se hi ho pata hai,tub kahi hum unhi ke anugreh se uss rah per kuchh kuchh chal pate hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya janm ki durlabhta ka ahsas akmatr Sadguru kripa se hi ho pata hai,tub kahi hum unhi ke anugreh se uss rah per kuchh kuchh chal pate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Geeta liberation ki vidha hai,isse milne vala sukh akshay hai,kisi per ashrit nahi.
messages.fullText:
Geeta liberation ki vidha hai,isse milne vala sukh akshay hai,kisi per ashrit nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Antarik kusang se bachne ke liye niranter Guru ashrey chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Antarik kusang se bachne ke liye niranter Guru ashrey chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apne bheetar ke khalipun ko bharne ke liye hi hume baharli ashrayon ki  jaroorat hoti hai,ye khalipun akmatr svabodh se hi duur ho sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne bheetar ke khalipun ko bharne ke liye hi hume baharli ashrayon ki  jaroorat hoti hai,ye khalipun akmatr svabodh se hi duur ho sakta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvat prasang jeevan me atm nirikshan ka bul dete hai,tabhi atm prakash udwipan hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvat prasang jeevan me atm nirikshan ka bul dete hai,tabhi atm prakash udwipan hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bin vairagya sadhna jadvat hi hoti hai,usme chaitanyata nahi aa pati.
messages.fullText:
Bin vairagya sadhna jadvat hi hoti hai,usme chaitanyata nahi aa pati.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamari ahmanyata deh ki aur hone per patan v chaitanyata ki aur hone per jeevan ki sarthakta ko siddhh karne me sahayak ho jati hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamari ahmanyata deh ki aur hone per patan v chaitanyata ki aur hone per jeevan ki sarthakta ko siddhh karne me sahayak ho jati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vichar me adrishya samarthya samahit hota hai,isiliye manushya sharir ko Dharm sadhan kaha gaya hai.
messages.fullText:
Vichar me adrishya samarthya samahit hota hai,isiliye manushya sharir ko Dharm sadhan kaha gaya hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Rason me rus hai,akmatr Brahmrus.
Janm janmatron ke kucchh sukrityon ka hi ful hota hai,yani Bhagvateey anugreh .tabhi ak Mahabhagvat ka jeevan me pravesh.
messages.fullText:
Rason me rus hai,akmatr Brahmrus.
Janm janmatron ke kucchh sukrityon ka hi ful hota hai,yani Bhagvateey anugreh .tabhi ak Mahabhagvat ka jeevan me pravesh.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Ujalon ki upasna Karo,atit ke andheron aur bhavishya ke agyat galiyaron me mut bhatko.
Iss pul me jio.
messages.fullText:
Ujalon ki upasna Karo,atit ke andheron aur bhavishya ke agyat galiyaron me mut bhatko.
Iss pul me jio.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Antarik kusang se bachne ke liye prabal sadhna chahiye,tubhi hum jagriti me reh sakte hai.
messages.fullText:
Antarik kusang se bachne ke liye prabal sadhna chahiye,tubhi hum jagriti me reh sakte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhak apni chahat avam samarpan ke anurup hi Guru se pata chalta hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhak apni chahat avam samarpan ke anurup hi Guru se pata chalta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apne param Pita ke ghar ki lott hi manushya jeevan ka mool dhyey hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne param Pita ke ghar ki lott hi manushya jeevan ka mool dhyey hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vichar ki gati me mati bhi satat shamil rehni chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Vichar ki gati me mati bhi satat shamil rehni chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvat smriti hi hur rog ki aushadh hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvat smriti hi hur rog ki aushadh hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Maya nartaki hai,sabhiko naam ruup me nachati hai,ateh Mayapati ki sharan hi akmatr hamari rakshak hai .
messages.fullText:
Maya nartaki hai,sabhiko naam ruup me nachati hai,ateh Mayapati ki sharan hi akmatr hamari rakshak hai .
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Acchi dharnaon ke saath karya karne se Bhagvan pul pul sahayak hote hai.
messages.fullText:
Acchi dharnaon ke saath karya karne se Bhagvan pul pul sahayak hote hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvan se mila sub kucchh Bhagvan ko hi samarpit ker Prasad banalo,fir vo hume yathayogya deta hua hamare yog Shem ki pul pul sambhal karega.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan se mila sub kucchh Bhagvan ko hi samarpit ker Prasad banalo,fir vo hume yathayogya deta hua hamare yog Shem ki pul pul sambhal karega.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki pratikultaon ko utthan ki urja banalen,yeh akmatr Sadguru ashrey ke satatya se hi sambhav hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki pratikultaon ko utthan ki urja banalen,yeh akmatr Sadguru ashrey ke satatya se hi sambhav hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apni socchh,dharnayen,asakti ko barabar dekhte rehne ki jaroorat hai,ye hi utkarsh me sahayak banegi.
messages.fullText:
Apni socchh,dharnayen,asakti ko barabar dekhte rehne ki jaroorat hai,ye hi utkarsh me sahayak banegi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm keval bahar ki shiksha nahi,veh to jeevan jeene ki kala hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm keval bahar ki shiksha nahi,veh to jeevan jeene ki kala hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jub talak deh hai,tub talak adhyatmik yatra bhi chalti rahegi.
messages.fullText:
Jub talak deh hai,tub talak adhyatmik yatra bhi chalti rahegi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sharir ka gyan bhi atmgyan ke dwara hi sambhav hai.ye hi adhyatm hai.
messages.fullText:
Sharir ka gyan bhi atmgyan ke dwara hi sambhav hai.ye hi adhyatm hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Prakriti ke antergat sub simit hai,parantu Iishvareey chintan ke antergat hum anant ho jate hai.
messages.fullText:
Prakriti ke antergat sub simit hai,parantu Iishvareey chintan ke antergat hum anant ho jate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru shishya ke beech kabhi vinimay nahi hota,yeh to sansar me hota hai.ateh Guru ke prati sadaiv vinaysheel samarpan rehna chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Guru shishya ke beech kabhi vinimay nahi hota,yeh to sansar me hota hai.ateh Guru ke prati sadaiv vinaysheel samarpan rehna chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru prakash, samarthya,vidya stambh hote hai,ateh unke bolne per hume maun ho jana chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Guru prakash, samarthya,vidya stambh hote hai,ateh unke bolne per hume maun ho jana chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Mun ki aushadh akmatr satsang me milti hai.yahin se hum shubh sankalpit rehna seekhte hai.
messages.fullText:
Mun ki aushadh akmatr satsang me milti hai.yahin se hum shubh sankalpit rehna seekhte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Dhanya vahi hai,jo jagtik sukhon se virakt hoker satkaryon me salagn hain.
messages.fullText:
Dhanya vahi hai,jo jagtik sukhon se virakt hoker satkaryon me salagn hain.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Yatharthvadi ko hi jeevan ka sanchha sukh milta hai.
messages.fullText:
Yatharthvadi ko hi jeevan ka sanchha sukh milta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sadguru Bhavrog vaidya hai,ve ved vachan hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadguru Bhavrog vaidya hai,ve ved vachan hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Munn ki nirmalta sadhak ki bahut badi poonji hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Munn ki nirmalta sadhak ki bahut badi poonji hoti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vidya munn,budhii ka sanyaman,niyaman karna sikhati hai.
messages.fullText:
Vidya munn,budhii ka sanyaman,niyaman karna sikhati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Anant hi Satya hai,Satyanishth hi Dharmnishth hai.
messages.fullText:
Anant hi Satya hai,Satyanishth hi Dharmnishth hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Nitya vidyaman satta ko hi Satya kehte hai,Satya transparent hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Nitya vidyaman satta ko hi Satya kehte hai,Satya transparent hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru jeev ke jeevatv ko lay karke use purnata me avasthit karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru jeev ke jeevatv ko lay karke use purnata me avasthit karta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Param pujya guruvar ke   "Pavastam Shree Charan" agman ki sabhiko anant anant shubh kamnayen.....
messages.fullText:
Param pujya guruvar ke   "Pavastam Shree Charan" agman ki sabhiko anant anant shubh kamnayen.....
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki agya hi shishya ka dharm hai,aur uska palan hona chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Guru ki agya hi shishya ka dharm hai,aur uska palan hona chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Anant hi Satya hai,Satyanishth hi Dharmnishth hai.
messages.fullText:
Anant hi Satya hai,Satyanishth hi Dharmnishth hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hey anant ,tumhen pranam hai.sub ruupon me tu hi pasra hua hai.
messages.fullText:
Hey anant ,tumhen pranam hai.sub ruupon me tu hi pasra hua hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Param ko anubhut karne ke liye shradhha ruup alokik tatv chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Param ko anubhut karne ke liye shradhha ruup alokik tatv chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Han,beta usse search Karo.
Shukrane...
messages.fullText:
Han,beta usse search Karo.
Shukrane...
Hari om.

messages.text: Iishvar hi param pavitr hitkari ashrey hai,hum sabka, iss jagat me.
messages.fullText:
Iishvar hi param pavitr hitkari ashrey hai,hum sabka, iss jagat me.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka saar akmatr atmbodh me hi samahit hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka saar akmatr atmbodh me hi samahit hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hum sub iss sansar ke khel me Satya yani ussi Iishvar ko dhundh rahe hai.
messages.fullText:
Hum sub iss sansar ke khel me Satya yani ussi Iishvar ko dhundh rahe hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vidya yatharth ka bodh karati hai,jo manya avam amanya ka bhed karna sikhati hai.yeh shradhha,vinay , anushasan v sanyam se arjit hoti hai.
messages.fullText:
Vidya yatharth ka bodh karati hai,jo manya avam amanya ka bhed karna sikhati hai.yeh shradhha,vinay , anushasan v sanyam se arjit hoti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hume Bhav Pradesh me le aate hai,jahan adhyatmik tarangon ka bheetar se chupchap prasfutan hota chalta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hume Bhav Pradesh me le aate hai,jahan adhyatmik tarangon ka bheetar se chupchap prasfutan hota chalta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sant sannidhi jagat ke tamam prapanchon se aruchi ka bhav paida ker deti hai,isiliye satsang ki itni mahima kahi gayi hai.
messages.fullText:
Sant sannidhi jagat ke tamam prapanchon se aruchi ka bhav paida ker deti hai,isiliye satsang ki itni mahima kahi gayi hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vivekvan parinam ko dekhta hai,jabki sansari vyakti vartman me bhogon ki aur dekh lipayman rehta hai.
messages.fullText:
Vivekvan parinam ko dekhta hai,jabki sansari vyakti vartman me bhogon ki aur dekh lipayman rehta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya avasthit hi hamara sadaiv saath deta hai,aur ve keval Sadguru hi hote hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya avasthit hi hamara sadaiv saath deta hai,aur ve keval Sadguru hi hote hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Ashram me chintan ki shuddhta,charitr v achran ki pardarshita,svarup anubhuti ka abhyas chalta hai.
messages.fullText:
Ashram me chintan ki shuddhta,charitr v achran ki pardarshita,svarup anubhuti ka abhyas chalta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Maya ke andheron se uuper uthane ka samarthya akmatr Satguru me hi hota hai,ateh samarpit rahen.
messages.fullText:
Maya ke andheron se uuper uthane ka samarthya akmatr Satguru me hi hota hai,ateh samarpit rahen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna hamara svabhav bun jaye,charitr bun jaye.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna hamara svabhav bun jaye,charitr bun jaye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru jeevan ko akmatr Satya ke astitv se paribhashit karte hai,usse neeche sub amavasya ke pulande hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru jeevan ko akmatr Satya ke astitv se paribhashit karte hai,usse neeche sub amavasya ke pulande hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya anveshna ke antim charan tuk pahunchne ke liye budhhi ki svasthta ka charam chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Satya anveshna ke antim charan tuk pahunchne ke liye budhhi ki svasthta ka charam chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru charan ashrey ka sakar ruup hume Kai kai yug Jiva deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru charan ashrey ka sakar ruup hume Kai kai yug Jiva deta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhoutik utkarsh ke liye anekanek councellers avam coach hai ,kintu Dharm sangat jeevan ke liye akmatr Satguru chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Bhoutik utkarsh ke liye anekanek councellers avam coach hai ,kintu Dharm sangat jeevan ke liye akmatr Satguru chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya ki urja adhbudh hai.jeevan ka strot svayam jeevan hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya ki urja adhbudh hai.jeevan ka strot svayam jeevan hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka mool dhyey apne astitv ki aur lotna hai,anya kucchh aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka mool dhyey apne astitv ki aur lotna hai,anya kucchh aur nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvan ki charcha,vichar,chintan se badhkar kucchh shubh nahi.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan ki charcha,vichar,chintan se badhkar kucchh shubh nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jate hue varsh ke anant shikshano ke liye tahe hriday se shukrane avam aane vale varsh ke liye Satya sankalpit hone ka hum sub dridh sankalp karen.
messages.fullText:
Jate hue varsh ke anant shikshano ke liye tahe hriday se shukrane avam aane vale varsh ke liye Satya sankalpit hone ka hum sub dridh sankalp karen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Dushtata ka shaman akmatr sadhuta se hi sambhav hai,ateh jeevan Satya aaroodh rahe.
messages.fullText:
Dushtata ka shaman akmatr sadhuta se hi sambhav hai,ateh jeevan Satya aaroodh rahe.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki bhavtavyata me akmatr prarabdh hi kaam nahi karta,hamare aaj ke purusharth ki usme bahut badi bhoomika hai,ateh chalne ki disha sahi ho.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki bhavtavyata me akmatr prarabdh hi kaam nahi karta,hamare aaj ke purusharth ki usme bahut badi bhoomika hai,ateh chalne ki disha sahi ho.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Anter ki anargaltaon ko  satsang ruup Gyankund me aahut karte chalen,Guru anugreh use chinmay ker deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Anter ki anargaltaon ko  satsang ruup Gyankund me aahut karte chalen,Guru anugreh use chinmay ker deta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka hur sandarbh hume akmatr apne mool astitv se jodne vala hota hai,behkane vala nahi.
messages.fullText:
Guru ka hur sandarbh hume akmatr apne mool astitv se jodne vala hota hai,behkane vala nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki gatimanta hamare astitv se hai,ateh hum astitv abhimukh rahen.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki gatimanta hamare astitv se hai,ateh hum astitv abhimukh rahen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki saanchhi samridhi akmatr atmbodh me samahit hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki saanchhi samridhi akmatr atmbodh me samahit hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna ke samast prakaran mun ,budhii,andrik svasthta ke liye hai,taki hum udhrvgami ho saken.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna ke samast prakaran mun ,budhii,andrik svasthta ke liye hai,taki hum udhrvgami ho saken.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Bahut bahut shukrane beta.
Kafi paas hai.
messages.fullText:
Bahut bahut shukrane beta.
Kafi paas hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan se hi jeevan ka pradurbhav hai,kisi anya se nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan se hi jeevan ka pradurbhav hai,kisi anya se nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru jeev ke jeevatv ko lay ker use purnata me avasthit karte hai,ye hi to param ka iss jeev se sacchaa dular hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru jeev ke jeevatv ko lay ker use purnata me avasthit karte hai,ye hi to param ka iss jeev se sacchaa dular hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru sammukhta hume Satya bodh ke prati jagrukta ki tivrata ko veg de deti hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru sammukhta hume Satya bodh ke prati jagrukta ki tivrata ko veg de deti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru sannidhi ke Divya Prakash me hum anant sadiyan jee jate hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru sannidhi ke Divya Prakash me hum anant sadiyan jee jate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Atmbodh sansar ko sansar nahi,akmatr Brahm ka hi vistar hai,jahan nanatv ka nritya chal raha hai,samjha deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Atmbodh sansar ko sansar nahi,akmatr Brahm ka hi vistar hai,jahan nanatv ka nritya chal raha hai,samjha deta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna hamara svabhav,charitr bun jaye.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna hamara svabhav,charitr bun jaye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Koi baat nahi.
messages.fullText:
Koi baat nahi.
Hari om.

messages.text: Prakriti aur Purush ka vishleshan hi Vivek hai.
messages.fullText:
Prakriti aur Purush ka vishleshan hi Vivek hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ke gehantam kalyankari suutr akmatr guru ashrey me hi mil,anugreh se hi samajh aa pate hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ke gehantam kalyankari suutr akmatr guru ashrey me hi mil,anugreh se hi samajh aa pate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Saanchhi samadhi vahi hai jahan sub tark kutark bhay shok shant ho jayen.aadhi vyadhi me sum ho jayen.
messages.fullText:
Saanchhi samadhi vahi hai jahan sub tark kutark bhay shok shant ho jayen.aadhi vyadhi me sum ho jayen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan moolyon ki kabhi bhi avhelna na karen,samay hi Bhagvan hai,ateh mile hue samay ka aadar karen.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan moolyon ki kabhi bhi avhelna na karen,samay hi Bhagvan hai,ateh mile hue samay ka aadar karen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hum sub anant hona chahte hai,anantata hi hamara Dharm hai.
messages.fullText:
Hum sub anant hona chahte hai,anantata hi hamara Dharm hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Anand atindriya hai,mun,budhhi , indriyon se pare.padarth, vastu,dhan bahulya se saanche vaibhav samridhi ka bodh nahi ho pata.
messages.fullText:
Anand atindriya hai,mun,budhhi , indriyon se pare.padarth, vastu,dhan bahulya se saanche vaibhav samridhi ka bodh nahi ho pata.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvat ki shravanta apni anantata avam sanatanta ko labdh hone ki achhook aushadh hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvat ki shravanta apni anantata avam sanatanta ko labdh hone ki achhook aushadh hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Svarup bodh hi moksh hai,ateh satsang ki yatra ko samarpit rahen.
messages.fullText:
Svarup bodh hi moksh hai,ateh satsang ki yatra ko samarpit rahen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Deh ke pass janm mrityu ke sivay kucchh bhi aur nahi,sub kucchh to keval apni saanchhi pehchan me samahit hai,yani svaruup bodh.
messages.fullText:
Deh ke pass janm mrityu ke sivay kucchh bhi aur nahi,sub kucchh to keval apni saanchhi pehchan me samahit hai,yani svaruup bodh.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Satyamev Jayate.....
Guru ke iss pavas udghosh ke saath chalte rahen bus chalte rahen.
Gantantr Divas ki bahut bahut shubh kamnayen.
messages.fullText:
Satyamev Jayate.....
Guru ke iss pavas udghosh ke saath chalte rahen bus chalte rahen.
Gantantr Divas ki bahut bahut shubh kamnayen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ko sahi sahi ruup me sun lene per agyan,vyatha,dwand mitne lagte hai aur hum Bhav Pradesh me pravesh pate hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ko sahi sahi ruup me sun lene per agyan,vyatha,dwand mitne lagte hai aur hum Bhav Pradesh me pravesh pate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vivekvan parinam ko dekhta hai,jabki sansari vyakti parinam per vichar kiye bagair pratyaksh ke bhogon me lipayman rehta hai.
messages.fullText:
Vivekvan parinam ko dekhta hai,jabki sansari vyakti parinam per vichar kiye bagair pratyaksh ke bhogon me lipayman rehta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Maya hamare apne hi munn ka vistar hai,isse sahi disha me laga lene per sahi cheej vistar pati hai aur anargal jagah lagane per anargal.
messages.fullText:
Maya hamare apne hi munn ka vistar hai,isse sahi disha me laga lene per sahi cheej vistar pati hai aur anargal jagah lagane per anargal.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Bahut bahut shukrane,beta.
Ye hi hai,veh Mauni Maa...
messages.fullText:
Bahut bahut shukrane,beta.
Ye hi hai,veh Mauni Maa...
Hari om.

messages.text: Manush sharir hume akmatr anantata ke arjan ke liye mila hai.
messages.fullText:
Manush sharir hume akmatr anantata ke arjan ke liye mila hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya jeevan ki maang akmatr Anand hai,jise jeev ki bhranti baharly vishayon me dhoondh rahi hai jabki veh apne hi bheetar vishayon ke param,charam vishay me samahit hai,yani svasvarup.
messages.fullText:
Manushya jeevan ki maang akmatr Anand hai,jise jeev ki bhranti baharly vishayon me dhoondh rahi hai jabki veh apne hi bheetar vishayon ke param,charam vishay me samahit hai,yani svasvarup.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sant sangati bhogi pravarti me aruchi paida ker Satya aaroodhta me lati chalti hai.
messages.fullText:
Sant sangati bhogi pravarti me aruchi paida ker Satya aaroodhta me lati chalti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Mahapurushon ke  pass jeevan ke Divya mulya rehte hai,unka sang hume anushasit rakhta hai.
messages.fullText:
Mahapurushon ke  pass jeevan ke Divya mulya rehte hai,unka sang hume anushasit rakhta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang veh prakash hai,jahan hamare bhram,bhrantiyon ka nirmulan hone lagta hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang veh prakash hai,jahan hamare bhram,bhrantiyon ka nirmulan hone lagta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Tyag hi manushyatv hai,mann prashansa nahi.yahan ka kucchh bhi prapt thodi der timtima ker ast hone vala hai.
messages.fullText:
Tyag hi manushyatv hai,mann prashansa nahi.yahan ka kucchh bhi prapt thodi der timtima ker ast hone vala hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satguru Shree charno ki aur Jane vale Satya path ko hamara vinamr shastang pranam.
messages.fullText:
Satguru Shree charno ki aur Jane vale Satya path ko hamara vinamr shastang pranam.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vidya hamare Munn ko niyantrit karna sikhati hai.
messages.fullText:
Vidya hamare Munn ko niyantrit karna sikhati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Mujhe naaz hai ,apne sabhi bacchon per.
messages.fullText:
Mujhe naaz hai ,apne sabhi bacchon per.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jo jitna bhi apne svabhav ke aas paas hai,utna hi anandit hai.
messages.fullText:
Jo jitna bhi apne svabhav ke aas paas hai,utna hi anandit hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bahut bahut shukrane beta.....
messages.fullText:
Bahut bahut shukrane beta.....
Hari om.

messages.text: Sukh ke peeche peche dodne ka darshan ye hi hai,ki bin Anand ke labdh hue mujhe kabhi bhi vishranti nahi mil sakti,aur veh apne hi bheetar hai kahin bahar nahi.
messages.fullText:
Sukh ke peeche peche dodne ka darshan ye hi hai,ki bin Anand ke labdh hue mujhe kabhi bhi vishranti nahi mil sakti,aur veh apne hi bheetar hai kahin bahar nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru pradat vicharon me apar bul hota hai,jo hume, andh kamnaon ke dul ke peeche bhagne nahi deta.
messages.fullText:
Guru pradat vicharon me apar bul hota hai,jo hume, andh kamnaon ke dul ke peeche bhagne nahi deta.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Prayashtit se shuchita ka sanskar udit hota hai,ateh yeh anivarya prakriya hai ak sadhak ke jeevan me.
messages.fullText:
Prayashtit se shuchita ka sanskar udit hota hai,ateh yeh anivarya prakriya hai ak sadhak ke jeevan me.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya ki siddhi hi purnata ka anubhav Kara sakti hai,ye hi to Guru ki Divya mahaprasadi hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya ki siddhi hi purnata ka anubhav Kara sakti hai,ye hi to Guru ki Divya mahaprasadi hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ka sanchha Gyan hur pul sundertam vidhaon ke saath hume utroter aage badhte chalne ka shikshan deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ka sanchha Gyan hur pul sundertam vidhaon ke saath hume utroter aage badhte chalne ka shikshan deta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki sabse apurv ghatna hoti hai,ak jage hue Purush ka milna,jo sidhhi de,sari kamnaon me adhyatm ki aag jala de.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki sabse apurv ghatna hoti hai,ak jage hue Purush ka milna,jo sidhhi de,sari kamnaon me adhyatm ki aag jala de.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvat abhimukhta hume mansik avam dehik shuchita pradan karti hai,taki hum apne mool kartavya se kabhi bhi deviate na hon.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvat abhimukhta hume mansik avam dehik shuchita pradan karti hai,taki hum apne mool kartavya se kabhi bhi deviate na hon.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare drishyon,shravan,Khan pan ka aahar hamare viratt ya shudr vyaktitv ka gathan karta hai,ateh adhyatmik abhyasi pug  pug per satark reh apne kartavya ke prati aknishth rahe .
messages.fullText:
Hamare drishyon,shravan,Khan pan ka aahar hamare viratt ya shudr vyaktitv ka gathan karta hai,ateh adhyatmik abhyasi pug  pug per satark reh apne kartavya ke prati aknishth rahe .
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ke gyan ke antrang hone ke liye Guru se gehan tadatmay chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Guru ke gyan ke antrang hone ke liye Guru se gehan tadatmay chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apne samay ke vishay me svayam se ak ak pul ka hisab mange,veh kahan, kis ruup me kharch ho raha hai,kyon ki yehi hamara aage ka jeevan hone vala hai,iss janm ke bache hue shano ka aur bhavi jeevan ka bhi.
messages.fullText:
Apne samay ke vishay me svayam se ak ak pul ka hisab mange,veh kahan, kis ruup me kharch ho raha hai,kyon ki yehi hamara aage ka jeevan hone vala hai,iss janm ke bache hue shano ka aur bhavi jeevan ka bhi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvad Geeta avsad se Anand ke aur ki yatra hai,yeh Anand satyanishtha me samahit hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvad Geeta avsad se Anand ke aur ki yatra hai,yeh Anand satyanishtha me samahit hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Ahmanyata ka abhav,kartapun,mamtapun ka abhav hume Iishvar sannidhi me le aata hai,ateh akmatr hum Hari Charan ashrey me hi reh saken,aise hamare prayas hon.
messages.fullText:
Ahmanyata ka abhav,kartapun,mamtapun ka abhav hume Iishvar sannidhi me le aata hai,ateh akmatr hum Hari Charan ashrey me hi reh saken,aise hamare prayas hon.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jo hamare abodh,aprapya,abhav ko duur kar de,vahi Guru hain.
messages.fullText:
Jo hamare abodh,aprapya,abhav ko duur kar de,vahi Guru hain.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Maya hamare hi munn ka vistar hai,tino gun mun ki hi upaj hai.
messages.fullText:
Maya hamare hi munn ka vistar hai,tino gun mun ki hi upaj hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sant,satsang hume Bhagvat kripa se milte hai,prarabdh se nahi. prarabdh se to sukh dukh aate hai,jinka nirmulan sadguru kripa se satsang me baith ker hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Sant,satsang hume Bhagvat kripa se milte hai,prarabdh se nahi. prarabdh se to sukh dukh aate hai,jinka nirmulan sadguru kripa se satsang me baith ker hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Samay ko niranter sundertam banane ka prayas ho,usme acchi acchi yojnayen dalen,vyarth ki baaten, shikva shikayt,glani na ho.
messages.fullText:
Samay ko niranter sundertam banane ka prayas ho,usme acchi acchi yojnayen dalen,vyarth ki baaten, shikva shikayt,glani na ho.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Ahmanyata,kartapan,mamta ka abhav hi hume Iishvar ke samip le aata hai.
messages.fullText:
Ahmanyata,kartapan,mamta ka abhav hi hume Iishvar ke samip le aata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Pul bhar ka kusang hi kaliyug bun jata hai,mati ko kala ker deta hai.
messages.fullText:
Pul bhar ka kusang hi kaliyug bun jata hai,mati ko kala ker deta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Devta keval sukh dete hai,jabki Guru hume chiranjeevi Anand dete hai,atmik vaibhav se ott prott ker dete hai.
messages.fullText:
Devta keval sukh dete hai,jabki Guru hume chiranjeevi Anand dete hai,atmik vaibhav se ott prott ker dete hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamara vaidik Dharm hume karm,upasna ka svatantray deta hai,jaisi jaisi vasna manushya ke bheetar hoti hai,anurup Bhagvan ruup dharan karte hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamara vaidik Dharm hume karm,upasna ka svatantray deta hai,jaisi jaisi vasna manushya ke bheetar hoti hai,anurup Bhagvan ruup dharan karte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamara mool svabhav hi hamara Dharm hai.shant chit,sthir chit avam prasann chit rehna hi hamara dharm hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamara mool svabhav hi hamara Dharm hai.shant chit,sthir chit avam prasann chit rehna hi hamara dharm hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jab bhi kabhi sadhna ka paripak hoga,to uski fulshruti Anand hi hoga,jiska svabhav akhand hi hai.ateh Satya nishth rahen .
messages.fullText:
Jab bhi kabhi sadhna ka paripak hoga,to uski fulshruti Anand hi hoga,jiska svabhav akhand hi hai.ateh Satya nishth rahen .
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Satya nishtha se badhkar jeevan ka koi anya abhushan nahi.
Sacche Guru ke jeevan me aagman se badhkar koi anya uplabdhi nahi.
messages.fullText:
Satya nishtha se badhkar jeevan ka koi anya abhushan nahi.
Sacche Guru ke jeevan me aagman se badhkar koi anya uplabdhi nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamara mool svabhav hi hamara Dharm hai yani apni viratta me aate chalna.
messages.fullText:
Hamara mool svabhav hi hamara Dharm hai yani apni viratta me aate chalna.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki maang akmatr svayam ke anand ki aur lotna hai,anya kucchh bhi aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki maang akmatr svayam ke anand ki aur lotna hai,anya kucchh bhi aur nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ke gyan ke antrang hone ke liye unse hamara gehan tadatmay rehna chahiye,tabhi anter granthiyan khul pati hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ke gyan ke antrang hone ke liye unse hamara gehan tadatmay rehna chahiye,tabhi anter granthiyan khul pati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hume hamesha purnata ki aur badhne ke liye prerit karte hai jabki sansar me reh hum svayam ko adhogati ki aur le ja rahe hote hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hume hamesha purnata ki aur badhne ke liye prerit karte hai jabki sansar me reh hum svayam ko adhogati ki aur le ja rahe hote hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Mrityu kramik ghatna hai,hur pul ghat rahi hai,ateh samay ruup ratn ka sadupyog karen.
messages.fullText:
Mrityu kramik ghatna hai,hur pul ghat rahi hai,ateh samay ruup ratn ka sadupyog karen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Moh ki shayta hi moksh hai,ateh Hari charno ka satat ashrey liye rahen.
messages.fullText:
Moh ki shayta hi moksh hai,ateh Hari charno ka satat ashrey liye rahen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vichar ki kasauti hai,Satya ki paripurnata.
messages.fullText:
Vichar ki kasauti hai,Satya ki paripurnata.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Akmatr Gyan hi hume hur kahin apni svayam ki samridhi me rakhta hai.
messages.fullText:
Akmatr Gyan hi hume hur kahin apni svayam ki samridhi me rakhta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang veh prakash hai, jahan hamare bhram, bhrantiyon v avgyan ka shaman hone lagta hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang veh prakash hai, jahan hamare bhram, bhrantiyon v avgyan ka shaman hone lagta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm hamare vision ko clearity deker shravan ki gehanta ke liye taiyar karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm hamare vision ko clearity deker shravan ki gehanta ke liye taiyar karta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Vyakti ka badappan uske mahan vicharon avam achran se banta hai.
messages.fullText:
Vyakti ka badappan uske mahan vicharon avam achran se banta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang vo sarvocchh sadhan hai, jo hume Satya abhimukh ker deh aur dehon ki asakti se uuper uthane me sarvsamarth hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang vo sarvocchh sadhan hai, jo hume Satya abhimukh ker deh aur dehon ki asakti se uuper uthane me sarvsamarth hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru,Sant Mahatmano ki sannidhi hume ujjalon me,prakash me snan karva deti hai anyatha hum andheron me hi rehte hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru,Sant Mahatmano ki sannidhi hume ujjalon me,prakash me snan karva deti hai anyatha hum andheron me hi rehte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa hi kewalam.....
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa hi kewalam.....
Hari om.

messages.text: Vichar ki gati me mati bhi shamil rehni chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Vichar ki gati me mati bhi shamil rehni chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Sarvotam koti ka sadhan hai,samarpan.ateh Bhagvan barabar hume kehte hai apni mun,budhhi ko akmatr mera ashrey de.
Navratri Mahaparv ke shubh arambh ki anant shubh kamnayen.
messages.fullText:
Sarvotam koti ka sadhan hai,samarpan.ateh Bhagvan barabar hume kehte hai apni mun,budhhi ko akmatr mera ashrey de.
Navratri Mahaparv ke shubh arambh ki anant shubh kamnayen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Shukrane,beta.
Abhi theharker bhejna,2-1 din baad.malum nahi kya mun stithi hai.
messages.fullText:
Shukrane,beta.
Abhi theharker bhejna,2-1 din baad.malum nahi kya mun stithi hai.
Hari om.

messages.text: Agyanta,moh ki pash bahut moti hai,ateh use niranter Satya abhyas se lay karne ki avashyakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Agyanta,moh ki pash bahut moti hai,ateh use niranter Satya abhyas se lay karne ki avashyakta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru Bhagvan ke pratinidhi hote hai,ve hamare bheeter Narayan ki pratishtha karte hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru Bhagvan ke pratinidhi hote hai,ve hamare bheeter Narayan ki pratishtha karte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Shravan Sagar svarup ho hamara,Satya ka shravan hi hume jeevan me gehrai ki aur le jane me sahayak hai.
messages.fullText:
Shravan Sagar svarup ho hamara,Satya ka shravan hi hume jeevan me gehrai ki aur le jane me sahayak hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya ki samast cheshtayen bahirmukh hoti hai,parantu jab vo bheeter ki aur mudta hai to sadhak kehlata hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya ki samast cheshtayen bahirmukh hoti hai,parantu jab vo bheeter ki aur mudta hai to sadhak kehlata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang Brahmyagya hai,jahan hamare jeevan ki abujhi paheliyon ko hul milta hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang Brahmyagya hai,jahan hamare jeevan ki abujhi paheliyon ko hul milta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare karmo se hi hamara jeevan paribhashit hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamare karmo se hi hamara jeevan paribhashit hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Ahmanyata ka jhukav deh ki aur hone per patan ka dwar khul jata hai,jabki vishudh chaitanyata ki aur hone per jeevan ki sarthakta ko siddhh karne me hetu bun jata hai .
messages.fullText:
Ahmanyata ka jhukav deh ki aur hone per patan ka dwar khul jata hai,jabki vishudh chaitanyata ki aur hone per jeevan ki sarthakta ko siddhh karne me hetu bun jata hai .
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apne svaruup ki aur gatiman rehne per hi hum shaleen,shuddh avam vinaysheel reh sakte hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne svaruup ki aur gatiman rehne per hi hum shaleen,shuddh avam vinaysheel reh sakte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hamare bheeter utsah,umang jagane ke liye aaj ke yug ke anusar katha prasangon ka vivechan karte hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hamare bheeter utsah,umang jagane ke liye aaj ke yug ke anusar katha prasangon ka vivechan karte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang Brahmyagya hai,iski mahima sadguru kripa se hi samajh aa pati hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang Brahmyagya hai,iski mahima sadguru kripa se hi samajh aa pati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sadguru vachan hamare yatharth bodh me pravesh ke dwar khol dete hai,bus hum vahan aarudh ho saken.
messages.fullText:
Sadguru vachan hamare yatharth bodh me pravesh ke dwar khol dete hai,bus hum vahan aarudh ho saken.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru shrddha ruup tatv me nivas karte hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru shrddha ruup tatv me nivas karte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jagat ke mithyatv ka bodh hone per yeh lay hone lagta hai,aur tub Brahm v uska hi vistar bhasne lagta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jagat ke mithyatv ka bodh hone per yeh lay hone lagta hai,aur tub Brahm v uska hi vistar bhasne lagta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bheeter ka khalipun kabhi bhi baharli cheejon se nahi bhara ja sakta,use keval bheeter ke sabal sarthak vichar se hi tript Kiya ja sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Bheeter ka khalipun kabhi bhi baharli cheejon se nahi bhara ja sakta,use keval bheeter ke sabal sarthak vichar se hi tript Kiya ja sakta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Aaj vali mut dalna,beta.
messages.fullText:
Aaj vali mut dalna,beta.
Hari om.

messages.text: Adhyatmik utkarsh ki sambhavnaon ko hamara jhutha aham chur chur karke rakh deta hai,ateh isse bachen.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatmik utkarsh ki sambhavnaon ko hamara jhutha aham chur chur karke rakh deta hai,ateh isse bachen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Acchhi dharnao ke saath karya hone se Bhagvan pul pul sahayak hote hai.
messages.fullText:
Acchhi dharnao ke saath karya hone se Bhagvan pul pul sahayak hote hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm me keval Satya ke liye hi sthan hai,maayik cheej ke liye nahi.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm me keval Satya ke liye hi sthan hai,maayik cheej ke liye nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Iishvar ki shreshthtam abhivyakti hai,Pavitrata.
messages.fullText:
Iishvar ki shreshthtam abhivyakti hai,Pavitrata.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Deh ke pass janm mrityu ke sivay kucchh bhi aur nahi hai,iska pata hume svanse deti hai,jo aati hai aur jati hai.
messages.fullText:
Deh ke pass janm mrityu ke sivay kucchh bhi aur nahi hai,iska pata hume svanse deti hai,jo aati hai aur jati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Andrik chapalta hume kabhi bhi shant nahi rehne deti,isiliye Gurujan hume aahar,vihar avam nihar ke sanyaman niyaman ki baat batate hai.
messages.fullText:
Andrik chapalta hume kabhi bhi shant nahi rehne deti,isiliye Gurujan hume aahar,vihar avam nihar ke sanyaman niyaman ki baat batate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvan,Mahapurush,Gurujano per avishvas hi hamara durbhagya bun jata hai .
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan,Mahapurush,Gurujano per avishvas hi hamara durbhagya bun jata hai .
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang ki niranterta hume hamari moodh manyataon se hatati hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang ki niranterta hume hamari moodh manyataon se hatati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Maya ke andheron se hume uuper uthane ka samarthya akmatr Satguru me hi hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Maya ke andheron se hume uuper uthane ka samarthya akmatr Satguru me hi hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Maya ke galiyaron me itna andhera rehta hai ki vahan hum kucchh bhi sahi sahi ruup me dekh nahi pate.
messages.fullText:
Maya ke galiyaron me itna andhera rehta hai ki vahan hum kucchh bhi sahi sahi ruup me dekh nahi pate.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhoutik utkarsh ke liye anekanek councellors hai, lekin saanche Dharm ko janne ke liye akmatr Satguru hai .
messages.fullText:
Bhoutik utkarsh ke liye anekanek councellors hai, lekin saanche Dharm ko janne ke liye akmatr Satguru hai .
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Manush tun hi veh achhook nauka hai,jo hume asatya lok se Satya lok me pahunchane me sarv samarth hai,yeh raaj Guru Shree charan sharan me hi khulta hai.
messages.fullText:
Manush tun hi veh achhook nauka hai,jo hume asatya lok se Satya lok me pahunchane me sarv samarth hai,yeh raaj Guru Shree charan sharan me hi khulta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text:
Vichar,Vivek ki sadhna bahut badi sadhna hai .
Hamara sabhi ke prati apeksha rahit drishtikon rehna chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Vichar,Vivek ki sadhna bahut badi sadhna hai .
Hamara sabhi ke prati apeksha rahit drishtikon rehna chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apne bheeter ke khalipun ko bharne ke liye hum bahar ke saman, vyakti,ghtnaon ka ashrey liye rehte hai,jabki veh khalipun akmatr Iishvar abhimukhta se hi bhar sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Apne bheeter ke khalipun ko bharne ke liye hum bahar ke saman, vyakti,ghtnaon ka ashrey liye rehte hai,jabki veh khalipun akmatr Iishvar abhimukhta se hi bhar sakta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apni jhuthi ahmanyata ko apni vishuddh ahmanyata tuk pahunchane ka naam hi yog hai.
messages.fullText:
Apni jhuthi ahmanyata ko apni vishuddh ahmanyata tuk pahunchane ka naam hi yog hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Prakriti ke antergat sub siimit hai,parantu Iishvar ke chintan ke antergat hum anant ho jate hai .
messages.fullText:
Prakriti ke antergat sub siimit hai,parantu Iishvar ke chintan ke antergat hum anant ho jate hai .
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Han Aisa hi ker do,ak ki to baad me hai .
messages.fullText:
Han Aisa hi ker do,ak ki to baad me hai .
Hari sharnam.

messages.text: Vahi vyakti hamara sada saath deta hai,jo Satya ke saath ho.
messages.fullText:
Vahi vyakti hamara sada saath deta hai,jo Satya ke saath ho.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru hume drishti v disha dete hai,tabhi hamare jeevan me sudhar aana shuru ho pata hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru hume drishti v disha dete hai,tabhi hamare jeevan me sudhar aana shuru ho pata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvat Geeta hume Akshay sukh ka pata deti hai,jo kisi ashrey se nahi apitu svayam ke bodh se hai.yeh hume nirbhay banati hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvat Geeta hume Akshay sukh ka pata deti hai,jo kisi ashrey se nahi apitu svayam ke bodh se hai.yeh hume nirbhay banati hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apni dincharya me Bhagvat vismaran ak pul ko bhi na ho,aise hamare prayas rahen, kyonki tamam vipatiyon ka karan akmatr vismaran hi hai.
messages.fullText:
Apni dincharya me Bhagvat vismaran ak pul ko bhi na ho,aise hamare prayas rahen, kyonki tamam vipatiyon ka karan akmatr vismaran hi hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya ka prakash hi aakar me pragat hona chahta hai,aur use jeevan deta hai,aur svayam ko samet nirjeev bhi bana deta hai.ateh mili svanson ki hum keemat karen.
messages.fullText:
Satya ka prakash hi aakar me pragat hona chahta hai,aur use jeevan deta hai,aur svayam ko samet nirjeev bhi bana deta hai.ateh mili svanson ki hum keemat karen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Manveey deh se beshkimti koi aur cheej iss dharti per nahi hai.ateh isse sarthak karne me hum salagn rahen .
messages.fullText:
Manveey deh se beshkimti koi aur cheej iss dharti per nahi hai.ateh isse sarthak karne me hum salagn rahen .
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sukh dukh ruup dwandon me jhulne vali cheej ka naam hi mun hai.
messages.fullText:
Sukh dukh ruup dwandon me jhulne vali cheej ka naam hi mun hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Pavitr mun sabse bada Tirth hai.
messages.fullText:
Pavitr mun sabse bada Tirth hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamare shubh karm hi jeevan me hamara saath dete hai,baki sub jahan me dheere dheere saath chodte jate hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamare shubh karm hi jeevan me hamara saath dete hai,baki sub jahan me dheere dheere saath chodte jate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Adhyatm me keval Satya ke liye hi sthan hota hai ,maayik cheej ke liye nahi.
messages.fullText:
Adhyatm me keval Satya ke liye hi sthan hota hai ,maayik cheej ke liye nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru vidhi vyavastha ka naam hai,ve hume sadaiv hamare hi hit ki baat batate hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru vidhi vyavastha ka naam hai,ve hume sadaiv hamare hi hit ki baat batate hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru kripa hi kewalam.....
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa hi kewalam.....
Hari om.

messages.text:
Bahut bahut sunder...
Guru kripa hi kewalam.....
messages.fullText:
Bahut bahut sunder...
Guru kripa hi kewalam.....
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru ki abhivyakti akmatr Brahm ko prakashit karti hai,kyonki ve Brahm se itar kucchh aur nahi.
messages.fullText:
Guru ki abhivyakti akmatr Brahm ko prakashit karti hai,kyonki ve Brahm se itar kucchh aur nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Mrityu kramik ghatna hai,jo hur pul ghat rahi hai,ateh samay ruup ratn ka sadupyog karen.
messages.fullText:
Mrityu kramik ghatna hai,jo hur pul ghat rahi hai,ateh samay ruup ratn ka sadupyog karen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bahut sunder.....
messages.fullText:
Bahut sunder.....
Hari om.

messages.text: Guru kripa hi kewalam.....
messages.fullText:
Guru kripa hi kewalam.....
Hari om.

messages.text: Bhagvan ki charcha,vichar se badh kar kucchh aur shubh ho hi nahi sakta.sari shubhta issime samahit hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan ki charcha,vichar se badh kar kucchh aur shubh ho hi nahi sakta.sari shubhta issime samahit hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Munn dwait ke khilono ka samucchay hai,jisme sukh dukh,labh Hani,man apman,Khushi gum hai.mere hi astitva se ye mujh per hi bun baitha hai.Atm Gyan hi iska upchar hai.
messages.fullText:
Munn dwait ke khilono ka samucchay hai,jisme sukh dukh,labh Hani,man apman,Khushi gum hai.mere hi astitva se ye mujh per hi bun baitha hai.Atm Gyan hi iska upchar hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jagat matraon ke aadhar se hi santulit reh pata hai.ateh hum matragya bane.
messages.fullText:
Jagat matraon ke aadhar se hi santulit reh pata hai.ateh hum matragya bane.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvad Geeta  liberation ki Vidya hai,yeh hume Akshay sukh deti hai,kyon ki yeh kisi per bahar ashrit nahi.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvad Geeta  liberation ki Vidya hai,yeh hume Akshay sukh deti hai,kyon ki yeh kisi per bahar ashrit nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya anadi kal se hai,nitya vidyaman satta ko hi Satya kehte hai.satya me avran nahi hote,veh pardarshi hota hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya anadi kal se hai,nitya vidyaman satta ko hi Satya kehte hai.satya me avran nahi hote,veh pardarshi hota hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya bodh ker apne asal ghar me aa jao,anyatha hum din- rat svapnik mithya duniya me hi bhatakte rehte hai,ye hi Gurudev ki nitya goonj hai.
messages.fullText:
Satya bodh ker apne asal ghar me aa jao,anyatha hum din- rat svapnik mithya duniya me hi bhatakte rehte hai,ye hi Gurudev ki nitya goonj hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang ki niranterta avidya ki paash ko shithil karti jati hai v hum Iishvar ki sarv shreshthta, madhurta,balishthta ki kalpanao me jee uthte hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang ki niranterta avidya ki paash ko shithil karti jati hai v hum Iishvar ki sarv shreshthta, madhurta,balishthta ki kalpanao me jee uthte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satya anusandhan hi hur tareh ki prapti me sahayak hai,ateh Satya anugami rahen.
messages.fullText:
Satya anusandhan hi hur tareh ki prapti me sahayak hai,ateh Satya anugami rahen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ka saanchha samadhan vahi hai,jahan tark kutark sub shant ho jayen.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ka saanchha samadhan vahi hai,jahan tark kutark sub shant ho jayen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jagat marichika saman hai,hamare bahirmukh abhyas ne hi hume apurnata,abhav me rakha hua hai.
messages.fullText:
Jagat marichika saman hai,hamare bahirmukh abhyas ne hi hume apurnata,abhav me rakha hua hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeev mun ke saath rehne se hi teen kaleshon se yukt hai ,safal jeevan vahi hai jo apne bhram,bhay,sanshay ka samay se naash ker le .
messages.fullText:
Jeev mun ke saath rehne se hi teen kaleshon se yukt hai ,safal jeevan vahi hai jo apne bhram,bhay,sanshay ka samay se naash ker le .
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Prasannta,Anand ki janani hai,akmatr Atm Gyan,koi vastu padarth vyakti nahi.ateh hamare prayas Bhagvat prapti ki disha me hote rehne chahiye.
messages.fullText:
Prasannta,Anand ki janani hai,akmatr Atm Gyan,koi vastu padarth vyakti nahi.ateh hamare prayas Bhagvat prapti ki disha me hote rehne chahiye.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Koi baat nahi.
messages.fullText:
Koi baat nahi.
Hari om.

messages.text: Jeevan ki bagdor Guru ke haath me diye rehne se atm  nirikshan ka bul milta rehta hai,aur apni moodh manyataon per prahar hota rehta hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki bagdor Guru ke haath me diye rehne se atm  nirikshan ka bul milta rehta hai,aur apni moodh manyataon per prahar hota rehta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvat ashrey hi saanchha ashrey hai,vahi hamara sada saath de sakta hai jo Satya ke saath hai,ve hai akmatr Satguru.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvat ashrey hi saanchha ashrey hai,vahi hamara sada saath de sakta hai jo Satya ke saath hai,ve hai akmatr Satguru.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Mun ke saath rehne vala hi jeev hai,use sadaiv teen taap salte rehte hai.ateh satyamukhi rahen.
messages.fullText:
Mun ke saath rehne vala hi jeev hai,use sadaiv teen taap salte rehte hai.ateh satyamukhi rahen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvat granth ,disha bodhak hai per Guru mukh se sun ker hi akmatr inhen samjha ja sakta hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvat granth ,disha bodhak hai per Guru mukh se sun ker hi akmatr inhen samjha ja sakta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvan,Mahapurush,Guru jano per  avishvas hi hamara durbhagya bun jata hai.Bhagvat smriti hi hur rog ki aushadh hai.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan,Mahapurush,Guru jano per  avishvas hi hamara durbhagya bun jata hai.Bhagvat smriti hi hur rog ki aushadh hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ki suhridayta hi shishya ke jeevan ko satat utkarsh ke liye prerit karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru ki suhridayta hi shishya ke jeevan ko satat utkarsh ke liye prerit karti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Gurudev ke vasudevay sarvam,svaruup Prem ke prati satat anugrehit rahen.
messages.fullText:
Gurudev ke vasudevay sarvam,svaruup Prem ke prati satat anugrehit rahen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru ke prati aknishth hue bagair Satya mani kabhi bhi haath nahi lag sakti.
messages.fullText:
Guru ke prati aknishth hue bagair Satya mani kabhi bhi haath nahi lag sakti.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru Dev ke vrihad svarup ki alokikta,anant rupta v adhbudhta ko shat shat pranam.
messages.fullText:
Guru Dev ke vrihad svarup ki alokikta,anant rupta v adhbudhta ko shat shat pranam.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan moolyon ki kabhi bhi avhelna na karen,samay hi Bhagvan hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan moolyon ki kabhi bhi avhelna na karen,samay hi Bhagvan hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Tyag hi manushyatv hai,man prashansa nahi.
messages.fullText:
Tyag hi manushyatv hai,man prashansa nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamari asakti hi(rag ,dwesh ke antergat)hi hume dukh deti hai,koi bhi anya nahi.
messages.fullText:
Hamari asakti hi(rag ,dwesh ke antergat)hi hume dukh deti hai,koi bhi anya nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bhagvan ki shreshthtam abhivyakti hai,Pavitrata.
messages.fullText:
Bhagvan ki shreshthtam abhivyakti hai,Pavitrata.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sare sadhan hamare shubh achran niyantrata ke liye hai,hamara Vivek sthayee reh sake.
messages.fullText:
Sare sadhan hamare shubh achran niyantrata ke liye hai,hamara Vivek sthayee reh sake.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya jeevan atyant beshkimti hai,iska parichay hume satguru charno me hi aaker milta hai,ateh isse shreshth karyon me hi salagn rakhen.
messages.fullText:
Manushya jeevan atyant beshkimti hai,iska parichay hume satguru charno me hi aaker milta hai,ateh isse shreshth karyon me hi salagn rakhen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan akmatr jeevan ke ashrey se hi hai,aur uska ashrey akmatr Satya hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan akmatr jeevan ke ashrey se hi hai,aur uska ashrey akmatr Satya hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Manushya jeevan ki amulyata ko samajh akmatr iski sarthakta me salagnata Satguru kripa se hi sambhav hai.
messages.fullText:
Manushya jeevan ki amulyata ko samajh akmatr iski sarthakta me salagnata Satguru kripa se hi sambhav hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamari chetna ka star hi hamare liye do,s and don't,s ka nirnay karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamari chetna ka star hi hamare liye do,s and don't,s ka nirnay karta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamara jaisa drishya, darshan,shravan hoga,anurup hi hamare vichar bhi honge ateh apne avlokan me satat salagn rahen,ye hi hamare sanvar ki prakriya hai,ye hi adhyatm hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamara jaisa drishya, darshan,shravan hoga,anurup hi hamare vichar bhi honge ateh apne avlokan me satat salagn rahen,ye hi hamare sanvar ki prakriya hai,ye hi adhyatm hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki alp avadhi ko akmatr  sarthak karyon me salagn reh vyatit karen,yehi Hari icchha hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki alp avadhi ko akmatr  sarthak karyon me salagn reh vyatit karen,yehi Hari icchha hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki atyant mulyavan vastu hai, Samay.iska sadupyog ker apni yatharthta ko labdh ho jana hi Vivek hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki atyant mulyavan vastu hai, Samay.iska sadupyog ker apni yatharthta ko labdh ho jana hi Vivek hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Mantr jaap, Bhajan akmatr Atm nirikshan ki sadhna hai.
messages.fullText:
Mantr jaap, Bhajan akmatr Atm nirikshan ki sadhna hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Guru vividh paristithiyon me hamare mun ko parishkrit,nirmit karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Guru vividh paristithiyon me hamare mun ko parishkrit,nirmit karta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki maang svayam ke Anand rupta ki aur lotna hai.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki maang svayam ke Anand rupta ki aur lotna hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Uunche karyon me aapka saath dene vale hi aapke sacche apne hai,shesh se duri rakhni hi uchit hai.
messages.fullText:
Uunche karyon me aapka saath dene vale hi aapke sacche apne hai,shesh se duri rakhni hi uchit hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sachche guru ki sammukhta pa lene per bhay, sanshay ka nirmulan ho jata hai.
messages.fullText:
Sachche guru ki sammukhta pa lene per bhay, sanshay ka nirmulan ho jata hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Rest Karo beta.
messages.fullText:
Rest Karo beta.
Hari om.

messages.text: Shukrane beta.
messages.fullText:
Shukrane beta.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Shradhha alokik tatv hai,jo akmatr Satguru anugreh se pragat hoti hai,fir sansar ki duvidhayen nahi reh jati,sub Brahm ka vistar hai.
messages.fullText:
Shradhha alokik tatv hai,jo akmatr Satguru anugreh se pragat hoti hai,fir sansar ki duvidhayen nahi reh jati,sub Brahm ka vistar hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sukh dukh andrik dharatal ki cheejen hai,anand sarvatit hai,kisi kaid me nahi.
messages.fullText:
Sukh dukh andrik dharatal ki cheejen hai,anand sarvatit hai,kisi kaid me nahi.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sanyam aur svayam ke abhyas ka satatya hi hume niranter uuper uthata chalta hai.
messages.fullText:
Sanyam aur svayam ke abhyas ka satatya hi hume niranter uuper uthata chalta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Satsang ki niranterta avidya ki paash ko shithil ker Satya aaroodh karvane me satat hetu hai.
messages.fullText:
Satsang ki niranterta avidya ki paash ko shithil ker Satya aaroodh karvane me satat hetu hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sansar ki hur vastu Param ki vibhuti hai,ateh uska samman v sadupyog karen.
messages.fullText:
Sansar ki hur vastu Param ki vibhuti hai,ateh uska samman v sadupyog karen.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Chetna ka tul hi hamare liye do,s and don't,s ka nirnay karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Chetna ka tul hi hamare liye do,s and don't,s ka nirnay karta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Pura sansar bhi mil jaye,aur Bhagvan na milen ,sauda adhura aur alp hai.
messages.fullText:
Pura sansar bhi mil jaye,aur Bhagvan na milen ,sauda adhura aur alp hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Geeta liberation ki Vidya hai,jo hume hamari strength ka pata de tamam mayavi jalon se mukt karti hai.
messages.fullText:
Geeta liberation ki Vidya hai,jo hume hamari strength ka pata de tamam mayavi jalon se mukt karti hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Jeevan ki sarvotam ghatna hoti hai,ak jaage hue Purush ka milna, jo hamare jeevan me adhyatm ki aag lagade.
messages.fullText:
Jeevan ki sarvotam ghatna hoti hai,ak jaage hue Purush ka milna, jo hamare jeevan me adhyatm ki aag lagade.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sadhna ka mool hai Guru agya,isike antas me sadhak ko gehanta ke suutr milte hai.
messages.fullText:
Sadhna ka mool hai Guru agya,isike antas me sadhak ko gehanta ke suutr milte hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Munn se vilagta hi mukti hai, elevation hai.
messages.fullText:
Munn se vilagta hi mukti hai, elevation hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Gyan ,vairagya ke abhav me bhakti jad hi hai.
messages.fullText:
Gyan ,vairagya ke abhav me bhakti jad hi hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Apni jhoothi ahmanyata ko vishudhh ahmanyata tuk pahuncha dene ka naam hi yog hai.
messages.fullText:
Apni jhoothi ahmanyata ko vishudhh ahmanyata tuk pahuncha dene ka naam hi yog hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Ujalon ki upasna Karo,atit ke andheron v bhavishya ke agyat galiyaron me mut bhatko.
messages.fullText:
Ujalon ki upasna Karo,atit ke andheron v bhavishya ke agyat galiyaron me mut bhatko.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Sant,Mahatma,Guru Jun hamare bheeter utsah,umang jagane ke liye aaj ke yug ke anusar prasangon ka vivechan karte hai,taki hum atmsat ker saken.
messages.fullText:
Sant,Mahatma,Guru Jun hamare bheeter utsah,umang jagane ke liye aaj ke yug ke anusar prasangon ka vivechan karte hai,taki hum atmsat ker saken.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Bahut shukrane beta.....
messages.fullText:
Bahut shukrane beta.....
Hari om.

messages.text: Manushya ke pass gyan,vichar v chintan ka bul hai,ab yeh hum per nirbhar hai hum kya hoker jeena chahte hai,prakash stambh ya adhere kuyen me rehker.
messages.fullText:
Manushya ke pass gyan,vichar v chintan ka bul hai,ab yeh hum per nirbhar hai hum kya hoker jeena chahte hai,prakash stambh ya adhere kuyen me rehker.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Saanchha satsang Satya ki svikaryata se bheeter hi bheeter hota hai, vahi bahar bhi reflect karta hai.
messages.fullText:
Saanchha satsang Satya ki svikaryata se bheeter hi bheeter hota hai, vahi bahar bhi reflect karta hai.
Guru sharnam.

messages.text: Hamara mool svabhav hi hamara dharm hai,ateh jo jitna apne mool svabhav ke aas paas hai ,vo utna hi anandit hai.
messages.fullText:
Hamara mool svabhav hi hamara dharm hai,ateh jo jitna apne mool svabhav ke aas paas hai ,vo utna hi anandit hai.
Guru sharnam.
